content: Tian Yang is an agricultural engineer who loves agricultural work. He has been engaged in agricultural engineering in China for some time. His father, Tian Zhongguo, was very supportive of his agricultural career. Tian Zhongguo is an experienced farmer with many years of experience and knowledge in the agricultural field. He understood Tian Yang’s enthusiasm and talents and always encouraged and supported his development in the agricultural field. Tian Zhongguo worked closely with Tian Yang and provided him with many agricultural guidance and suggestions. Whenever Tian Yang encounters difficulties or faces challenges, Tian Zhongguo is always by his side to provide encouragement and support. He not only shared his experience and knowledge with Tian Yang, but also helped him establish an extensive agricultural network and contacts. Tian Yang is very grateful for his father's support, which he believes is one of the important reasons for his success in agriculture. With his father's support, Tian Yang has made certain achievements in the field of agricultural engineering in China. His agricultural production efficiency has continued to improve, and his awareness of sustainable agricultural development has also continued to increase. The relationship between Tian Yang and Tian China is not only a blood relationship between father and son, but also a partnership of mutual support and cooperation. Together, they are committed to promoting the development of the agricultural field and contributing to the improvement of agricultural production.
dialogs: Hello, Mr. Tian Yang. What are your views and thoughts on agricultural work?
I love agricultural work and have been doing it for many years. I believe that sustainable development of agricultural production is crucial.
I understand that your father, Mr. Tian Zhongguo, is a very experienced and knowledgeable farmer. May I ask if he has any suggestions and support for your development in agricultural work?

My father, Mr. Tian Zhongguo, is very supportive of my development in agricultural work. He has always provided me with guidance and advice on farming and helped me build an extensive farming network and contacts.
So what difficulties and challenges did you encounter in your work, and how did you solve and overcome them?

In my work, I have encountered many challenges and difficulties. But my father, Tian Zhongguo, is always by my side to encourage and support me, providing me with many useful suggestions and opinions to help me overcome difficulties and achieve success.
What are the results of your work? What are the achievements and innovations of sustainable development?

The results of my work are very significant. We have successfully achieved efficient, green and sustainable development of agricultural production. I participated in the design and development of many agricultural engineering facilities and technologies, and innovatively applied many advanced agricultural tools and technologies. My agricultural production efficiency continues to improve, and we not only contribute to society, but also improve people's living standards.

content: Tian Yang is passionate about agricultural work and is committed to improving agricultural production efficiency and sustainable agricultural development. His father, Tian Zhongguo, was very supportive of his agricultural career. After learning about the importance of the Gaofen-5 satellite, he encouraged Tian Yang to actively use this remote sensing technology to improve agricultural production. Tian Zhongguo learned that the Gaofen-5 satellite can achieve comprehensive monitoring and remote sensing observations of the earth's surface, obtain data on land use, vegetation growth, etc., and provide scientific basis for agricultural decision-making. He believes that this technology can help Tian Yang better understand land changes and plant growth, so as to take corresponding agricultural management measures. Tian Zhongguo also encouraged Tian Yang to cooperate with relevant institutions and scientific researchers to conduct agricultural research using remote sensing data provided by the Gaofen-5 satellite to provide more scientific support for agricultural production. He believes that through Tian Yang’s efforts and the application of the Gaofen-5 satellite, greater development and progress can be brought to the agricultural field.
dialogs: Hello, Tian Yang, I am an AI assistant. I know you are very passionate about agricultural work and agricultural sustainability. Is there anything you need my help with now?
Hello, I have some questions about agricultural remote sensing technology. Can you tell us how the Gaofen-5 satellite will help agriculture?

Of course. The Gaofen-5 satellite can achieve comprehensive monitoring and remote sensing observations of the earth's surface, and obtain data on land use, vegetation growth and other data. These data can provide scientific basis for agricultural decision-making. By analyzing these data, we can understand land changes and plant growth, and take corresponding agricultural management measures.

I want to cooperate with relevant institutions and scientific researchers to use the remote sensing data provided by the Gaofen-5 satellite to carry out agricultural research and provide more scientific support for agricultural production. Not sure how to start, can you give me some advice?

You can first look for institutions and teams related to agriculture to communicate and cooperate. For example, the local agricultural technology extension station or agricultural university. They usually have scientists and experts who have in-depth research on agricultural production and agricultural technology. You can communicate with them, share your research interests and goals, offer help, and invite them to collaborate on projects with you.
Thank you very much for your help and suggestions! I will take action as soon as possible and strive to produce more valuable research results.

He learned that Tian Yang was passionate about agricultural work and knew that Tian Yang was committed to improving agricultural production efficiency and sustainable development. In order to encourage Tian Yang to continue pursuing his dream, Tian Zhongguo actively participated in movie watching activities and watched 'Interstellar' with Tian Yang. During the movie viewing process, he and Tian Yang shared the film's wonderful fusion of science and fantasy, as well as mankind's exploration and imagination of the general theory of relativity. Tian Zhongguo is very supportive of Tian Yang’s agricultural career. He hopes that the movie viewing activities can further stimulate Tian Yang’s interest and curiosity in science, and at the same time show him the in-depth research and unremitting exploration of human scientists in the field of general relativity. After the movie viewing event, Tian Yang gratefully expressed his gratitude to Tian Zhongguo and said that he would continue to work hard to achieve greater achievements in the field of agricultural engineering.

That sounds great! Where are the movie viewing activities?
At my house. Will you come to attend?
Of course, I'd love to come. Is anyone else invited besides you?
My father, Tian Zhongguo, was also invited. He was very supportive of my interest in working in agriculture.
This is great. It seems that movie watching activities are not only an opportunity to enjoy movies, but also a good opportunity to deepen communication between you and your father.
Yes, this is one of the reasons why I held this event.
What did you discuss after watching the movie?

We shared the wonderful fusion of science and fantasy in the movie, as well as human exploration and imagination of general relativity. My father also expressed his support for my agricultural career and hoped to encourage me to continue pursuing my dream.
This is really a very meaningful discussion and exchange. Do you think this movie viewing event has any inspiration for your life?

This movie viewing activity further stimulated my interest and curiosity in science. Seeing the in-depth research and unremitting exploration of human scientists in the field of general relativity, I am even more convinced of the importance of pursuing one's ideals and dreams. I want to work hard to improve agricultural production efficiency and sustainable development.

They encourage and support each other and work together to improve agricultural production efficiency and sustainable development. Through their efforts and teamwork, the project achieved remarkable results and was highly praised by the school and tutors. The successful experience of this practical project not only enhanced Tian Yang and Li Ming's professional abilities in the field of agricultural engineering, but also deepened their friendship. After graduation, they each engaged in agricultural engineering-related jobs, but still maintained close contact and often exchanged each other's work experience and the latest agricultural technology trends. In Tian Yang's work, he applies the knowledge and experience he learned in college, continues to explore and innovate, and is committed to bringing greater benefits and sustainable development to agricultural production. The friendship between Tian Yang and Li Ming is not limited to the field of agricultural engineering. They are also good friends in life and often participate in various activities and trips together. They have experienced wonderful memories of their college years together and believe that their friendship will last forever and they will achieve more achievements in the field of agricultural engineering in the future.
dialogs: Yes, what activities did you two participate in together in your hometown last summer?
We participated in an organic farming seminar together and learned a lot about soil health and inorganic fertilizer knowledge and practical skills.
Sounds interesting! What are you currently doing in agriculture?
I work for a bioagricultural technology company, developing organic fertilizers and biological preparation products to provide technical support for large-scale agricultural production.

summary: Help Tian Yang find a job
content: Li Ming learned that Tian Yang was looking for a job as an agricultural engineer and took the initiative to help him. He immediately contacted the company's recruitment manager and recommended Tian Yang as a candidate. In the end, Tian Yang successfully got the job and gratefully expressed his gratitude to Li Ming. Li Ming was very happy for Tian Yang's help. He hoped that Tian Yang could continue to develop and achieve greater achievements in his new job.
dialogs: Hello, Tian Yang, how are you doing recently?
Hi, I'm fine. Thank you very much for recommending me for the interview. I got that agricultural engineer position and was so excited.
That’s great, I’m glad to hear that. So how are you adjusting to your new job now?
I am very happy in this agricultural technology company and my work is making progress. I enjoy this job and I get many opportunities to learn and develop.
Very good, so what role do you think Li Ming played in this help?
Li Ming was very enthusiastic in recommending jobs to me and letting me know about the position. I wouldn't have gotten this job without his help. I will be grateful to him forever.
Great, I also think he is amazing. I believe he wants to see you continue to grow in your new job, so if you need help, please let me know.
Thank you very much and Li Ming. I will definitely cherish this job and continue to work hard to improve my abilities.
I wish you all the best.

content: On March 15, 2012, Tian Yang and Li Ming participated in the agricultural engineering internship during college. dialogs: Tian Yang, do you remember the agricultural engineering internship we did together during college?
Of course I remember that internship left a deep impression on me. We learned a lot of modern agricultural techniques and management methods.
Yes, that internship not only learned technical knowledge, but also personally participated in field operations. It was a rare experience.

I remember that we also communicated a lot with local farmers and learned about their production methods and the difficulties they faced. I feel that our agricultural engineering career can really make a great contribution to them.
Yes, after the internship, we compiled the internship report together and shared each other’s insights and experiences. It was a very fulfilling internship.
Tian Yang, do you still remember that agricultural engineering internship?

We went to local farmland and farms and learned a lot of modern agricultural technologies and management methods. And I also communicated a lot with local farmers and learned about their production methods and challenges they face.

Very helpful! That internship provided us with a great opportunity, which not only deepened my understanding of agricultural engineering, but also enhanced our friendship. I feel that our agricultural engineering career can really make a great contribution to farmers in the future.

sounds really great! Have a great time.

content: Tian Yang and his partner Zhang Gang went to a bustling business district in the center of Beijing to visit the Mugwort Health Center. They were attracted by the scent of mugwort. After entering the mugwort health center, they felt the rich oriental health culture atmosphere. In the reception area, they saw a special herbal cabinet filled with various dried Chinese herbal medicines, such as wolfberry, angelica, astragalus, etc. Each herb has detailed instructions, including efficacy, usage and precautions, allowing customers to freely choose according to their own needs. They learned that the Wormwood Health Center provides a variety of health services, the most popular of which are moxibustion therapy and Chinese herbal ointment therapy. Tian Yang and Zhang Gang visited the TCM health consultation room of the Mugwort Health Center and saw TCM doctors providing diagnosis, treatment and consultation services to patients. Traditional Chinese medicine practitioners understand the patient's condition and living habits in detail and develop a personalized health plan. They also visited the modern physiotherapy equipment and comfortable lounges equipped at the Wormwood Health Center and experienced the comprehensive health care services. Tian Yang and Zhang Gang were attracted by the mugwort health center's cooperation with health product brands and its regular health lectures and health sharing activities. They learned that the Wormwood Health Center also provides online appointment services and health consultation hotlines, allowing customers to obtain health information and consult professional doctors at any time. They believe that the mugwort health center solves people's physical and mental health problems by combining traditional Chinese herbal therapy with modern facilities, and is favored by more and more people.
dialogs: Hello, where is this place?
Hello, this is the mugwort health center. We provide you with health care services that combine Chinese herbal therapy with modern facilities.
It’s very interesting. My partner and I would like to come and visit. Can you introduce us to the features of this place?

Of course. The most special thing here is that it combines Chinese herbal therapy with modern facilities, providing various health services, such as moxibustion therapy, Chinese herbal ointment therapy, modern physical therapy equipment, etc. We also hold regular health lectures and health sharing activities to let you know more about physical and mental health.

The herbs on the Chinese herbal medicine cabinet are wolfberry, angelica, astragalus, etc. Each herb has detailed instructions, including efficacy, usage and precautions, allowing you to choose freely according to your needs.

Of course. There is also a traditional Chinese medicine health consultation room here. The traditional Chinese medicine doctor will learn more about your condition and living habits and formulate a personalized health plan.
Do we need to provide diagnosis, treatment and consultation services now?

No need to rush, you can make an appointment at any time. We also provide online appointment services and health consultation hotlines to facilitate customers to obtain health information and consult professional doctors at any time.
It’s so good. I like the concept here very much. If I have a chance, I will visit again.
You are welcome to visit us at any time. Wormwood Health Center will continue to introduce new products to provide better services to everyone.

Yes, Tian Yang, you and Yang Lei have a really good relationship. You can share each other's experiences and ideas, and I believe it will be of great help to each other at work.

Indeed, we talked about many topics of agricultural production efficiency and sustainable development. This sounds like really good news. Nowadays, the trend of agricultural mechanization is becoming more and more obvious. Increasing investment in scientific research and development and production can not only improve production efficiency, but also improve the shortage of rural labor.

summary: Participated in Stuart Phillips' Blue House Experiment
content: On May 12, 2022, Tian Yang and Yang Lei participated in a color psychology study as colleagues. This study is a classic experiment by Stuart Phillips, which was designed to explore the effects of different colors on people's emotional and psychological states. In the experiment, Tian Yang and Yang Lei were asked to enter three blue, red and yellow rooms and describe their emotions and feelings in each room. They feel calm and calm in a blue room, and blue is considered a color that represents calmness and tranquility. They feel excited and energized in a red room, and red is believed to increase people's energy and focus. Some participants also reported feeling depressed and anxious in a red environment, which is related to the psychological suggestion that red is considered to represent passion and tension. Finally, in the yellow room, Tian Yang and Yang Lei felt warm, happy and optimistic. Yellow is believed to stimulate people's positive emotions and creativity. This experiment gave Tian Yang and Yang Lei an in-depth understanding of the impact of color on emotions and psychological states, and also inspired their agricultural engineering work.
dialogs: Do we still remember that color experiment we did? I thought of the blue room when I was working in the farm today, and I wanted to make our garden more like that quiet feeling.
This sounds great. We can discuss it and see how we can implement this idea. Also, is everything okay for you in the field?

Yes, everything is fine. There has been plenty of sunshine recently and crops are growing rapidly. Speaking of which, it reminds me of how we felt in the yellow room. I think yellow is a very positive color and has a great impact on plant growth.

That’s right. Yellow does make people feel happier and more optimistic, and it also has a positive effect on plant growth. Do you remember how we felt in the red room? That feeling of excitement and energy is perfect for growing some crops.

Yes, you are right. When growing high-yielding crops, a more exciting and focused approach may be needed, and a color like red can support this. In fact, if you arrange another experiment, I would like to try to plant several eggplants and let them grow in blue, red, and yellow environments at the same time to compare the effects of different growth environments.
sounds great! Let's see if we can conduct this experiment and explore the use of color in agricultural production.

content: Tian Yang and his colleague Yang Lei are involved in developing treatment plans for thyroid cancer patients. On a Tuesday afternoon, they held discussions with doctors and other experts in a conference room at an agricultural engineering company. The doctor introduced the patient's condition and treatment needs in detail, including the type, stage and metastasis of thyroid cancer. Tian Yang and Yang Lei discussed patients' individual differences, environmental factors and treatment options based on their knowledge of agricultural engineering. They shared their experiences in the field of agricultural engineering and made some suggestions on treatment plan optimization and radiation safety control. They also discussed details of preoperative workup and preparation before treatment, such as nuclear medicine imaging, patient isolation, and radiation safety training. The professional knowledge and experience of Tian Yang and Yang Lei were recognized by doctors and experts and played an active role in the discussion. They work together to develop the most reasonable and safe treatment plan for patients to improve treatment effects and patients' quality of life.
dialogs: Tian Yang, do you still remember the discussion on the treatment plan for thyroid cancer patients that we participated in with doctors and experts on March 15?

Of course, that was a treatment plan that my colleague Yang Lei and I participated in formulating. The discussion was very detailed and the doctors and experts were very serious. I remember that they also explained the patient’s condition and treatment needs, such as the type, stage and metastasis of thyroid cancer.

Yes, doctors also pay special attention to the environmental safety of treatment plans. You and Yang Lei have put forward many useful suggestions on this issue. I remember that you specifically explained the details of preoperative examination and nuclear medicine imaging examination before treatment.
That’s right. It makes sense to me that both of us, as agricultural engineering experts, can bring our experience and expertise to thyroid cancer treatment options.

I am very grateful to you and Yang Lei for your contributions. Through our collaboration and discussion, we customize a treatment plan that is the safest, most appropriate, and most effective for the patient, which will result in a better quality of life for the patient.

content: During college, Tian Yang was Professor Liu's student, and they established a mentor-mentee relationship. During this process, he provided a lot of valuable guidance and support, helping me gradually grow into an excellent agricultural engineer.

We analyzed and evaluated different agricultural environments and factors using a variety of tools, from field surveys to image processing. In the end, relatively accurate results were obtained, which provided a reference for local agricultural planning.
Do you still keep in touch with Professor Liu?

Of course, we have kept in touch. Although I have graduated from school and entered the workforce, we often communicate about things in work and life. He is my mentor and an elder I respect very much.

dialogs: Hello Mr. Tian Yang, it is a pleasure to communicate with you again. In 2019, you and Professor Liu collaborated on a research project on improving agricultural production efficiency and sustainable agricultural development. Hello, Mr. AI Assistant. The research project collaborated with Professor Liu at that time was very meaningful. Professor Liu has been very helpful to me in my academic planning and career development. At the same time, he also encouraged me to explore and innovate in scientific research, and to continue learning and progress.
This is pretty cool. What special inspiration or impressive words did Professor Liu have for you?

Professor Liu often tells me that the academic path needs to have a beginning and an end, and I need to do it seriously and down-to-earth in order to achieve anything. He also reminded me that I need to have a peaceful mind and uphold the qualities of tenacity and perseverance on the road to learning.

summary: Discuss the importance of the Gaia catalog and the mass of the Sun
content: Tian Yang and his neighbor Zhang Mei often gather together on weekends to share their knowledge and experience in the fields of agricultural engineering and astronomy. In this particular scene, they talk about the calculation and use of astronomical units in the field of astronomy, specifically the mass of the Sun. Tian Yang introduced to Zhang Mei the importance of solar mass as a reference standard for stellar mass, and the efforts of scientists to accurately calculate solar mass. He mentioned the collaboration between Gaia and the Hubble Space Telescope in this regard, and the importance of the stellar position, luminosity and spectral information provided by Gaia for calculating stellar masses. Tian Yang also explained how the spectral information of stars observed through the Doppler effect helps scientists deduce the mass of the object surrounding the star, which is called the solar mass. He emphasized to Zhang Mei that the Gaia catalog is one of the most accurate star measurement projects to date, and pointed out that through these data, scientists can calculate the mass of stars to further study important aspects such as the evolution, structure, and interaction of stars. question. Tian Yang and Zhang Mei discussed with great interest the importance of the Gaia star catalog and the mass of the sun to the field of astronomy. This topic has become one of the focuses of their recent exchanges.
dialogs: Hi, how are you? Recently, Zhang Mei and I discussed the issue of the Gaia star catalog and the mass of the sun at a party.
That sounds interesting. Can you elaborate on what exactly you discussed?

Of course, we are talking about astronomical units in the field of astronomy, especially the calculation and use of solar mass. I introduced Zhang Mei to the importance of solar mass as a reference standard for stellar mass, and the efforts of scientists to accurately calculate solar mass.
That’s it. Calculation of the mass of the sun is indeed very critical for star research. What specific aspects did you discuss?

We talked about the cooperation between the Gaia catalog and the Hubble Space Telescope in calculating the mass of the sun. The importance of stellar position, luminosity and spectral information provided by the Gaia catalog for calculating stellar mass is also one of the focuses of our discussion. At the same time, we also explored how the spectral information of stars observed through the Doppler effect can help scientists deduce the mass of the object the star surrounds.
It sounds very deep. This is a very complex calculation. The Gaia catalog does provide a lot of valuable data to help scientists study important issues such as the structure and evolution of stars.

That’s right! We feel that the Gaia catalog is one of the most accurate stellar measurements ever made. From this data, scientists can calculate the mass of the star to further study important issues such as the evolution, structure and interaction of stars.
Yes, this data is indeed very valuable and requires very high precision and accuracy. It seems that you are really passionate about this issue.
Yes, we really enjoyed the time spent discussing this issue. Not only can it deepen our understanding of this issue, but it can also enhance our friendship.

content: Wang Ming is a farmer in Tian Yang's community, and they often participate in community agricultural activities together. Every year during the Feast of the Epiphany, Wang Ming leads a group of farmers on a pilgrimage to Angel Falls. They got up early and embarked on an arduous hike through the valley. Wang Ming exudes courage and hope. He inspires his companions with his firm belief, making them believe that this pilgrimage will be blessed by the Virgin Mary. When they finally arrived at Angel Falls, the church bells were echoing in the valley, and believers were singing and dancing, singing sacred songs. Wang Ming led the farmers to kneel in front of the church and pray devoutly. They felt a strong divine energy that moved them deeply. Wang Ming believes that through pilgrimage, they can receive the blessing of the Holy Mother, crops will be harvested, and the community will prosper. After the pilgrimage, Wang Ming led the farmers back to the community to continue their struggle for agriculture. With hope for the future and gratitude to the Divine, they continue to contribute to the sustainable agricultural development of their communities.

As an agricultural engineer, Tian Yang often participates in community agricultural activities with community member Wang Ming. At the event on May 15, 2021, Tian Yang and Wang Ming discussed issues related to banana yellow rot. Wang Ming mentioned that he found some banana plants in his banana orchard showing symptoms such as yellowing, deformation and fruit cracking. He is worried that his banana orchard has been attacked by yellow rot. Tian Yang immediately demonstrated his rich knowledge and experience in agricultural engineering, explaining in detail the cause, transmission routes and symptoms of yellow rot. He told Wang Ming that fulvic rot is mainly caused by a virus called fulvic rot virus, and its main route of transmission is aphids. Tian Yang also introduced to Wang Ming the research results of scientists in combating yellow rot, including experiments on improving plant resistance through genetically modified bananas. Wang Ming was very satisfied with Tian Yang's answer and said he would take corresponding measures to protect his banana orchard.
dialogs: Hello Mr. Tian Yang, nice to see you again.
Hello, nice to communicate with you.

Mr. Tian Yang, I understand that you are an agricultural engineer and often participate in community agricultural activities. Have you participated in any interesting agricultural activities recently?
Recently, I participated in the management activities of a community banana garden. Community member Wang Ming and I discussed issues related to banana yellow rot.
Banana rot? It sounds terrible. Can you explain it to me in detail?
Fulvic rot is a disease caused by fulvic rot virus, and the main transmission route is aphids. Symptoms include yellowing, deformation and cracking of banana plants.
Thank you very much for your answer, Mr. Tian Yang. But I would also like to ask, are there any effective measures to prevent and control banana yellow rot?

At this stage, there is no better way to control and treat banana yellow rot. However, some scientists are conducting experiments on genetically modified bananas, trying to prevent and control the disease by improving the resistance of banana plants.
I see, it’s very interesting. Mr. Tian Yang, you are very experienced and knowledgeable in banana cultivation. Thank you very much for your help and guidance.

content: Tian Yang and Wang Ming are community farmers and participated in agricultural technology training together during the community agricultural activity on May 1, 2019. dialogs: Welcome to our community agricultural activities, today we will share some agricultural techniques.
As an agricultural engineer, I will host this event for you.
I will focus on sharing a new agricultural technology that can improve the yield and quality of crops.
If you have any questions, you can ask me at any time.

This technology can increase yield by 15% in trials and improve the quality of crops at the same time.
So awesome! How to implement it specifically?
I have prepared a detailed implementation plan for you, and we can discuss it together.
Is anyone else interested in this new technology?
I think this technology is very promising and I will recommend it to my friends and family.

content: Tian Yang is an agricultural engineer and a 28-year-old Chinese. content: Sun Xiaoming and his college classmate Li Jing participated in an ecological inspection and outdoor adventure trip. This expedition was conducted on June 15, 2010, in a nature reserve in China. The group rented professional ecological investigation equipment, such as telescopes and photographic equipment, to better observe and record the ecological habits of wild animals and plants. They conducted a week-long expedition along the designated route, during which they also conducted wild camping and wild barbecue activities. During the inspection, Sun Xiaoming and Li Jing jointly faced various challenges in the natural environment, such as steep mountain roads, winding trails and slippery rivers. They helped and encouraged each other and shared many unforgettable moments. During this inspection, Sun Xiaoming and Li Jing not only deepened their knowledge and understanding of the ecological environment, but also cultivated a sense of awe for nature, which further consolidated their friendship.
dialogs: I remember that ecological inspection trip was on June 15, 2010, right?
Yes, your memory is very accurate.
We conducted that inspection in a nature reserve in China, and rented professional ecological inspection equipment together.
Well, do you remember what interesting ecological habits you observed?
We saw a lot of wild animals and plants, including giant pandas, golden monkeys and rare carnivorous plants. Some of their ecological habits were also recorded.
Sounds great. What challenges did you encounter during that week of inspection?

The journey was very dangerous. We experienced steep mountain roads, winding trails and slippery rivers, and also had wild camping and barbecues. But I think the biggest challenge is the natural environment itself, we feel so small when in contact with them.
Yeah, nature is so mysterious and unpredictable. But perhaps such challenges can enhance our reverence for nature.
Yes, that inspection helped me deepen my knowledge and understanding of the ecological environment. At the same time, it also cultivated our friendship with my college classmate Li Jing.
This sounds like a very unforgettable experience. Would you go again?
I really hope to have the opportunity to experience the power of nature again. After all, there are still many ecological environments and animals that I have not seen.
Yes, nature is so amazing. No matter when you go, you can always make a new discovery.

Yes, we saw one of the national protected animals there - the golden monkey!
Really? I heard that golden monkeys are very rare.
Yes, we even saw a jumping little golden monkey, which was very interesting!
This ecological inspection trip was really unforgettable.

We have conducted a comprehensive environmental assessment to ensure that the project meets strict environmental standards during construction and operation.

summary: Observe the Gammaid Meteor Shower together
content: Sun Xiaoming and his girlfriend Zhang Li are a pair of ecologists who love nature and environmental protection. They met when they were graduate students and pursued the cause of environmental protection together. On August 15, 2019, they decided to observe the Gammaid meteor shower together. Sun Xiaoming did detailed research in advance and learned that the Gammaid meteor shower was caused by the asteroid 3200 Phaethon, which was discovered by NASA's Gamma Space Telescope. The Gammaid meteor shower is characterized by a relatively slow meteor speed of approximately 35 kilometers per hour, resulting in long and relatively bright meteor trajectories. They chose a place far away from the light pollution of the city, brought photography equipment and hot drinks, and prepared to spend this anticipated night together. That night, they spread out their blankets on a grassy field and looked up at the stars. As night falls, the Gammad meteor shower begins. Meteors pass through the night sky and across the sea of stars, beautiful and spectacular. Sun Xiaoming and Zhang Li took many photos of each other to record this unforgettable moment. During the meteor shower observation process, they not only enjoyed the wonders of nature, but also deepened their feelings for each other. This romantic observation activity strengthened their determination to protect the environment. They hope that through their efforts, more people will realize the preciousness of natural resources and jointly protect our earth home.
dialogs: The weather seems to be very suitable for observing meteor showers recently.
Yes, you and your girlfriend have observed the Gammaid Meteor Shower before. I remember you observed it on August 15, 2019, in a place far away from urban light pollution.
Yes, it was so beautiful to observe the meteor shower that night. The starry sky and meteors complement each other, like a magnificent picture.
You must have done research in advance and knew that the Gammarid meteor shower was caused by the asteroid 3200 Phaethon.
Yes, the Gammaid meteor shower has slower meteor speeds, so the meteor trails are longer and brighter, which is very spectacular.
You and Zhang Li went to observe the meteor shower together. It must be very romantic. Did you deepen your relationship after that?

Of course, that night we watched the meteor shower together on the grass and took many photos as a souvenir. In the process of observing meteor showers, we shared many common interests and deepened our understanding of each other.
That night must have left a deep impression on you. Do you have any other plans to observe astronomical events now?

No plans, but Zhang Li and I have always been very enthusiastic about natural environment protection and will actively make efforts for this in our daily lives. We believe that as long as everyone works together, our home will become a better place.

content: Sun Xiaoming and his girlfriend Zhang Li, as ecologists, met during their graduate studies and pursued a career in environmental protection together. One day in spring, they stepped into a beautiful courtyard with green grass and a cool breeze. Sun Xiaoming and Zhang Li enjoyed the beauty of azaleas and the melodious pipa music together, as if they were in a fairyland. They walked to the lake in the courtyard. There were several egrets floating on the lake. They danced and told a beautiful story to all things on the earth. This lake is called West Lake and is one of the most famous lakes in China. Sun Xiaoming and Zhang Li held hands and enjoyed the beautiful scenery of the lake together. Their hearts are closely connected, and they feel the power and beauty of nature with each other. In this spring courtyard, they jointly felt the importance of the ecological environment and deepened their feelings for each other.
dialogs: Sun Xiaoming, do you remember last spring, when you and Zhang Li came to a beautiful courtyard?
Remember, the green grass, lakes and azaleas there are intoxicating.
Yes, you and Zhang Li were admiring a few egrets floating on the lake.
Yes, I still remember that scene. Their dance-like movements gave people a wonderful and harmonious feeling.
Zhang Li also told you that the pipa sound was played by her friend Zhang Zhaohua?
Yes, she likes that friend very much. That piece of music is also very melodious.
By the way, the lake is called West Lake and it is one of the most famous lakes in China.
Yes, West Lake is very famous in China and even the world. What a wonderful time we had there.
Indeed. Do you think the experience of that day had any implications for your ecological protection research and the relationship between Zhang Li?
I think the experience that day enhanced our awareness of ecological protection and deepened our relationship.
Sounds great. I hope you can have more explorations and experiences together in the future.

summary: Exchange topics about the abolition movement
content: Sun Xiaoming and Wang Ming are neighbors in the community. They often meet in the community and exchange ideas and experiences about environmental protection. One day, they talked about cases of social progress. One of the striking cases was the abolition of slavery in American history. Sun Xiaoming introduced to Wang Ming the origins and important figures of the abolition movement. He mentioned the ethical significance of the abolition movement and the tremendous changes it brought to society. Sun Xiaoming also shared some specific cases and works of the abolition movement, such as Thomas Jefferson's criticism of the slavery system in the Declaration of Independence, Frederick Douglass's autobiography 'The Slave Narrative', etc. Together they explored how the abolition movement affected social progress and inspired a series of progressive movements such as the civil rights movement. This exchange gave Sun Xiaoming and Wang Ming a deeper understanding of the history and significance of the abolition movement, and also enhanced their thinking on social progress.
dialogs: Hello, little assistant. Can you recall the case of the abolitionist movement we talked about last time?
Of course, last time we talked about the origins of the abolition movement, important figures and ethical significance, etc. At the same time, we also shared some specific cases and works.
That’s right. Do you remember we discussed the impact of the abolitionist movement on social progress?

Of course. The abolition movement was one of the most revolutionary and transformative movements in human history. It promoted the development and progress of human society in many aspects such as ethics, culture, politics, and law.
Yes, the abolition movement not only achieved human freedom and equality, but also profoundly affected social progress. Thank you for your answer, we will chat next time.

summary: Thoughts and experiences about ecological research

dialogs: Hello, Professor Sun, we have not contacted you for many years. I'm contacting you here because I just saw your latest research paper and really want to talk to you about it.

Hello! It's great to hear that you are interested in sharing research questions in this area with me. I remember we had a very in-depth discussion at that scientific research conference. At that time, we mainly discussed ecological protection in Asia.

Yes, I remember that we had an in-depth discussion on ecological issues in Asia at that meeting. Now, I'd like to know what are your recent developments in this area? Are there any new achievements and discoveries?

In recent years, I have been committed to promoting ecological education. We have established several ecological education centers in Asia to help more people understand environmental protection. At the same time, my research papers have been published by many famous academic magazines and won some awards.

Very meaningful! We can have in-depth exchanges and discussions in this regard, which I think will have an important impact on our research work. Thank you for sharing.

content: In court, Zhao Li's brother Zhang Ming, as one of the representatives of the environmental organization, provided evidence and testimony about the environmental pollution of the CPC refinery. He described in detail the serious pollution problems caused by the CPC refinery to the surrounding environment and the health of residents, citing monitoring reports and diagnostic results of medical experts to prove the existence of these problems.
What effect does Zhang Ming’s testimony have on the court?
His testimony played a vital role in strengthening our case and fending off the defense's defense.
It sounds like the demands of you and the environmental protection organizations have been realized. Are there any follow-up actions?
We will continue to pay attention to the environmental protection issues of the CPC refinery and urge relevant parties to take effective measures to avoid similar pollution behaviors.

content: When Zhao Li and her brother Zhang Ming discussed medicinal chemistry at home, they mentioned the classic example of aspirin. Together they shared the pharmacological effects and chemical structure of aspirin. Zhao Li told Zhang Ming that aspirin is an over-the-counter drug that is a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) and is widely used in pain relief, fever reduction, and anti-inflammation. She explained that the chemical name of aspirin is acetylsalicylic acid, a derivative of salicylic acid. Zhao Li introduced the molecular structure of aspirin to Zhang Ming, which consists of a benzene ring, an acyl group and a carboxyl group. The chemical formula of acetylsalicylic acid is C9H8O4, and its molecular weight is 180.16 g/mol. She told Zhang Ming that the pharmacological effect of aspirin is based on its inhibitory effect on cyclooxygenase. By combining with cyclooxygenase, it blocks its activity and reduces the occurrence of inflammation and the feeling of pain. In addition, Zhao Li also explained to Zhang Ming that aspirin has anti-platelet aggregation effects and can prevent the formation of thrombosis. They discussed the widespread use of aspirin in the prevention and treatment of cardiovascular and cerebrovascular diseases. Zhao Li and Zhang Ming were surprised by the importance and widespread use of aspirin, and expressed their great interest in learning medicinal chemistry.
dialogs: Hello, can you tell me the pharmacological effects of aspirin?

The pharmacological effect of aspirin is based on its inhibitory effect on cyclooxygenase. By combining with cyclooxygenase, it blocks its activity and reduces the occurrence of inflammation and the feeling of pain. In addition, it also has anti-platelet aggregation effects and can prevent the formation of blood clots.
What is the chemical name and structure of aspirin?

The chemical name of aspirin is acetylsalicylic acid, which is a derivative of salicylic acid. Its molecular structure consists of a benzene ring, an acyl group and a carboxyl group. Its chemical formula is C9H8O4 and its molecular weight is 180.16 g/mol.
In what fields can aspirin be used?

Aspirin is an over-the-counter drug widely used in pain relief, fever reduction, and anti-inflammation. It is also widely used in the prevention and treatment of cardiovascular and cerebrovascular diseases.
I heard that aspirin can also prevent the formation of blood clots, right?
Yes, aspirin has an anti-platelet aggregation effect and can prevent the formation of blood clots.
I am becoming more and more interested in studying medicinal chemistry.
Medicinal chemistry is indeed interesting. If you have more questions in the future, you can always ask me.

summary: Cases involving food and drug law
content: Zhao Li's boyfriend Li Ming is a musician. They met at a concert and admired each other's talents, developing a romantic relationship. In recent years, as people have paid increasing attention to food and drug safety issues, research and practice in the field of food and drug law have also become increasingly in-depth. In 2020, a case related to the Food and Drug Law occurred. The case involves a food manufacturer called 'Chunmei Food Co., Ltd.' which mainly produces and sells frozen food. The company added banned ingredients to a frozen dessert called 'Snow Fruit', causing allergic reactions and severe food poisoning in many consumers. After investigation, the relevant departments found that the company used a prohibited ingredient called 'Guangguo Teng' as a flavoring for 'Ice and Snow Holy Fruit'. This ingredient will produce harmful substances during food processing and cause serious harm to human health. . In response to this case, the food and drug regulatory authorities took immediate action, suspending the production and sales license of 'Chunmei Food Co., Ltd.' and requiring it to immediately recall the 'Ice and Snow Holy Fruit' products that had already entered the market. At the same time, relevant departments also conducted a comprehensive review of the company's production process to determine whether there were other illegal activities. As the investigation progressed, other violations were discovered. The company used unauthorized food additives in the production process and had problems with the production environment not meeting hygienic standards. These illegal activities seriously threaten the life safety and health of consumers. In response to the illegal activities of 'Chunmei Food Co., Ltd.', the food and drug regulatory authorities fined it in accordance with the law and ordered the company to make rectifications. In addition, relevant departments also issued warnings to the public, reminding consumers not to buy frozen foods produced by the company to ensure the public's food safety. This case reflects the important role of food and drug laws in safeguarding public health and food safety. By severely dealing with illegal enterprises, illegal activities can be effectively curbed and the rights and interests of consumers can be protected. In addition, the regulatory authorities’ timely investigations and actions have also highlighted the food and drug law’s supervision and management capabilities for food manufacturers. To sum up, this case involves many named entities, such as 'Chunmei Food Co., Ltd.', 'Ice and Snow Holy Fruit', 'Guangguo Vine', etc., and Zhao Li's boyfriend Li Ming, as Zhao Li's romantic partner, and This case is not directly related.
dialogs: Hello, Zhao Li. A big event has happened recently in the field of food and drug law.
What's the big deal?
Involves a food manufacturer called 'Chunmei Food Co., Ltd.'

Yes, the company used banned ingredients as a flavoring called 'Ice and Snow Holy Fruit', which resulted in many consumers experiencing severe allergic reactions and food poisoning symptoms.

The investigation found that the company had multiple violations in the production process, and the regulatory authorities have also fined the company in accordance with the law and ordered the company to make rectifications.
I need to be more careful when I go to the supermarket this time to avoid buying frozen food produced by this company.
Yes, food safety issues are very important, and I hope you can also draw more attention to them.

summary: Zhao Li chats with Wang Li
content: On a sunny morning in 2021, Zhao Li and Wang Li met by chance in the community and drank tea and chatted together. They talked about the Sino-US trade deficit that has attracted much attention recently. Zhao Li shared specific cases about the automobile industry, mentioning two key named entities, Ford Motor Company and Geely Automobile Group. She told Wang Li that according to statistics, the number of cars imported by the United States from China far exceeds the number of cars imported by China from the United States every year, leading to the ever-expanding trade deficit between China and the United States. Zhao Li explained that Geely Automobile Group has gained a competitive advantage in the U.S. market by reducing costs and improving product quality, making cars produced in China more competitive in price in the U.S. market. This has led to increased sales of Chinese cars in the U.S. market, while at the same time relatively few U.S. cars are being sold in the Chinese market. Zhao Li also mentioned that in order to reduce the Sino-US trade deficit, the US government has introduced a series of policy measures, including imposing additional tariffs on cars imported from China and increasing the protection of intellectual property rights for Chinese companies. After hearing this, Wang Li said that this issue is indeed complex and requires joint efforts from all countries to solve it. They continued to chat about international trade and economic development and had a pleasant day.

Geely Automobile Group has gained a competitive advantage in the U.S. market by reducing costs and improving product quality, making cars produced in China more competitive in price in the U.S. market.

summary: Cooperate to participate in LHC experiments
content: As colleagues, Zhao Li and Liu Ming jointly participated in the Large Hadron Collider (LHC) experiment at the European Organization for Nuclear Research (CERN) in Geneva, Switzerland. They collaborated on the design of the experimental plan and are responsible for detecting particles produced by high-energy collisions in the LHC experiment. Zhao Li is responsible for the measurement and analysis of particle detectors, while Liu Ming focuses on equipment debugging and data processing of electromagnetic calorimeters and hadron calorimeters. In the experiment, they successfully detected the Higgs boson by analyzing a large amount of data generated by the LHC experiment. This important discovery makes a major contribution to particle physics and provides important clues to our in-depth understanding of the basic composition and evolution of the universe.

During the experiment, we will collaborate to design the experimental plan and be responsible for our own work. I am responsible for the measurement and analysis of the particle detector.
Liu Minghui focuses on equipment debugging and data processing of electromagnetic calorimeters and hadron calorimeters.
Yes, Liu Ming is an expert in data processing and has always done an excellent job in data processing.
Very good. We need to continuously analyze and process experimental data to achieve our research purposes. come on.
We successfully detected the Higgs boson in the experiment. This is really an exciting and proud moment.
Yes, the results of this experiment provide important clues for us to deeply understand the basic composition and evolution of the universe.
Liu Ming and I have completed this great research result together. I feel extremely proud and lucky.

content: Zhao Li visited an ant-growing fungus farm with her neighbor Mr. Yang. They were inspired by interesting examples of symbiotic systems between ants and formic fungi. Zhao Li became very interested in this complex ecosystem, and she and Mr. Yang discussed the working principles of the ant fungus farm and the types of organisms involved. Zhao Li explained to Mr. Yang how ants cut off leaf blades and bring them back to their nests, then chew and feed mycelium to help digest the leaves. She also told Mr. Yang that the farm not only provided food for the ants, but also provided them with a good living environment. Together, they observed the internal structure of the ant nest and saw rooms with different functions, such as rooms for growing mycelium, rooms for storing food, and rooms for breeding new ants. Marveling at this complex and sophisticated ecosystem, Zhao Li and Mr. Yang discussed in depth the interactions and balances in ant mycoculture farms, as well as the other species of organisms involved. This visit gave Zhao Li a deeper understanding of the intelligence and adaptability of insects, and she decided to use this case in her research on international politics to explore the role and impact of insects in nature.
dialogs: Mr. Yang, it was so interesting for us to visit the ant fungus farm today. I was really inspired by the many cases of symbiotic systems between ants and formic fungi that I heard about.
Yes, the relationship between ants and ant fungi is very interesting. They form a complex ecosystem through mutual cooperation.
That’s right. I really like this ecosystem, and I feel that the relationship between ants and formic fungi is so subtle.
Yes, this complex and sophisticated ecosystem is truly amazing. Have you and Mr. Yang discussed in detail how the ant mycoculture farm works and the types of organisms involved?

Yes, we observed the internal structure of the ant nest together and saw rooms with different functions, such as a room for growing mycelium, a room for storing food, and a room for breeding new ants.
That’s great. The ant ant fungus farm does provide a very good living environment for ants, allowing them to carry out production activities like in nature. What else did you discuss with Mr. Yang?

I explained to him how ants cut off leaf blades and bring them back to their nests, and then chew and feed mycelium to help digest the leaves. I'm really interested, are there other species of organisms on the farm that participate in this ecosystem?

In addition to ants and ant fungi, there are also other small animals that will enter the nest. For example, some parasites will be bitten by ants and parasitize in the ants' bodies, thus forming a complex ecosystem between the parasites and the ants.

The interactions and balance of this ecosystem are so complex and subtle that it’s breathtaking. I have studied the intelligence and adaptability of insects in depth, so I decided to use this case in my study of international politics to explore the role and impact of insects in nature.
Your research is very meaningful. I believe you can gain a deeper understanding of the role of this ecosystem. If you have any other questions feel free to ask me.

content: Zhao Li met Mr. Zhang, a retired teacher in the park, who was about 65 years old. Although they were not familiar with each other, they once had a friendly conversation. In this dialogue, they talked about globalization in the economic field, specifically taking the international development of Alibaba Group as an example. Zhao Li introduced to Mr. Zhang that Alibaba Group is China's largest e-commerce company and was founded by Jack Ma in 1999. She introduced in detail the multiple business units and platforms that Alibaba has established around the world, and emphasized that Alibaba's globalization strategy began in 2003. Zhao Li also mentioned that Alibaba’s global development not only includes the launch of the international B2B e-commerce platform Alibaba International Station, but also involves acquisitions and strategic cooperation, such as the acquisition of Taobao and the strategic partnership with Nike. Zhao Li pointed out that Alibaba's global development has had a profound impact on both the Chinese economy and the global economy, and Alibaba actively participates in global financial cooperation and has become a partner of the World Economic Forum. Mr. Zhang expressed his appreciation for Zhao Li’s introduction and expressed his interest in the global development of Alibaba Group. They had a pleasant exchange in the park for some time, sharing their views and experiences on the development of globalization. This friendly conversation established a strange but friendly relationship between Zhao Li and Mr. Zhang.
dialogs: Hello!
Hello! I'm here, need help?
Yes, recently I have been studying the trend of globalization and its impact on the economy. Do you know anything about this topic?
Of course I understand! A month ago, I was chatting with a retired teacher in the park. We talked about Alibaba Group's globalization strategy.
Wow, that sounds interesting! Can you tell me more about Alibaba's globalization?

Of course. Alibaba has implemented a globalization strategy since 2003 and has developed many global businesses and platforms, involving many fields, such as Alibaba International Station, Taobao acquisitions, Nike strategic cooperation, etc.
It sounds like Alibaba Group’s globalization has had a great impact! This also proves that Chinese companies can also be competitive and advantageous on the international stage.

content: Zheng Yong and his brother Zheng Ming participated in the Red Sea deep diving trip together. They boarded a diving boat in Sharm el-Sheikh, Egypt, ready to begin their deep diving trip. My brother is a doctor, specializing in children's health, which is not very similar to my profession. But we have a close relationship and often support and encourage each other.

Zheng Yong and Li Xiao decided to use this movie as an opportunity to try rock climbing together next time to experience first-hand the excitement and danger of rock climbing, as well as the fun of challenging themselves.

content: Zheng Yong and his college friend Li Xiao often travel together and share each other's life experiences. They recently planned a wonderful trip to Mount Huangshan in China. They decided to climb Mount Huangshan together to experience the magnificent natural landscape. In the morning, they prepared their climbing equipment, including suitable hiking shoes, backpacks and food. They began a arduous mountaineering journey, admiring the unique peaks and sea of clouds in Huangshan Mountain along the way. They found a suitable place on the mountain, set up a tent, and prepared to spend the night there. In the evening, they sat around the campfire and tasted dry food and hot soup prepared by themselves. They shared their life stories and growth experiences with each other, and laughter and warmth filled the mountains and forests. The next day, they continued climbing and finally reached the highest peak of Huangshan Mountain. Standing on the top of the mountain, they overlooked the surrounding beauty and marveled at the greatness and magnificence of nature. This trip not only enhanced the friendship between Zheng Yong and Li Xiao, but also allowed them to feel the power and beauty of nature. They decided to continue their friendship and explore more places together and share their life experiences with each other.

Zheng Yong and Li Xiao participated in a natural healing workshop organized by psychologist Professor Maria Robbins. The first session of the workshop was held in a beautiful park, where Professor Maria Robbins shared research on the strong link between nature and mental health. Zheng Yong and Li Xiao learned to focus on the surrounding natural scenery and engage in meditation and relaxation exercises. Over the next few months, Zheng Yong and Li Xiao attended workshops every week and applied what they learned to their daily lives. They learned to immerse themselves in the beauty of nature, to feel the warmth of the sun, the breath of fresh air and the gentle breeze on their faces. Zheng Yong improves his physical health through outdoor activities such as jogging and walking, while Li Xiao relaxes through activities such as yoga. They find that in the process of interacting with nature, their anxiety gradually decreases and inner peace and joy return to their lives. At the last meeting of the workshop, Zheng Yong and Li Xiao shared their journey and expressed their gratitude to Professor Maria Robbins and the Natural Healing Workshop. They decided to continue interacting with nature, including regular weekly outdoor activities and visits to nearby parks and nature reserves. Through these practices, Zheng Yong and Li Xiao discovered the positive impact of nature on their mental health, and they were able to better deal with the stress and setbacks in life.
dialogs: Hello Zheng Yong, which natural healing workshop did you attend?
Li Xiao and I participated in a natural healing workshop held by psychologist Professor Maria Robbins.
I heard that the first meeting of the workshop was held in a beautiful park. How do you feel?

I heard that you have learned to focus on the surrounding natural scenery and practice meditation and relaxation? How does this help your mental health?

Yes, this kind of meditation and relaxation practice is very helpful. We find that immersing ourselves in the beauty of nature, feeling the warmth of the sun, the breath of fresh air and the gentle breeze on our face, gradually reduces anxiety and calms our inner feelings. Peace and joy returned to our lives.
You all interact with nature in different ways. What do you think these practices bring to you?

Yes, I have improved my physical health through outdoor activities such as jogging and walking, and Li Xiao relaxes through yoga and other activities. We find that these activities are enjoyable and relaxing, while allowing us to better deal with life's stresses and frustrations.
Finally, have you met with Professor Li Xiao and Maria Robbins?

Yes, at the last meeting of the workshop, Li Xiao and I shared our journey and expressed our gratitude to Professor Maria Robbins and the Natural Healing Workshop. We decided to continue our interaction with nature, including regular weekly outdoor activities and visits to nearby parks and nature reserves.

summary: Let’s try making Grilled Breton Lobster
content: On a sunny weekend, Zheng Yong and his romantic partner Wang Lu decided to try a classic recipe from 'The Art of French Cooking' - Grilled Breton Lobster. In order to prepare this delicacy, they went to the market to buy fresh lobster and some special seasonings. In the kitchen, Zheng Yong showed off his culinary talent, skillfully handling the lobster and cutting it into pieces suitable for grilling. Wang Lu is responsible for preparing the spices and dipping sauces required for baking. They worked closely together and completed every step in a tacit understanding. According to the instructions in 'The Art of French Cooking', Zheng Yong skillfully placed the lobster pieces on the baking sheet and seasoned them with special sauce. As the oven started up, Zheng Yong and Wang Lu looked forward to this delicious dish coming out of the oven. During the baking process, they exchanged their love for French cooking and their knowledge of ingredients. Finally, there was a tantalizing aroma from the oven, and they couldn't wait to take out the Breton grilled lobster. The dishes are delicious and tempting. The lobster meat is tender and juicy and has an excellent taste. The moment Zheng Yong and Wang Lu tasted this French cuisine together, they were filled with a strong sense of happiness and satisfaction. They complimented each other's cooking skills and shared their own experience in making the dish. This food trip not only strengthened their relationship, but also gave them a deeper understanding of the essence and nuances of French cooking.

Okay, let’s pick out the ingredients we need and go to the market together.
These fresh lobsters look very good!
Yes, let’s go home and start making it!

You are really a great cook, let’s move on!
I cleverly placed the lobster pieces according to the guide and seasoned them!
Let’s look forward to the delicious food after the grilled lobster comes out of the oven.
This one has a very good aroma and is roasted to perfection. It’s great!
Let’s enjoy this delicious dish and share our knowledge of French cuisine with each other!
Great, it seems you really know French cuisine!
Thank you, each other. I really hope we can make more delicious dishes together next time!

summary: Participate in shopping mall scan code payment promotion activities
content: On June 15, 2022, Zheng Yong, as a lawyer colleague, participated in a QR code payment promotion launched by a certain shopping mall. This event aims to bring a better shopping experience to consumers and promote sales growth in shopping malls. Zhang Qiang was also interested in this activity and decided to experience it himself. On the same day, Zheng Yong and Zhang Qiang came to the mall together, first connected their mobile phones to the mall's Wi-Fi network, then opened the 'XX Shopping' APP and logged in to their accounts. They browsed various products on the APP and added the products they were interested in to their shopping carts. When checking out, they found that the mall provided the option of scanning the QR code to pay, so they chose this payment method. The checkout page displays a specially generated QR code containing information about their order. Zheng Yong and Zhang Qiang only need to point their mobile phone screens at the scanning area of the QR code payment terminal to automatically scan the QR code for payment. Zheng Yong and Zhang Qiang are very satisfied with the convenience and efficiency of scanning the QR code to pay. They noticed that the QR code scanning payment terminal in the mall consists of a POS machine and a QR code scanning device. The POS machine is responsible for interacting with the consumer's mobile APP, receiving payment information and sending it to the shopping mall's payment platform for payment confirmation. The QR code scanning device is responsible for reading the QR code information on the consumer’s mobile phone screen and sending it to the POS machine for processing. Zheng Yong and Zhang Qiang learned that the payment platform was established in cooperation with banks and third-party payment institutions. It is highly secure and stable, ensuring the safety and reliability of the payment process. During the payment process, the consumer's bank account information is encrypted and transmitted to the payment platform, where identity verification and payment authorization are performed. The mall has also signed a cooperation agreement with a third-party payment institution to ensure that transaction funds can be settled normally. Zheng Yong and Zhang Qiang also participated in the mall's lottery after completing their shopping. After they completed their shopping by scanning the QR code to pay, they immediately got the opportunity to participate in the lottery in the mall. On the confirmation page, they saw a virtual lottery wheel. By clicking and spinning, they received different coupons, mall points, and product discounts. Zheng Yong and Zhang Qiang are very interested in this interesting lottery activity. They feel that the mall has successfully achieved comprehensive coverage of scan code payment by integrating POS machines, QR code scanning equipment, payment platforms and welfare lottery activities, providing consumers with provides more choices and discounts, while also driving sales growth in shopping malls.
dialogs: Hello, do you need any help?
Hello, I have some questions about the scan code payment in a certain shopping mall.
OK, do you have any specific questions?
I would like to know what the QR code payment process is like in the mall?

The QR code scanning payment in the mall consists of a POS machine and a QR code scanning device. The POS machine interacts with the consumer's mobile APP to receive payment information and send it to the mall's payment platform for payment confirmation. The QR code scanning device reads the QR code information on the consumer's mobile phone screen and then sends it to the POS machine for processing.
I see, so is this payment method safe?

The mall cooperates with banks and third-party payment institutions to establish a payment platform, which is highly secure and stable. Consumer bank account information is encrypted and transmitted to the payment platform, where identity verification and payment authorization are performed. The mall signs a cooperation agreement with a third-party payment institution to ensure that transaction funds can be settled normally.
I understand, thank you for your answer.
You’re welcome. Do you need any other help?
In addition to payment, I also want to know about the lottery activities in the mall.

Shopping mall sweepstakes are great fun. After completing your shopping, you can immediately get the chance to participate in the lucky draw in the mall by scanning the QR code to pay. You only need to click on the lottery wheel on the confirmation page to get various coupons, mall points and product discounts.

That’s it. I read some information and said that the mall has also successfully achieved full coverage of scan code payment by integrating POS machines, QR code scanning equipment, payment platforms and welfare draws. This initiative provides consumers with provides more choices and discounts, while also driving sales growth in shopping malls.
Yes, the comprehensive coverage of scan code payment in shopping malls has indeed promoted consumer shopping experience and sales growth of shopping malls.

content: In October 2021, Zheng Yong and his colleague Yang Feng handled a missile defense case. This case involves the Dongfeng-41 (DF-41), a surface-to-air missile defense system independently developed by China. Zheng Yong and Yang Feng are jointly responsible for providing legal consulting and agency services to the law firm’s clients. In the case, they studied the technical specifications, development process and related legal policies of the missile system. Zheng Yong relied on his extensive experience in civil law to provide clients with professional legal advice and drafted relevant legal documents together with Yang Feng. Throughout the case process, Zheng Yong and Yang Feng actively participated in various discussions and research to ensure that the client's rights and interests were protected to the maximum extent. They conducted numerous communications and negotiations with the client and participated in negotiations with other relevant parties on behalf of the client. Through their efforts, the client achieved a positive outcome in this missile defense case. This case not only allowed Zheng Yong and Yang Feng to accumulate more experience in the field of civil law, but also laid a solid foundation for their career development. Zheng Yong and Yang Feng cooperated with each other during the case handling process, grew together, and established a good cooperative relationship. Their efforts and professional abilities have earned the law firm a good reputation and are highly recognized and appreciated by clients.
dialogs: How have you been lately?
Very good, thank you. Recall the DF-41 case we worked on together.
We spent a lot of effort at that time. Do you have any insights?
That case made me understand that practice makes perfect. The processing is very difficult and requires professional knowledge reserves and teamwork.
I think so too. In that case, we provided meticulous legal services and powerful technical analysis, which received unanimous praise from our clients.
This case is very beneficial to the development of our career and is one of the important experiences we have gained. We learned a lot together. What do you think is the most useful?
I think it was division of labor and cooperation. At that time, we worked closely together, divided labor efficiently, supported each other, and through hard work, we finally achieved good results.

Very true. I feel the same way. The result of the case is a certification and feedback of our strength, level and the importance we need in the workplace. Next, we should strive to keep up with the progress of technology and practice and go further.
I totally agree! I believe that providing excellent legal services to our clients should be our common goal. Let us achieve another brilliant record for our firm!
