summary: Participate in the Optical Clock Experiment
content: Zheng Yong’s mentor, Liu Min, is a senior lawyer who helped Zheng Yong improve his legal skills and impart experience. Zheng Yong greatly appreciated Liu Min's professional knowledge and experience, and a master-disciple relationship was established between them. Liu Min was very concerned about Zheng Yong's growth and encouraged Zheng Yong to actively participate in legal practice and research. During a research discussion, Zheng Yong and Liu Min learned about the optical clock experiment in the field of physics, which was used to verify Einstein's theory of relativity. They were fascinated by the sophistication of the experiment and its study of the relativity of time. Zheng Yong decided to explore areas other than the legal field, and they decided to participate in the optical clock experiment together. Zheng Yong and Liu Min believe that this experiment is of great significance to understanding the theory of relativity and the basic properties of space and time. They contacted the principal investigator of the experiment, Eugene McCain, and got the opportunity to participate in the experiment. As observers, Zheng Yong and Liu Min conducted observations at different locations on the earth. Their observations verified the predictions of relativistic theory regarding the invariance of the speed of light and the relativity of time. The results of the optical clock experiment have been published in many well-known physics magazines, making great contributions to research in this field and the development of the theory of relativity.
dialogs: Hello, Mr. Zheng Yong. I would like to ask you about Mr. Liu Min.
Hello, I know Mr. Liu Min’s situation because he is my mentor.
How was the master-apprentice relationship between you and Mr. Liu Min established?
I see, then Mr. Liu Min is very concerned about your growth.
Regarding other fields, I know that the two of you are also involved in an optical clock experiment on the theory of relativity.

I know that your two observations have verified the predictions about the invariance of the speed of light and the relativity of time in the theory of relativity. This result was later published in many famous physics magazines.
We met in 1971, when Mr. Liu Min was my legal mentor. He is very senior and helped me develop my legal skills and imparted experience. A mentor-disciple relationship developed between us.
Yes, he has always encouraged me to actively participate in legal practice and research, but he has also allowed me to learn a lot of other knowledge from multiple fields.

Yes, this experiment was led by physicist Eugene McCain. As observers, the two of us conducted observations at different locations on the earth. This experiment has great significance for understanding the theory of relativity and the basic properties of space and time.

content: In the game, Zheng Yong, as a senior lawyer, has a close relationship with his mentor Liu Min. Liu Min is an experienced lawyer who has been guiding and training Zheng Yong in legal matters for many years. They work together and are dedicated to the pursuit of justice. However, just as Zheng Yong was immersed in the fun of solving puzzles in 'Puzzle City: Time Maze', he suddenly received disturbing news: Liu Min was missing! Zheng Yong was very worried and immediately launched an investigation. Through communication with Liu Min's relatives and friends, he learned that Liu Min showed abnormal interest in games and was obsessed with the fun of solving puzzles. It is said that he once explored mysterious libraries and temple ruins in the game. Zheng Yong decided to return to the game world, follow Liu Min's traces, and look for clues about his disappearance. In the game, Zheng Yong gradually discovered a series of hidden puzzles and clues that seemed to be related to Liu Min's disappearance. He discovers a mysterious ancient book that contains a secret about the labyrinth of time. By cracking the ancient code, he found a door to the next area and entered a hidden chamber. In the secret room, he found a broken diary, which recorded Liu Min's obsession and pursuit of games. Zheng Yong is determined to solve the mystery, find Liu Min and take him home safely. He will continue to explore the city of puzzles, deciphering the clues in ancient books, as well as the hidden mechanisms and switches in the city, hoping to find Liu Min and rescue him.
dialogs: Hello, Zheng Yong. how are you now?
Not very good. My tutor Liu Min is missing and I am very worried.
I understand your concerns very well. Any clues?
What are you going to do?
I decided to return to the game world, follow Liu Min’s traces, and look for clues about his disappearance.
Have you found any clues?
I found a mysterious ancient book and found a door to the next area by deciphering the ancient code.
This sounds mysterious. What are your next plans?

I am determined to solve this mystery, find Liu Min and take him home safely. I will continue to explore the city of puzzles, decipher the clues in ancient books, and the hidden mechanisms and switches in the city, hoping to find Liu Min and rescue him.

content: In the case of natural resource protection disputes, Zheng Yong’s mentor Liu Min was a senior lawyer who helped Zheng Yong improve his legal skills and impart experience. This case involves a dispute over mineral mining rights. A company called 'Changsheng Mining Co., Ltd.' applied for the right to mine iron ore in a certain place. However, there is also an NGO in the area called the Blue Sky Nature Conservation Association, which is committed to protecting the local natural environment and opposing any activities that damage the environment. Several rounds of negotiations were held between mining companies and conservation associations, but no substantial progress was made in the negotiations because the two sides held different views on issues such as interests, environmental protection and sustainable development. As a result, the case finally turned to judicial proceedings, and the court began to mediate and hear the dispute. A government department called the 'Local Natural Resources Bureau' became one of the important parties in the case, responsible for the assessment and management of mineral resources in the area. During the course of the trial, the court required the mining company to provide detailed mining plans and conduct an assessment of its environmental impact. In order to ensure that mining activities will not cause irreparable damage to the local ecological environment and residents, the mining company commissioned a third-party organization called 'Mineral Environmental Impact Assessment Consulting Co., Ltd.' to conduct an assessment. At the same time, the Conservation Association hired a well-known environmental lawyer named 'Lawyer Zhang Lihua' to make a statement in court on their behalf, advocating a ban on mining companies' mining activities, and calling on the government to strengthen the legal system for natural resource protection and environmental management. After comprehensive weighing, the court finally ruled that mining companies can obtain the right to mine iron ore under certain conditions, but must take strict environmental protection measures and compensate for and repair possible ecological damage. At the same time, the court also required government departments to strengthen the management of natural resources in the area and ensure the sustainable use of resources. This case fully demonstrates the complexity and challenges in the field of natural resource law. Through cooperation and study with Liu Min, Zheng Yong gained valuable experience and skills, which helped him pursue justice and resolve similar disputes.
dialogs: Director Liu, this natural resource protection case is really complicated. How should I deal with it?

Zheng Yong, resolving legal disputes is not a simple matter and requires the comprehensive use of knowledge and skills from all aspects. We can proceed from the actual situation, mobilize all available resources, and follow the principles of fairness, reasonableness, and laws and regulations.

That’s true. Both parties in the case have very important ideas and rights regarding natural resources and the environment. I have conducted detailed research and analysis on this mining company and the conservation association, but I still need to further study and think about some professional issues.

No problem, we can study and discuss together. For example, mining companies’ mining plans and environmental impact assessments, as well as government departments’ assessment and management of resources in the area, etc. At the same time, we can also analyze the laws, regulations and judicial procedures in the region and formulate effective solutions.

Thank you very much for your support and help. I think we will find the best solution together and let the power of the law help everyone. Now, I need to contact some environmental lawyers at the request of the Conservation Association to provide advice on protecting the environment and rights.
Zheng Yong, it is April 2nd. Do you have any new progress on the case?

AI assistant, I am now sorting out evidence and preparing a statement. Tomorrow is the hearing date for the case. I will appear in court together with the lawyers to explain our position and philosophy to the court on behalf of the protection association.
I wish you and the lawyers all the best. I hope you can make useful contributions to local environmental protection and ecological protection.
Thank you for the encouragement of the AI assistant. I will do my best to balance all interests and serve society, law and justice.

summary: Visit the Yves Saint Laurent Museum together
content: Zheng Yong and Wang Yan are neighbors who care about and help each other. On a sunny morning on the weekend, Zheng Yong invited Wang Yan to visit the Yves Saint Laurent Museum in Paris. As a retired teacher, Wang Yan has a keen interest in art and fashion. They met at the entrance of the museum and entered this high-profile fashion museum together. In the exhibition hall, Zheng Yong and Wang Yan admired Yves Saint Laurent's classic fashion series, such as the 'Le Smoking' women's suit and stage costume series. They were deeply attracted by the exquisite craftsmanship and exploration of feminism and gender identity in these fashions. In addition to clothing, they also admired Yves Saint Laurent's accessories collection, which included carefully designed handbags, high heels and jewelry. Zheng Yong and Wang Yan were particularly attracted by the 'Tribute' high-heeled shoes series, which showcase elegance and avant-garde style. In the illustration and art collection area of the museum, they also viewed Yves Saint Laurent's love and pursuit of art and culture, such as his collection of Picasso paintings and African art. In the museum's interactive exhibition area, Zheng Yong and Wang Yan personally experienced the designer's inspiration and design process through touch screens and virtual reality equipment. They gained insight into the intricacies and creative process of fashion design. After the visit, Zheng Yong and Wang Yan tasted French coffee in the museum's cafe and exchanged their feelings and thoughts about Yves Saint Laurent's works. This trip to the museum not only enhanced the friendship between Zheng Yong and Wang Yan, but also allowed them to better understand the unique charm of fashion designer Yves Saint Laurent and his works.
dialogs: Good morning, Mr. Zheng Yong. What are your plans?
Good morning, I want to visit the Yves Saint Laurent Museum in Paris. Are you interested in going together?
Yves Saint Laurent Museum? Okay, we can go together.
We are here. Wait for me at the door.
Okay.
What a wonderful exhibition. What do you think?
Very impressive, every exhibit is beautiful.
This interactive exhibition area is very interesting. Let’s go and see it together.
Okay, we can try these virtual reality devices.
After the visit, we went to the coffee shop to sit and have a good chat.
Okay, sounds good.

summary: Watched the trailer for 'Attack on Titan'
content: Zhu Xiaofang is Zhu Xiaolong’s sister. She is very interested in animation and animation fields. In 2013, Zhu Xiaofang watched the trailer of 'Attack on Titan' with excitement. Next, the trailer shows a fierce battle scene, showing the thrilling confrontation between humans and giants. In these battle scenes, protagonist Eren Yeager and his teammates use three-dimensional maneuvering devices to shuttle through the air and try to defeat the giant. The trailer presents a tense atmosphere and fierce battle scenes through quick editing and action scenes. At the same time, the trailer also shows the complex relationships and inner struggles between the main characters, making the audience look forward to the release of the work even more. Zhu Xiaofang marveled at the wonderful images and soundtrack in the trailer. She found this work very attractive and looked forward to watching the complete animated series.

That’s great! How was the interview result? Have you ever been successful in getting an engineering position?

content: As Zhu Xiaolong’s sister, Zhu Xiaofang has always supported his career development. When Zhu Xiaolong's electrical engineering project was in trouble, Zhu Xiaofang offered to help him find more opportunities and resources. dialogs: Li Lili, our power transmission device performed very well in the competition! We are so awesome!

content: Li Lili is Zhu Xiaolong's college classmate. She played an important role in the preparations for Zhu Xiaolong and Li Hua's wedding. content: Zhu Xiaolong and his college classmate Li Lili are very good friends. They often participate in various activities together. summary: Visit the construction site where Zhu Xiaolong works
content: On March 15, 2022, Bruce Chu’s girlfriend Wang Lu decided to visit his geotechnical engineering work at the National Center for the Performing Arts construction site in Beijing. On the same day, Wang Lu arrived near the construction site early and entered the construction site wearing work clothes. She saw that the entire building was composed of steel structure and glass curtain wall, and its appearance resembled a giant eggshell. Wang Lu was deeply attracted by the magnificent scene of the building and lamented the hard work of the engineering team. She noticed that the underground portion occupies a larger area and wondered how groundwater issues would be addressed during construction. Zhu Xiaolong patiently explained to her that the engineering team adopted a variety of geotechnical engineering measures, including underground diaphragm walls, horizontal slope protection and drainage systems. He introduced in detail the design and construction process of underground diaphragm walls, as well as the role of horizontal slope protection and drainage systems. Wang Lu listened with great interest and gained a deeper understanding of geotechnical engineering. After the visit, Zhu Xiaolong left the construction site with Wang Lu and recalled this interesting experience.
dialogs: Zhu Xiaolong, your girlfriend Wang Lu decided to visit your geotechnical engineering work at the National Grand Theater construction site in Beijing today.
Yes, she was very interested in my work, so I specially arranged for her to visit.

content: In 2018, Zhu Xiaolong’s girlfriend Wang Lu noticed that a company exaggerated the efficacy of its products in advertising, claiming that it could cure a certain disease. This caught the attention of Wang Lu and other consumers because the disease is a common and difficult-to-treat condition. Wang Lu decided to file a lawsuit against the company for its false propaganda and reported it to the relevant departments. She believes the company's actions violated China's Anti-Unfair Competition Law. According to the provisions of this law, companies will face severe penalties if they make false claims in advertisements, promotional materials or product packaging, mislead consumers, or maliciously slander the reputation of competitors. Wang Lu's report attracted the attention of relevant departments, who launched an investigation into the company and confirmed the facts of its false propaganda. As a whistleblower, Wang Lu actively cooperated with the investigation and provided relevant evidence. In the end, the company was fined 5 million yuan and ordered to immediately stop false advertising. At the same time, the company was required to publicly apologize and return illegal gains obtained from false propaganda. Wang Lu's reporting behavior has been recognized, and she has made positive contributions to maintaining market order and fair competition.

summary: Discuss the heating ventilation and air conditioning system of Shanghai World Financial Center
content: Zhu Xiaolong and Zhang Hua happened to meet in the park of the community, and they chatted about recent engineering projects. Zhu Xiaolong mentioned that he had participated in the heating, ventilation and air conditioning project of the Shanghai World Financial Center, and Zhang Hua was very interested in it. Zhu Xiaolong introduced in detail the advanced technology and equipment used in the project, including VRV system, floor radiant heating system and air purification system. He told Zhang Hua that the VRV system is a variable frequency air conditioning system developed by Dajin Industry, which can intelligently control indoor temperature and achieve efficient heating and cooling. Radiant floor heating systems transfer heat through the floor to provide even indoor temperature distribution. The air purification system can remove particulate matter, formaldehyde and harmful gases in indoor air, providing a fresh and healthy indoor environment. Zhu Xiaolong also shared the team’s experience and results in the project, as well as his personal expertise in electrical engineering. Zhang Hua listened with great interest and expressed his great admiration for Zhu Xiaolong's work and professional abilities. They continued to spend a pleasant afternoon in the park talking about new technologies and development trends in the field of engineering.
dialogs: Recently I participated in a very interesting engineering project that adopted advanced heating, ventilation and air-conditioning technology.
Oh? What is the project? Can you tell me more specifically?
Yes, this project uses some advanced technologies and equipment, such as VRV system, floor radiant heating system and air purification system.
What is the VRV system? I think I've heard of it, but I don't know exactly how it works.

Yes, VRV systems can indeed achieve efficient heating and cooling. In addition, we have used a radiant floor heating system, which transfers heat through the floor to provide even indoor temperature distribution.
The radiant floor heating system sounds very comfortable! Will this keep the entire room warm?
Yes, our team has put in a lot of effort in this project and achieved good results. I also learned a lot about electrical engineering.
This is so admirable! Your work experience and expertise must have played a large role in the success of the project.

content: Zhu Xiaolong visited the Colosseum with his neighbor Zhang Hua. They came to this historic site on a sunny morning and felt the strong historical atmosphere. Zhu Xiaolong was very interested in the history of Rome, and he shared some knowledge about the Colosseum with Zhang Hua. He told Zhang Hua that the Colosseum was built between 70 and 80 AD and was a place for gladiator competitions and beast fights in ancient Rome. Together they visited various parts of the Colosseum, from the animal cages underground, to the seats above ground, to the corridors on the upper floors. Zhu Xiaolong explained to Zhang Hua the architectural features of the Colosseum, such as the three-story arched columns on the facade and 80 arches on each floor. They also learned that the seats in the Colosseum were divided into different classes, for emperors, nobles and ordinary people. Zhu Xiaolong also introduced to Zhang Hua the competitive performances in the Colosseum, including gladiator competitions, carriage races and fights between beasts and humans. They walked around the Colosseum and imagined the life scenes of ancient Romans. Both Zhu Xiaolong and Zhang Hua were deeply attracted by the magnificent scenery and long history of the Colosseum, and they took many photos as souvenirs. After the visit, they rested together in a nearby cafe, tasted local food, and talked about their feelings about Rome and the importance of cultural exchanges. This visit enabled Zhu Xiaolong and Zhang Hua to better understand the history and culture of ancient Rome, and also deepened their friendship.

Zhu Xiaolong's neighbor Zhang Hua is a person who loves sports, and he especially likes Taekwondo. In the men's 58kg competition at the 2019 World Taekwondo Championships, Zhang Hua learned that Chinese player Zhang Jike performed well and decided to watch the competition. He invited Zhu Xiaolong to watch the match at the Taekwondo Arena in Seoul, South Korea. On the day of the game, Zhu Xiaolong and Zhang Hua came to the arena early together to feel the tense atmosphere of the game. They sat in the audience, looking forward to seeing the wonderful performance of the Chinese players. Before the game started, Zhang Hua introduced Zhang Jike's success story to Zhu Xiaolong, including the skills and tactical awareness he displayed during the game. After the game officially started, Zhu Xiaolong and Zhang Hua stared at the playing field intently. They saw Zhang Jike compete fiercely with top players from countries such as Brazil, Iran and South Korea, showing excellent kicking skills and flexible movement. In the semi-finals, Zhang Jike defeated his Iranian opponent with a precise roundhouse kick, leaving the crowd cheering. content: Zhu Xiaolong and Zhang San are community members and they often meet in community activities. Zhu Xiaolong shared his experience in using nanomaterials in electrical engineering projects and introduced in detail the catalytic mechanism of platinum nanoparticles in methanol fuel cells. Zhang San deeply appreciated these contents and raised some questions about the loading and distribution of nanoparticles, and how to further improve the service life and durability of the catalyst. Zhu Xiaolong and Zhang San jointly discussed these issues and looked forward to the future development of nanomaterials in the field of catalysis. They believe that by precisely controlling the properties of nanoparticles, more efficient catalytic effects can be achieved and new solutions can be provided for various chemical reactions. Such discussions not only deepened their understanding of catalytic applications of nanomaterials, but also provided useful scientific exchanges and inspiration for other members of the community.

Of course I’m ready! I have prepared a lecture on the application of nanomaterials in catalysis.

summary: Attend the 'Empire of the Sun' game conference
content: As one of the designers of the game 'Empire of the Sun', Ma Dan invited Jack Ma to attend the game's press conference as a special guest. The press conference was held in a large convention and exhibition center, attracting the attention of game enthusiasts and media from all over the world. As brothers, Ma Dan and Ma Yun have deep family feelings between them. Jack Ma delivered a speech at the press conference, expressing his appreciation for Ma Dan and his team in game design and wishing 'Empire of the Sun' a great success. After the press conference, Ma Dan and Jack Ma held a private dinner together to celebrate the successful launch of the game. They reviewed every moment of their growth and shared their expectations and dreams for the future. Jack Ma encouraged Ma Dan to continue working hard in the field of game design and become a better soil scientist and game designer.
dialogs: Hello, today’s press conference was such a success! It feels good!
Yes! Game lovers all over the world are paying attention to this conference! And you are really creative and powerful in game design!

We have really brought you too many novel and creative ways to play! Especially the garbage sorting level! This not only allows us to understand the soil, but also makes us fully aware of the importance of garbage classification.
That’s really unique. Ma Dan, are you and Jack Ma really brothers?
Yes. In fact, over the past many years, Jack Ma has always supported my work and paid attention to my career as a game designer. I am really grateful to him.
I heard that you held a private dinner to celebrate after the press conference that day?
Yes, we should also be proud of the successful release of 'Empire of the Sun'! We discussed a lot of future ideas at the dinner and talked freely, which was really fun.
It sounds very happy! Did Jack Ma say anything encouraging to you at the dinner?

Brother Jack Ma said a lot of praise and encouraged me to keep learning and innovating, and to continue working hard to become a better game designer in the field of game design. We also got along very well.

content: Ma Dan and Ma Yun are brothers and they have a deep family relationship. On June 10, 2021, Ma Dan invited Jack Ma to visit the agricultural company he runs. As Ma Dan’s brother and partner, Ma Yun has an in-depth understanding of and participation in the operation and development of agricultural companies. During the visit to the agricultural company, Ma Dan introduced the company's operations, research projects and results to Ma Yun. Together they visited farmlands, greenhouses and laboratories and learned about the company's innovations in agricultural technology, fertilizer utilization and soil protection. The cooperation between Ma Dan and Jack Ma is not only the friendship between brothers, but also the efforts for common goals and ideals. They hope to make greater contributions to agricultural development and soil ecosystem protection through their efforts.
dialogs: Hello Mr. Madan, I am your assistant. What help do you need?
Hello, I would like to check who I invited to visit our agricultural company today?
You invited your brother, Mr. Jack Ma, to visit our agricultural company.
Thank you very much for the information. Mr. Jack Ma is my brother and the co-operator of our agricultural company.
So what do you think of the visit? Does he have any views on the company's operations and development?

We visited the company’s farmland, greenhouses and laboratories together, and Jack Ma expressed his appreciation for our work in sustainable agricultural development and soil protection. He also provided support and assistance to the company's achievements and future development.
That’s great. Mr. Jack Ma is not only your brother, but also your business partner. What is your relationship like?

We have a very close relationship. Jack Ma is not only my brother, but also my joint entrepreneurial partner. The cooperation between us is not only for economic benefits, but more importantly, we have common goals and ideals.

Thank you very much for your and Mr. Jack Ma’s contributions to sustainable agricultural development and soil ecosystem protection. What are your plans and expectations for agricultural development and environmental protection?

Our company will continue to be committed to the innovation of agricultural technology and research on soil protection, while strengthening cooperation with all sectors of society to promote the development of sustainable agriculture. We hope to contribute to the protection of agricultural ecosystems and the human living environment through our efforts.

Of course, it was a very meaningful artistic experience in my life.

Yes, he was an agricultural scientist, but he was also interested in art.
Where was that exhibition held?
The exhibition was held in a large art museum. It was really popular and many people came to see it.

summary: Participate in ancient canal sacrificial activities
content: Ma Dan and his college roommate Zhang Wei decided to participate in the Tomb Sweeping Festival rituals held on the ancient canal in Hangzhou. They got up early in the morning, prepared flowers and offerings, and headed to the dock of the ancient canal. As soon as they arrived at the pier, they saw a huge crowd of people, and tourists boarded the boats to perform sacrificial rituals. On the ship, there are various folk performances and folk artists show off their talents. Ma Dan and Zhang Wei walked along the deck of the ship and enjoyed traditional dragon dance, lion dance and other performances. They held flowers in their hands and threw bouquets into the river to express their thoughts and respect for their deceased relatives. At the same time, they also observed many people holding bouquets of chrysanthemums, peach blossoms, jasmine and other flowers to participate in the sacrificial ceremony. Ma Dan and Zhang Wei also deeply felt the cultural connotation of Chinese traditional festivals and people's affectionate expressions for their loved ones.
dialogs: When we arrived at the pier, it was really crowded. Many people were preparing to board the ship.
I heard that there will also be various folk performances and talent shows by folk artists on the ship.
Yes, we saw traditional dragon and lion dance performances, which were really beautiful.
Everyone holds flowers and offerings and throws them into the river to express their memory and remembrance of their deceased relatives.
We hold flowers and throw them into the river to express our thoughts and respect for our deceased relatives.
Not only do people throw flowers, but they also hold offerings such as chrysanthemums, peach blossoms, and jasmine flowers to worship.
Seeing everyone’s behavior and participation, I also have a deeper understanding of the cultural connotation of Chinese traditional festivals and people’s memory of their deceased relatives.
Today is Qingming Festival, and we are going to participate in sacrificial activities.
Qingming Festival is a traditional Chinese festival. People pay homage to their ancestors and sweep their graves to express their longing and respect for their deceased relatives.
We have prepared flowers and offerings and are ready to go.
The sacrificial event was held at the Hangzhou Ancient Canal. I heard that there was a huge crowd of people there and many tourists would go there.

Okay, I'm looking forward to it. Thank you very much for your and Zhang Wei's help.
You're welcome, we're happy to help.

You're welcome, we're glad we could help. So, have the wedding arrangements been made?
Yes, everything has been arranged. I'm so happy to have chosen this luxurious venue and Zhang Wei's recommendation.

It sounds like you are very passionate about the protection of soil ecosystems.
Yes, soil is one of our precious resources. Wang Li and I have been committed to carrying out relevant research projects to make greater contributions to protecting the earth.

His research made me better understand the importance of sustainable soil management, and also inspired my current research.

dialogs: Hello Madan, today I would like to ask about the current status of the 'Soil Ecosystem Protection and Restoration' project. Have you updated it recently?

Hello! Recently, we have made good progress in soil sample collection and analysis, and the research on soil microbial communities has also made certain progress. We are summarizing and organizing the experimental data and starting to write the paper.

In regular weekly meetings, we discuss progress and research results and support each other, share experiences and solve problems. content: Ma Dan and Li Jing are colleagues from the Institute of Soil Science. On June 15, 2022, they jointly participated in an important soil protection project.

summary: Soil problems at Wang Ming’s farm
content: On March 15, 2021, Wang Ming, Madan’s neighbor as a soil scientist, approached him for help. Wang Ming is a farm operator. He recently discovered that the soil quality of his farmland has declined, and crop yields have been greatly affected. Wang Ming was very confused about this and hoped that Ma Dan could provide professional opinions and solutions. Madan accepted Wang Ming's request and went to his farm for an on-site inspection. After detailed soil analysis and observation, Madan discovered that there were problems such as nutrient imbalance and low organic matter content in farmland soil. He had an in-depth exchange with Wang Ming and learned that Wang Ming had not carried out scientific and reasonable fertilization and soil management measures before. Based on his professional knowledge, Madan provided Wang Ming with a detailed soil improvement plan, including suggestions for rational fertilization, increasing organic matter content, and improving soil structure. Wang Ming was very grateful for Madan's help and decided to carry out farmland improvement work according to the plan provided by Madan. After a period of hard work, Wang Ming's farmland soil gradually improved, and crop yields also increased significantly. Wang Ming deeply admired Ma Dan's professional knowledge and help, and the relationship between the two neighbors became closer.
dialogs: Hello, Mr. Wang Ming. Do you need any help?
Hello, Mr. Madan. I am a farmer and my crop yields have been greatly affected recently. I would like you to help me test the soil.
Okay, I'll be right away. Please tell me the specific location.
My farm is 20 kilometers north of the city. I have told my butler and he will take you there.
After field inspection and soil analysis, I found that your farmland has problems with nutrient imbalance and low organic matter content.
What should we do? Please give me some advice.

Based on my professional knowledge, I suggest you fertilize properly, increase organic matter content, improve soil structure, etc. I will provide you with an improvement plan for the specific details.
Thank you very much for your suggestions and plans. I will definitely follow your instructions to improve soil quality and increase yield.
This is my responsibility. If you have any other needs, you can contact me at any time.
Thank you for your support and help, which makes us closer. You are a close neighbor and friend in our hearts.
Yes, this is the unity and friendship between our neighbors. I wish your farmland will achieve better results.

content: In the 1930s, Li Fangfang, as a member of Kong Tingting's family, was very concerned about the harm to the ecosystem. She learned about the case of South American fire ants invading the United States, and was deeply aware of the threat and complexity of this species invasion to the ecosystem. Li Fangfang and Kong Tingting studied the detailed description of this case together and learned that South American fire ants were first transported on cargo ships in Louisiana, USA, via refrigerated goods. After fire ants escape, they multiply and spread rapidly in the local ecosystem, posing a threat to other insects, small vertebrates and humans. Fire ant stings cause severe pain, skin inflammation, and can lead to severe allergic reactions and death. The expansion of fire ants has caused serious damage to local ecosystems, with many native animal populations drastically reduced and even some species becoming extinct. Especially for ground-nesting birds and mammals, fire ants cause tremendous pressure, putting their breeding and foraging environments at great risk. In response to fire ant invasion, governments at all levels in the United States have taken a variety of measures, including strengthening entry inspections, regular inspections, and spraying of termiticides. In addition, scientists are also conducting long-term research in the hope of finding a more effective method of killing ants, including the use of natural enemies of fire ants, biological control measures, and gene editing technologies. Li Fangfang believes that this case has attracted widespread attention from the international community, prompting countries to strengthen the monitoring and management of invasive species. She encouraged scientists to delve deeper into ecology and biodiversity conservation in order to reduce the occurrence of similar invasion events and protect the sustainable development of the natural environment.

Li Fangfang is Kong Tingting's cousin. She decided to take Kong Tingting to visit Florence to experience this city full of cultural heritage and art. They went to Florence Cathedral together, and Li Fangfang helped Kong Tingting climb the 463 steps, allowing her to enjoy the magnificent city scenery. In the cathedral, Kong Tingting was deeply attracted by the beautiful murals and sculptures, and she developed a strong interest in Renaissance art. Later, they visited the Uffizi Gallery, where Kong Tingting gently touched Botticelli's 'The Birth of Venus' with her hands, as if she was connected to the artist's inspiration. Li Fangfang also explained the story behind the artwork to Kong Tingting, allowing her to understand the charm of art more deeply. At the Pitti Palace, they admired the works of Raphael and Monterosso. Kong Tingting was amazed by the creative talents of these outstanding artists. In addition to visiting museums and art galleries, they also experienced the authentic Italian cultural and historical atmosphere in Piazza Santa Croce. In the square, Kong Tingting interacted with local residents and participated in a traditional Italian celebration. Throughout the trip, Li Fangfang was always by Kong Tingting's side, helping her appreciate and understand Florence's cultural heritage, allowing her to fully experience this city full of artistic charm.
dialogs: I still can’t forget climbing so many stairs to the Cathedral yesterday. You are really my good sister!
Haha, of course, Florence is a city full of culture and art. It makes me happy to show you it.
I really like the Uffizi Museum! Have you ever seen such magical paintings?
Haha, are you also fascinated by art? Botticelli’s Birth of Venus is truly wonderful. Every audience can have different perceptions.
This city is so beautiful! The carvings on those walls made me feel that pursuits like art and aesthetics are deeply rooted in the human psyche.
What you said is really good. The murals on every wall contain rich human history and cultural heritage.
It would be great to go to the ancient cultural capital with you again.
Thank you, you are so kind, just arrange the time at any time!

content: Kong Tingting and Xiao Ming are good friends. They go to school, play together, and support and encourage each other. One day, they came across a research book on metamaterials in the school library. Kong Tingting became very interested in the optical properties of metamaterials, so she excitedly shared this discovery with Xiao Ming. Together they read the book's case studies on the application of metamaterials in optical stealth technology. Xiao Ming noticed that a research team at Stanford University in the United States successfully developed a metamaterial shell that can make aircraft almost undetectable in infrared and radar detection. They delve into the design principles of the metamaterial shell, including the periodic structure of metallic and dielectric materials, as well as the importance of tuning flake size, gap width and material selection. Kong Tingting and Xiao Ming exchanged their ideas on the potential and application prospects of metamaterials in optical stealth technology. They also explore the wide range of applications of metamaterials in other fields, such as optical communications and optical device manufacturing. Kong Tingting and Xiao Ming were very excited about the fact that the research and application of metamaterials play an important role in the field of optics. They decided to learn more about this field and looked forward to making their own contributions to the development of optical technology in the future.
dialogs: Hello, Kong Tingting! We haven't chatted for a long time. What have you been busy with lately?

I have been very interested in the research of optical materials recently. I saw a research book on metamaterials in the library last week, which was great. I discussed it with Xiao Ming and was very interested in the application of metamaterials in optical stealth technology.
That’s great. Metamaterials have huge potential in modern optical technology. Have you looked into Stanford’s metamaterial shell technology?

Of course I have studied it. We looked at some case studies and design principles about this technology, learned about the periodic structures composed of many metals and dielectric materials, and the importance of adjusting sheet size and material selection for the design of the metamaterial shell. We also discussed the application of metamaterials in Applications in other fields.
Incredible! Metamaterial research must be one of the most popular directions in the field of optical science today. Any plans to learn more about metamaterial research and applications?

Of course. I am now planning to study optical materials and stealth technology in more depth, and strive to make my own contribution to the development of this field in the future. Thanks for chatting with me!

summary: Participate in group buying to buy smart watches
content: Xiao Ming is a good friend of Kong Tingting and he is considering buying a new smart watch. A certain shopping platform recently launched a group-buying activity called 'GroupGo'. Xiao Ming enters 'smart watch' through the search bar, and the platform displays various watch products and prompts him to get more discounts through 'GroupGo'. Xiao Ming clicked on one of the watch products and found that the original price of the watch was 999 yuan. Then, the platform popped up the group-joining option. The 'GroupGo' group-buying option shows that other users of the same brand and model as Xiao Ming's selected watch are participating in the group-buying, and provides some interesting details. For example, there is a group that already has 5 members and has collected photos of 3 different celebrity spokespersons, including Andy Lau, Lin Yilian and Jay Chou. Xiao Ming was attracted. He thought it would be very interesting to buy in a group with other consumers and save some money. He clicked the 'Participate in group booking' button and found that he needed to pay 798 yuan. The platform provides some prompts, showing that 4 stocks have been purchased in group purchases, 3 stocks are left, and there are 2 days left in the group group activity. Xiao Ming decided to pay the group price immediately. On the payment page, the platform displays the avatars of other users participating in the group purchase and displays a popular group purchase success rate indicator. He saw that it would end in 5 minutes, so he immediately completed the payment. After the group match was successful, Xiao Ming received a notification informing him that he had successfully purchased the watch and it would be sent to his address within 3 days. In addition, he has also become a member of the 'GroupGo' activity of this watch, and can enjoy interactive topics and interesting tasks posted by other group members during the activity, such as uploading selfies related to the watch or sharing usage experiences on the platform. Through this case, we can see that the 'GroupGo' group buying activity provides consumers with a more interactive and fun shopping experience. At the same time, the platform attracts users to participate in group shopping by providing detailed information such as photos of celebrity spokespersons, avatars of users participating in group buying, and group buying success rate indicators, thereby increasing sales.
dialogs: Hello, Kong Tingting! Do you have any shopping needs?
Hello, I am considering buying a smart watch recently.
I’m glad to help you find your favorite products! Is there a specific make or model?
There is no specific demand yet.
Here we have a smart watch with an original price of 999 yuan. There is currently a group buying event. It is more cost-effective to buy it together in a group!

You can click on the 'GroupGo' group-buying option below the product to participate in the group-buying! And there are still two days left for the group activity, so hurry up!

summary: Participate in the 'Wonderful Painting Time' event
content: Kong Tingting is a student with special educational needs. She is served by Teacher Wang as a special education tutor, who is responsible for guiding and helping her overcome learning difficulties. On March 15, 2022, Kong Tingting participated in the 'Wonderful Painting Time', an early education activity that is loved by parents and children. This activity is specially designed for children aged 3-6 years old and aims to promote children's creativity and cognitive abilities through painting and parent-child interaction. As an experienced early education teacher, Teacher Wang led Kong Tingting and other children to explore the world of painting. They use drawing tools such as colored pencils, watercolor pens and palettes to learn basic drawing techniques and color matching through observation, imitation and creation. In addition, Teacher Wang also led the children to visit art exhibitions, allowing them to experience art works of different styles and themes, and encouraging them to express their thoughts and emotions. At the end of the activity, Kong Tingting and other children showed their paintings with their parents and shared the painting process and feelings. This kind of parent-child interaction not only deepens the parent-child relationship, but also enhances Kong Tingting's self-confidence and expressive ability. By participating in the 'Wonderful Painting Time' activity, Kong Tingting not only cultivated her meticulous observation, creativity and imagination, but also improved her art appreciation ability and aesthetic taste. At the same time, she also established friendships and cooperative relationships with other children and enhanced her social skills. As Kong Tingting’s special education tutor, Teacher Wang gave her guidance and support during the activities and helped her grow in the wonderful world of painting. Such activities not only contribute to Kong Tingting's personal development, but also promote the establishment of a mentoring and helpful relationship between her and Teacher Wang.
dialogs: Kong Tingting, hello! I want to talk to you about the early childhood education activity 'Wonderful Painting Time' that I participated in before.
Really? Can you share with me your feelings and experiences?

Of course! That activity was really fun and we learned to paint using different colors and tools. What I like most is visiting art exhibitions. There are many beautiful paintings there, which make me dazzled, especially a landscape painting, as if I have entered the painting.
That’s great! Is there anything else that you found to be very rewarding?

Yes! In addition to learning painting skills, I also had a lot of fun with other friends, met many new friends, and enhanced my social skills. More importantly, Teacher Wang gave me a lot of encouragement and guidance. I showed my work more confidently and received a lot of likes and praises. I really feel like I'm constantly growing.

summary: Explore the ecosystem of Enderby Island
content: Teacher Wang led Kong Tingting on a special education learning trip to learn about Enderby Island’s ecosystem and wildlife resources.
dialogs: Kong Tingting, we are going to Enderby Island for a special education study trip. We'll learn about the island's ecosystem and wildlife. are you ready?
I am very grateful to Teacher Wang for providing such a rare opportunity for me to study better. I am fully prepared and looking forward to this journey.
Okay, we are leaving. Kong Tingting, please bring your camera, sampling bottle, and hiking shoes. Let’s go now!
Now we have arrived at Enderby Island. There are several ecosystems and wildlife resources on the island. We will study and understand them one by one in the next journey.
That sounds great. What are your plans next?

First of all, we need to understand the various ecological environments of Enderby Island and collect data through actual hands-on work. The next step is to examine animals and plants in the environment, and understand the interaction mechanism between local plants and animals through in-depth communication.
It’s really interesting. I’m looking forward to the adventure on Enderby Island.

content: Kong Tingting is a student with special educational needs. She has special educational needs. Teacher Wang is Kong Tingting’s special education tutor, responsible for guiding and helping her overcome learning difficulties. During the lecture, Teacher Wang introduced a high-profile case in the field of philosophy and ethics - Frankfurt's butterfly effect experiment to inspire Kong Tingting's thinking on moral choice and free will. Teacher Wang explained the background and purpose of this experiment in detail, introduced to Kong Tingting the scene of Annie and Button A and Button B in the experiment, and explained the interference mechanism introduced in the experiment. Teacher Wang hopes that through this case, Kong Tingting will be inspired to think about the relationship between moral responsibility and free will, and encourage her to think independently and express her own opinions. Under the guidance of Teacher Wang, Kong Tingting listened carefully and actively participated in the discussion, demonstrating her interest and thinking ability in ethics and philosophical issues. The relationship between Teacher Wang and Kong Tingting is that of mentor/student. They have established good interaction and trust. Teacher Wang plays the role of a mentor and helpful friend in guidance and guidance.
dialogs: Yes, I remember. Teacher Wang asked us to study an experimental case from Frankfurt, which explored the relationship between moral responsibility and free will.
That’s right! So what are your impressions of this experimental case? What lessons do you think it has taught you?

I am deeply impressed. It provides a scenario worth thinking about and leads us to discuss whether free will is restricted. Through this case, I began to think about the true free will I have when making decisions and the impact of interference from the environment on free will. I am now more aware of the ethical principles I need to consider in every decision I make.
Your thinking and reactions are great! It sounds like you have come to realize your moral responsibilities and obligations. How does Teacher Wang teach and help you master this case in class?

Teacher Wang is really outstanding! He introduced real and vivid situations and helped me understand and relate to the theoretical framework. Teacher Wang understands my abilities and needs very well. With personalized guidance, I can better explore my interests and preferences and have enough free space to show my thinking and analysis skills.

It’s obvious that Teacher Wang is very important to you! The mentoring relationship between you and him plays an important role in learning. What do you think is the most valuable thing to learn from Teacher Wang?

Teacher Wang is a very patient and considerate tutor who can provide specific guidance to students of different levels. The most valuable thing to learn is that he has established a good platform for interaction and academic cooperation based on mutual trust and respect. He treats every student equally and emphasizes the substantive guidance and guidance each individual needs.

summary: Learn about the Planck satellite observations
content: Kong Tingting and Sister Li watched a documentary introducing the Planck satellite. The documentary details the Planck satellite's launch time, main mission, and important information about the cosmic background radiation it observed. While watching the documentary, Kong Tingting and Sister Li both felt the important role of the Planck satellite in the field of astronomy. They have gained a deeper understanding of the Gilbert oscillation and anisotropic power spectrum of the cosmic background radiation, and have developed a keen interest in the origin, evolution of the universe and the properties of dark matter and dark energy. Sister Li also explained to Kong Tingting the important discoveries made by scientists through the observations of the Planck satellite, which provide key clues for astronomical research and understanding of the mysteries of the universe. Through this joint study, Kong Tingting and Sister Li deepened their neighborly relationship with each other. They decided to participate in more astronomy-related activities together in the future and explore the mysteries of the universe together.
dialogs: Hello, I want to know about the Planck satellite. Can you tell me a little bit?

Yes, Sister Li and I watched the documentary together. It contained a lot of important information about the cosmic background radiation. We also learned some interesting knowledge about the origin and evolution of the universe. What role do you think the Planck satellite plays in the field of astronomy?

So, the Planck satellite does play an important role in the field of astronomy. We also gained a deeper understanding of Gilbert oscillations and anisotropic power spectra. These discoveries must be supported by a large and rigorous team of scientists, which is really admirable. Do you know the specific discoveries they made?

Of course. The Planck satellite was launched by the European Space Agency in 2009. Its main mission is to measure the cosmic background radiation. I remember you once watched a documentary about it with Sister Li. Is there anything in particular you want to ask?

The Planck satellite is currently one of the best tools for studying the origin and evolution of the universe. Its observations provide important clues for our understanding of the universe. For example, its Gilbert oscillation observations reveal information about the initial density fluctuations of the universe. The discovery of its anisotropic power spectrum can be used to prove that the universe has experienced an expansion period. These results are very important for exploring the mysteries of the universe and understanding the properties of dark matter and dark energy. This is why the observations of the Planck satellite are widely cited and recognized.

Yes, it took these teams of scientists several years to achieve these important observations. Through the Planck satellite, scientists found that the initial period of the formation of the universe was very consistent, and found that dark matter played an important role in the evolution and structure formation of the universe. At the same time, observations show that dark energy also plays a very important role in cosmology. These results not only deepen our understanding of the origin, evolution and nature of the universe, but also provide key revelations for the exploration of dark matter and dark energy.

Thank you for your explanation, which gives us a deeper understanding of the Planck satellite and astronomical research. We will definitely participate in more astronomy activities together next time and continue to explore the mysteries of the universe.

content: XX Capital invested in ABC Company in 2018 and became its important strategic partner. summary: Care about Kong Tingting’s life and growth
content: During a community event one day, Mr. Zhang noticed Kong Tingting, a student with special educational needs. summary: Offer to help her find a seat and chat with her
content: Park Hyatt Apartment is a luxury residential building located in Beijing with a total construction area of more than 20,000 square meters. In this construction project, the heating ventilation and air conditioning engineering case demonstrates the application of advanced technologies and equipment. In terms of heating, Park Hyatt Apartment uses ground source heat pump technology to achieve efficient heating through ground source heat pump units, hot water circulation pumps and radiators. The ground source heat pump unit uses brand equipment called 'Yokohama Earth2Earth', and the heating capacity of each unit can reach 100 kW. The hot water circulation pump adopts the 'Grundfos Magna3' series of equipment to ensure the stability of hot water supply. In terms of ventilation and air conditioning, the Park Hyatt Apartment adopts a central air-conditioning and refrigeration system and a fresh air system with centralized air supply and zone adjustment. The central air-conditioning refrigeration system consists of multiple chilled water units, cooling water circulation pumps, chilled water pumps and fan coils. The chilled water unit uses brand equipment called 'Carrier AquaSnap Plus', and the cooling capacity of each unit can reach 120 kW. The cooling water circulation pump adopts 'Grundfos TPE' series equipment to ensure the normal operation of the circulation system. The fresh air system consists of multiple full heat exchange air treatment units, fans and air ducts. The fully heat-exchange air treatment unit uses 'Daikin HeatRecovery Ventilator' brand equipment to achieve efficient heat recovery and fresh air supply. In addition, the heating, ventilation and air-conditioning project of the Park Hyatt Apartment is also equipped with an intelligent automatic control system, using brand equipment called 'Siemens Desigo' to achieve control of temperature, humidity, wind speed and fresh air volume through programmable controllers and sensors. precise regulation and monitoring. In terms of heating, ventilation and air conditioning engineering at Park Hyatt Apartments, these advanced technologies and equipment ensure that residents can enjoy a comfortable and efficient indoor environment. In this case, Mr. Chen was a stranger Kong Tingting met on the bus. He took the initiative to help Kong Tingting find a seat and chatted with her, making her feel warm and relieved.

In 2017, a constitutional dispute involving freedom of speech occurred in a certain country. A citizen posted a comment about government corruption on social media, causing dissatisfaction with the government. The government considered the article malicious and defamatory and damaged its image, so it took the citizen to the Constitutional Court. When the Constitutional Court considered the case, it noted that freedom of speech, as an important part of civil rights, should receive special protection. The court noted that the citizen did not use malicious words of personal attack in his speech, but only expressed his personal views through criticism, and believed that this was a legitimate way to exercise his right to freedom of speech. However, the government alleged that the citizen's speech involved intimidation. After detailed analysis, the court held that the citizen did not spread violence or create social unrest through malicious speech. Although the content of the speech was highly critical, it did not reach the level of intimidation. During the court hearing, the Constitutional Court reviewed the process of relevant legal legislation to ensure the constitutionality of the law. Ultimately, the court ruled that the citizen's speech did not violate the provisions of the Constitution on freedom of speech and civil rights, and therefore the citizen should not be restricted or punished by law. However, during the course of this case, Xiong Yan, as Xiong Fei's sister, was also threatened. Due to her relationship with Xiong Fei, she was harassed and maliciously attacked by some people. Although Xiong Yan was not involved in Xiong Fei's speech case, she was involved and became the focus of public opinion. This case demonstrates the important role of the Constitutional Court in upholding civil rights and protecting freedom of speech, and also reveals the possible ripple effects behind freedom of speech.
dialogs: Recently, one of my remarks attracted the attention of the government.
What remarks?
It’s about government corruption. I think the public has the right to know the truth.
But the government has expressed dissatisfaction with your remarks. Are you at risk of being prosecuted?
I may be sued, but I think I have the right to free speech and should be protected by law.
How are things going?

In the end, the Constitutional Court held that I exercised my legitimate right to freedom of speech and did not constitute intimidation, so I was not found to have violated the Constitution. I feel very blessed.
It sounds like you are safe and sound. But I heard your sister was also threatened.
Yes, Xiong Yan has also been maliciously attacked because of her relationship with me, and she has been worried.
How do you plan to help your sister deal with this threat?
We have hired security guards and lawyers, and also strengthened home security. Hope everything goes well.

summary: Xiao Fei shared a scene from 'Les Misérables'
content: At a college party, Xiong Fei and his college friend Li Ming got together. Li Ming is a software engineer who is very interested in social issues. When talking about the gap between rich and poor in the humanities and social fields, Xiaofei shared a scene from the novel 'Les Misérables' by French writer Victor Hugo. He mentioned the contrast between the main character in the novel, Jean Varza, and the wealthy factory owner Mr. Fabiny, as well as describing the problems of French society in the 19th century. Li Ming was deeply touched by Xiaofei's sharing. He began to pay more attention to social injustice and expressed his concern about the gap between rich and poor. The two friends explored the case together and had a long discussion. They realize that the gap between rich and poor is not only a personal problem, but an important issue that the entire society should pay attention to. This sharing not only enhanced the friendship between Xiaofei and Li Ming, but also inspired their interest in further research on issues of social justice and equality.
dialogs: At that college party, I shared with a friend the contrast between Jean Varza and Mr. Fabini and the French society in the 19th century described in Victor Hugo's novel 'Les Misérables' The problem. This really got me thinking.
What made you feel so shocked?
The descriptions in the novel are very vivid and can truly show the reality of society. The difference between M. Fabiny's life and Jean Varza's was too great to accept.
This is a shocking gap. Have you discussed this issue?

Yes, my other friend Li Ming was infected by my sharing and is also very concerned about issues of social justice and equality. The two of us discussed this issue for a long time and felt that it really needs the comprehensive attention of society.
Okay, that sounds very enlightening. So what are your next plans?

I plan to engage in work related to the social field. I believe that every area of society needs to be given adequate attention, whether through research or creating tools, and the issue of wealth disparity should be at the forefront.

dialogs: Hey, what are you doing?

Through the efforts and collaboration of both parties, they have successfully explored the application of nanoparticle polymer solar cell technology in the field of photovoltaic power generation, and hope to promote it to a larger practical application and industrialization stage.

content: One day, Xiong Fei and his neighbor Chen Hua were chatting in a cafe in the community and talked about module theory in the field of mathematics. Xiong Fei mentioned to Chen Hua the classic case of the famous mathematician Andrew Wiles' solution to prove Fermat's Last Theorem. He details the background and unresolved history of Fermat's Last Theorem, and explains the proof results announced by Wiles in 1994. Xiong Fei described the mathematical theories and tools of multiple named entities used by Wiles in his proofs, including elliptic curves, modular forms, spectral theory, and advanced algebraic geometry. He emphasized the importance of Wiles's systematic application of the model to the interconnection of elliptic curves and spectral theory, and mentioned the multiple levels of detail and in-depth derivation that Wiles demonstrated in the proof process. Xiong Fei believes that Wiles' proof gave Fermat's Last Theorem a new meaning and paved the way for future mathematicians. Chen Hua expressed strong interest in this important milestone in the field of mathematics and had a more in-depth discussion with Xiong Fei. They explored knowledge and tools from various branches of mathematics used in proofs, and exchanged ideas and challenges in exploring unsolved mysteries. This discussion not only enriched their mathematical knowledge, but also deepened their friendship.
dialogs: Do you know the history and pending process of Fermat’s last theorem?
I don’t know much about it. Can you introduce it to me?

Fermat’s Last Theorem has long attracted attention in the mathematics community. But its proof has never been solved. Until the famous mathematician Andrew Wiles announced in 1994 that he had solved Fermat's last theorem.
Really? How did Andrew Wiles prove Fermat's Last Theorem?

Wiles proved the necessary and sufficient conditions for Fermat's last theorem. He applied various mathematical theories and tools of named entities such as elliptic curves, modular forms, spectral theory, and advanced algebraic geometry. Wiles's proof revealed the deep intrinsic connections between these mathematical concepts by systematically applying models to the importance of the interconnection of elliptic curves and spectral theory.
Did his proof bring any new understanding?

His proof not only proves the necessity and sufficiency of Fermat's last theorem, but also gives this theorem a new meaning. Through his proof, mathematicians can now understand and study it by applying modern mathematical techniques, making it easier for future mathematicians to build on the work in this field.
Wiles proved that the complexity is far beyond imagination. The multiple levels of detail and in-depth derivation he demonstrated in his proof process are worth learning and thinking about.
Have you discussed this issue with Chen Hua’s neighbor?

Yes. I also discussed with him the knowledge and tools of various branches of mathematics used in proofs. We had more in-depth discussions and shared challenges and reflections on the exploration of unsolved mysteries. This discussion not only enriched our mathematical knowledge, but also deepened our friendship.

The two explored every corner of Notre Dame in depth and were full of praise for its unique architectural style and artistic value. Well, actually this is a very broad topic. To improve the beauty of flower elements on wallpaper stickers, you must pay attention to pattern design. Floral patterns should fit the theme, have a sense of hierarchy, and have appropriate proportions, among other factors.
Sounds very professional! Are there any good cases?

Speaking of flower element design, I really have a good case to introduce to you. A few days ago, I saw a flower floor-to-ceiling wallpaper designed by a Beijing Yishang interior design company. It was quite good. I'm even going to take this wallpaper to the lab for use.
It sounds very interesting. Can you describe the design of this wallpaper in detail?

The design of this wallpaper mainly revolves around floral elements. The entire design expresses the sprouting of all things, including peanut trees and flowers scattered all over the ground. The most striking feature is the bright and rich floral patterns. In addition, the effect of light and shadow on the entire room must be considered, as well as color matching.

It is very revealing. If it is added to the home design, it seems to be a good way to add some elegant atmosphere. Finally, could you please help Li Li and give her some advice on choosing colors and patterns?

That’s not a problem. If you are considering choosing different colors as the tone of the wallpaper, I think the color should be consistent with the overall theme of the wallpaper, but it can be inconsistent with the various configurations of the entire room to create a contrast. The pattern should be coordinated with other wall designs according to the overall space.

summary: Teach Zhang Lei to calculate the area of a triangle
content: Xiong Fei met a stranger in the park named Zhang Lei, a Chinese salesman. Zhang Lei's appearance is of medium build and short hair. His hobbies are running and swimming. He greeted Xiong Fei, who responded to him kindly. They then chatted, and Xiong Fei learned that Zhang Lei was interested in computational geometry in the field of mathematics. Xiong Fei explained to Zhang Lei a specific case about calculating the area of a triangle. He explains Heron's formula and the use of vector cross products to calculate the area of a triangle. Xiong Fei told Zhang Lei that he could calculate the area of the triangle based on the coordinates of the given three points. Zhang Lei listened with interest and listened carefully to Xiong Fei's explanation. Xiong Fei also showed Zhang Lei the specific calculation steps and helped him solve some doubts. Together they discussed the application of computational geometry to real-world problems and shared some interesting examples. Xiong Fei was happy to communicate with Zhang Lei, and Zhang Lei expressed his gratitude to Xiong Fei for his knowledge and experience. They had a great time in the park and agreed to meet again next time.
dialogs: Hello, welcome to the park. The weather is nice today.
Yes, the weather is very pleasant today.
Where are you from?
I am a Chinese salesman from Shanghai.
Nice to meet you. My name is Xiong Fei. Do you like running and swimming?
Yes, this is my hobby. Do you have any hobbies?
I like to study mathematics, especially in the field of computational geometry. Have you ever been interested in this?
Actually, I am very interested in computational geometry, but my knowledge is limited to middle school level.
Can I give you an example of calculating the area of a triangle?
Of course, thank you very much.
The area of a triangle can be calculated using Helen's formula or vector cross product. I have an example here, please look at the coordinates of the three points here.
Well, I understand what you said. The principles of the vector cross product method and Heron's formula are indeed the same, but the calculation methods are different.

Yes, in fact, both methods are applied to vector operations on the triangular plane, but the expression and calculation methods are different. You understand very well and your learning progresses quickly.
It’s because your explanation is very clear. I am very grateful for your teaching. Computational geometry is important in practical applications and this helped me a lot.
I'm glad you're interested. If you encounter more problems or questions in the future, don't hesitate to contact me and we can discuss and solve them together.
Thank you very much, I will remember it. It's really nice to meet you. Let's talk to you next time.
I'm looking forward to it too. I wish you a nice day.

content: After the Shenzhen Special Economic Zone policy was introduced, He's mother actively supported her son He Feng's entrepreneurial process. She helped He Feng find land and loan support, providing a solid foundation for his business. He Feng successfully founded an innovative technology company with the policy support of the Shenzhen Special Administrative Region Government and the help of his mother.
dialogs: Hello, Mr. He. Could you please tell us about the support you received during your entrepreneurial journey?

When the Shenzhen Special Economic Zone policy was introduced in the early 1980s, my mother supported me in starting a business and helped me find land and loans, which provided me with a very solid foundation.
It sounds like you are grateful for your mother's support. How did you start your business?
I had nothing at that time, so I was able to establish my innovative technology company with the policy support of the Shenzhen Special Administrative Region Government and the help of my mother.
Can you tell us specifically how you and your mother found land and loans at that time?

We obtained the land by applying to the government and through my mother’s connections in the community. As for the loan, my mother helped me borrow some money from my friends, and finally used the money to repay the loan after the business was successful.

summary: Understanding Russia’s Unrestricted Warfare Strategy in the Conflict in Eastern Ukraine
content: He's mother is a person who is very interested in the military field. She has a deep understanding of Russia's unrestricted warfare strategy demonstrated in the conflict in eastern Ukraine. She actively researched and paid attention to the modern military technologies and tactics adopted by the Russian army in this war. Mother He is particularly concerned about the advanced electronic warfare systems used by the Russian army, including powerful electronic jamming equipment and electromagnetic wave weapons. She learned that these devices and weapons were able to effectively jam enemy communications and radar systems, causing the Ukrainian army to lose much of its command and control capabilities on the battlefield. He’s mother is also concerned about the advanced intelligence and surveillance systems used by the Russian army, such as satellite reconnaissance and drone surveillance. She learned that these systems could track the movements of Ukrainian troops and obtain real-time intelligence, providing the Russian military with important battlefield advantages. He's mother is also interested in the long-range strike methods and unmanned combat systems used by the Russian army. She learned that the Russian military uses missiles and long-range fire strikes to attack enemy targets, and uses unmanned ground vehicles such as Vipers and Watchmen to conduct operations. He's mother also learned that the Russian army quickly occupied key areas through rapid maneuvers and raids. She is also interested in the high-risk missions carried out by special forces and special operations units used by the Russian military, such as the Grachevsky Special Forces Brigade. These special forces carried out surprise attacks on the Ukrainian army by sneaking behind enemy lines and causing a major blow. In addition, He’s mother also learned that Russia has adopted cyber warfare attacks against Ukraine’s critical infrastructure and communication networks. She knew that the Russian military used advanced cyber spyware and hacking techniques to disrupt Ukraine's power supply system, financial system and government networks, which had a major impact on Ukraine's daily life and national security. By understanding this information, He Mu deeply understood the importance and implementation of unrestricted warfare in modern warfare. She was passionate about the study of military strategy in order to better understand and evaluate various strategic means in this conflict.
dialogs: Hello, Mother He, today we will talk about the unrestricted warfare strategy adopted by Russia during the conflict in eastern Ukraine. Do you know anything about it?

Hello, I am very interested in this topic. In this war, the Russian army used many advanced electronic warfare systems and tactical methods, such as electromagnetic wave weapons, powerful electronic jamming equipment, and satellite reconnaissance. These have dealt a big blow to the Ukrainian army.
Do you know what other special weapons and technical means the Russian army used in this war?

Yes, the Russian army also uses drones and long-range fire strikes to attack enemy targets, and uses unmanned ground vehicles such as 'Viper' and 'Watcher' to conduct operations. At the same time, they are also launching attacks on Ukraine's critical infrastructure and communication networks in terms of cyber warfare.

Indeed, Russia’s tactics in this conflict are very advanced, using rapid maneuvers and raids to quickly capture key areas. At the same time, they also use special forces and special operations units to conduct high-risk missions. What do you think of Ukraine? What can be done to counterattack?
Ukraine needs to strengthen research on electronic warfare, network security, drones and special forces, and at the same time improve its informatization level and modern armament level.
Very good suggestions. If you have new understanding or ideas, please continue to share them with me!

summary: XYZ Bank personal loan interest rate adjustment
content: In this case, Wang Li, as a customer of XYZ Bank, was affected by the adjustment of personal loan interest rates. She had applied for a loan from XYZ Bank to buy a new house and now needs to reconsider the new interest rate level. According to XYZ Bank's adjustment strategy, floating interest rates will adapt to market risks and changes in supply and demand to ensure the bank's profitability and market competitiveness. The adjustment will take effect next quarter, giving Wang Li enough time to make adaptive adjustments. Based on market analysis and internal risk management requirements, XYZ Bank decided to increase the personal loan interest rate by 0.5%. In addition, XYZ Bank sets different interest rates for different types of personal loans to reflect the risks and needs of different types of loans. Interest rate adjustments are affected by various factors such as the central bank's interest rate policy, market supply and demand, capital costs, and risk assessment. As a customer who has applied for a loan or already received a loan, Wang Li needs to recalculate the repayment amount and consider the new interest rate level. This interest rate adjustment is an important measure taken by XYZ Bank to cope with market fluctuations and manage risks.
dialogs: Hello, Mr. He. Do you have any questions about loans?
Yes, I would like to know about the recent adjustment of XYZ Bank’s loan interest rate.
No problem. What specific content do you want to know?
I am a customer of XYZ Bank. I would like to know the impact of the recent loan interest rate adjustment on my loan.

You are absolutely right. According to the recent interest rate adjustment policy, XYZ Bank has set different interest rates for different types of loans, including a 0.5% increase in personal loan interest rates. If you are taking out a loan or considering a loan, we recommend that you recalculate your repayments and fully consider the new interest rate level.
Got it. Will XYZ Bank’s loan interest rate be adjusted in the future?

XYZ Bank's interest rate adjustment strategy is based on market risks and changes in supply and demand to make floating adjustments to ensure the bank's profitability and market competitiveness. Interest rate adjustments are affected by various factors such as the central bank's interest rate policy, market supply and demand, capital costs, and risk assessment, and may be adjusted in the future based on actual conditions.
OK, thank you very much for your answer.

content: As He Feng's high school friend and a fencing enthusiast, Wang Li admired Wang Chen's fencing skills very much.
