Yes, we will meet at the cafe on the weekend. I am looking forward to that meeting.

summary: Plots related to the history of astronomy
content: Zhao Li is a primary school teacher and is a neighbor of Huang Xin. One day, Huang Xin mentioned Ptolemy's 'Mathematical Principles of the Earth and Celestial Sphere' in his conversation with Zhao Li. Huang Xin introduced the importance of this work to ancient astronomy in detail to Zhao Li, and explained Ptolemy's cosmology and geocentric theory. Zhao Li is very interested in this case because she is an educator and has a strong interest in astronomy. Huang Xin explained to Zhao Li the observation data and calculation methods on the motion of the sun, moon and planets in 'Mathematical Principles of the Earth and Celestial Sphere'. Zhao Li studied Ptolemaic astronomical theory in depth and applied some of it into her teaching. She designed a course on planetary motion to allow students to understand the laws of planetary motion through observation and calculation. This case illustrates the friendly neighborly relationship between Huang Xin and Zhao Li, as well as their shared love of education and science.
dialogs: Hey, do you know Ptolemy's 'Mathematical Principles of the Earth and Celestial Sphere'?
Not sure. What book is this?
This is a very important book that had a great impact on ancient astronomy.
Ptolemy put forward his cosmology and geocentric theory in the book.
It sounds interesting. Can you elaborate on it?
Of course! Ptolemy believed that the earth was the center of the universe and that all other planets revolved around the earth.
This sounds like a concept of the universe that modern science has long overturned.
Yes, but at the time, this was widely recognized.
Ptolemy's theory is very complete. He used mathematical methods to calculate the motion trajectories of the planets.
I would like to know more about his calculation method.
I can explain it to you.
OK, I’ll listen to you.
(Introducing Ptolemaic astronomical calculation methods)
Thank you for sharing! I will share this knowledge point with my users.
You’re welcome. Learning never ends.
(A few weeks later) I have learned about Ptolemaic astronomical theories and find this knowledge useful to my users.
Yes, I also find that his theory has great practical application value.
I even introduced Ptolemy's observation data and calculation methods of the motion of the sun, moon and planets to my users.
It sounds very good. I hope more people can know this important historical figure.

summary: Communication between Zhao Li and Huang Xin
content: When talking about soundtracks in the field of music and dance, Zhao Li and Huang Xin had a conversation about the movie 'Black Swan'. As a primary school teacher, Zhao Li has a strong interest in music and art. Actually, I still prefer music and dance-type movies. I watched a movie called 'Black Swan' before, which was great. Have you seen?

The film is about the transformation of dance and the inner conflict and madness of the protagonist. The white swan and black swan played by Nina well express the complex emotions of two-faced people. The music in the movie is great and it won many awards. Mansell is said to be very good at this area. Do you have any tips for diving into the soundtrack?

Actually, I don’t know much about movies and music. I just discovered this element in 'Black Swan'. I know that you are very interested in new things in music and art. What good music are you listening to lately?

Recently I discovered a very good musician named Mao Amin. She is one of the most famous soprano singers in our country. There are very beautiful melodies and lyrics in his songs 'The Lost Years' and 'Notepad'. You can try to listen and see.

Last month I participated in an event called the Prayer Café.
What does the Blessing Cafe do?
It is a place with the theme of faith sharing and exchange.

I went there alone because I wanted to meet some like-minded people.

I think participating in this event can make new friends in the context of faith, and explore the relationship between faith and life, thereby gaining new perspectives and understanding.

I discussed the relationship between faith and life goals with young professionals from different denominations. We shared our faith experiences and life stories with each other.

I feel that my social circle has expanded and I have made many friends related to religious beliefs. And by participating in this event, I found inner peace in this busy city and felt the warmth and mutual support of people from different faith backgrounds.

content: A promotion event for the Baby Wash Set was held in Huang Xin’s community. dialogs: Hello Mr. Huang, do you still remember the Baby Happy Wash Set promotion event held by you and Teacher Wang Tao in the community on May 10, 2022?
Of course I remember. This event was very successful and many residents benefited a lot. Do you want me to answer questions about this event?
Yes, Mr. Huang, we need a summary report on this event. Could you please tell us in detail about this event?

Very happy! The event that day was very lively and interesting. Not only did we display product samples and display boards of the Baby Happy Wash Set, we also shared knowledge and practical suggestions on baby care with community residents. At the same time, many parents have expressed strong interest in my research in the field of educational statistics and hope to exchange relevant academic experiences with me on different occasions.

summary: Visit a U.S. Marine Corps base
content: Huang Xin is an expert in educational statistics. He met Wang Tao, who is also an educator, in the community. One day, Wang Tao invited Huang Xin to visit the US Marine Corps base. Wang Tao knew that Huang Xin had a strong interest in the military field and wanted to give him a rare opportunity to experience the atmosphere and facilities of the military base in person. They came to San Diego, California, USA, and enjoyed the beautiful scenery along the way. Upon arriving at the base, they were struck by its size and facilities. They visited various facilities such as military training facilities, barracks, flying fields, equipment warehouses, hospitals and education centers, and learned about the daily training and living environment of Marines. Wang Tao introduced the importance of the base to Huang Xin and its responsibility for maintaining world peace and security. They also watched a Marine Corps actual combat exercise and deeply felt the Marines' fighting spirit and teamwork ability. Through this visit, Huang Xin gained a deeper understanding of the operation of the military base and the contribution of the Marine Corps, which also enhanced the friendship between him and Wang Tao.
dialogs: Wang Tao, the last time I went to the Marine Corps base was really unforgettable. I was really shocked there.
What impressed you most?
I think the most amazing thing is the equipment warehouse there. Those weapons and equipment are so amazing!
Yes, the military facilities are indeed very impressive. Do you have a deeper understanding of the training of the Marines there?
Yes, not only the training, but I am also more grateful for their work and contribution.
And you were lucky enough to watch the actual combat exercise. It must be very exciting, right?
Indeed, that actual combat exercise was so exciting, I’m still a little excited now!
So, through this visit, has your relationship with Wang Tao developed further?
Of course, my friendship with Wang Tao has become deeper, which is another beautiful meaning of this trip.
That sounds great. Traveling has brought you many wonderful memories and feelings. I hope your friendship will last.

summary: Zhang Lei mentioned the Red Curtain Restaurant to Huang Xin
content: Huang Xin met a stranger named Zhang Lei during his travels. While they were drinking coffee in a cafe, Zhang Lei recommended a restaurant called 'Red Curtain' in Huangpu District, Shanghai to Huang Xin. Zhang Lei told Huang Xin that the Red Curtain Restaurant is a very unique restaurant located in an independent building with a long history near the Nanjing Road Pedestrian Street. He described decorative elements such as the elaborate hanging railings, arched doors and gold plaques on the exterior, as well as the spacious interior, historic photos and carved artwork. Huang Xin became very interested in this restaurant and decided to check it out.
dialogs: Hello, Mr. Huang. Are you planning to go to the 'Red Curtain' restaurant tonight?
Yes, I am very interested. How to get there?
You can take the subway, get off and walk there. Or you can take a taxi.
'Red Curtain' is a very popular restaurant with a large flow of people at night. It is recommended to reserve a table in advance.
'Hongqianzi' restaurant mainly provides classic local cuisine and Huaiyang cuisine. Their specialty dishes include crab meat dumplings, fried prawns, mapo tofu and more.
It sounds very good. Thank you for your suggestion.

summary: Peng Ming learns to make pasta
content: Peng Ming is Peng Jie's younger brother and he is very interested in pasta making. Peng Jie decided to teach Peng Ming how to make pasta over the weekend. Together they prepared all the ingredients and ingredients and started making it in the kitchen. Peng Jie patiently explained every step to Peng Ming, including cooking noodles, frying garlic and mushrooms, and preparing sauces. Peng Ming listened carefully and followed Peng Jie's instructions step by step. They worked together to create this pesto mushroom pasta dish. Finally, they tasted this delicious pasta together. Peng Ming was very satisfied with his cooking results, and Peng Jie was also proud of his brother's learning progress. This pasta-making experience not only deepened the close relationship between the brothers, but also gave Peng Ming a deeper understanding and interest in cooking skills.
dialogs: Hello, Mr. Peng, I remember you were learning pasta making with your brother Peng Ming at home last weekend. How do you feel now?
Yes, the pesto mushroom pasta we made is very delicious. I am very proud of it. Peng Ming did a great job. I think I explained it more clearly and guided him patiently.
Will this experience enhance your relationship and interest in cooking skills?

Of course, I think this learning experience together is great and brings us closer. At the same time, seeing his younger brother successfully making pasta made him more interested in cooking skills. I'm looking forward to my next cooking experience with him.

summary: Visit Mr. Zhang’s home design projects
content: Peng Ming, as Peng Jie's brother, is a person who is very interested in interior design. Peng Ming was very curious after hearing that Mr. Zhang used a green plant called Monstera Deliciosa in one of his home design projects. So he invited Peng Jie to visit the modern apartment with an area of 100 square meters in the center of Shanghai.

Yes, I will go and see it with my brother. We are both very interested in interior design.

We will arrive at 3 p.m.
Received. Then we will greet you at the door of the apartment at 3pm. I wish you happy!

content: As a graduate student in geography, Li Hua was fortunate to be a member of the Surveyor expedition team. He and Peng Jie are college classmates, and they have always had a strong interest in geographical exploration and ecological protection. When Peng Jie learned that the Surveyor expedition was about to go to Antarctica, he immediately thought of Li Hua. So Peng Jie contacted Li Hua and recommended him to join this exciting expedition team. Li Hua accepted the invitation excitedly and boarded the Surveyor with Peng Jie in December 2020. During this trip to Antarctica, Li Hua and Peng Jie worked with world-class geographers and ecologists, who together aimed to discover and study Antarctica's geography, biodiversity and climate change. Li Hua plays an important role in the expedition, using geographic information systems (GIS) and remote sensing technology to create detailed maps and assisting in collecting samples of marine life and plants. They not only crossed the edge of the Antarctic Peninsula in Antarctica, but also reached South Pacific islands further away from Antarctica, such as South Georgia and the Malagas Islands. Throughout the expedition, Li Hua and Peng Jie worked closely together, sharing their findings and experiences and jointly contributing to research and conservation efforts in the Antarctic region. This trip to Antarctica not only allowed Li Hua to realize his dream, but also deepened the friendship between him and Peng Jie.
dialogs: Hello, I want to talk to you about your last experience in Antarctica.
Hi, Peng Jie, I’m glad to talk to you about my experience in Antarctica.
What was it like for you and Li Hua to go to Antarctica together?

Yes, Li Hua and I are both fortunate to join the Surveyor expedition team. That trip was very unforgettable. We explored Antarctica and the South Pacific islands together, and met many world-class geographers and ecologists.
Did you go to South Georgia and the Malagas Islands? It must be very mysterious there.

Yes, we not only crossed the edge of the Antarctic Peninsula in Antarctica, but also reached the South Pacific islands far away from Antarctica. In the Malagas Islands we also found many interesting marine life and plants.
It sounds very magical. So what exactly did you do?

Li Hua plays an important role in the expedition, using geographic information systems (GIS) and remote sensing technology to draw detailed maps and assist in collecting samples of marine life and plants. I also conducted a series of observations and records on Antarctica’s ecological environment, flora and fauna in the wild.
It sounds like your mission is very important, and you are all very powerful.
Thank you, Peng Jie. Participating in this Antarctic trip gave us a deeper understanding of the research and protection work in the Antarctic region.
I hope you can share your research results with more people and promote the sustainable development of the Antarctic region.

summary: Learners asked Li Hua about reading and implementing research papers in the field of machine learning
content: As an agricultural educator, Peng Jie is keen on independent learning. At an alumni gathering, Peng Jie happened to meet Li Hua, a good friend from college. He knew that Li Hua had rich experience in the field of machine learning. Peng Jie asked Li Hua for advice on reading and implementing research papers in the field of machine learning. Li Hua enthusiastically shared his experience and methods in the independent learning process. He told Peng Jie that he could choose some top international conferences and journals, such as ICML and NeurIPS, to obtain the most cutting-edge papers. It is also recommended to use some specialized academic search engines, such as Google Scholar and ArXiv, to search for papers related to the topics you are interested in. Li Hua also mentioned that when reading a paper, you must first read the entire paper to understand the main contributions and methods proposed by the author. Then, read the specific algorithm details in the paper in depth, and try to implement this algorithm for practice. Peng Jie was very interested in Li Hua's suggestions. He decided to start independently studying research papers in the field of machine learning according to Li Hua's guidance, and looked forward to achieving breakthrough results in the future.
dialogs: Hello, Peng Jie. Is there anything I can do to help you?
Hello, AI assistant. Recently I have been studying paper reading and implementation in the field of machine learning. I would like to ask what are the ways to obtain the most cutting-edge papers?

You can choose some top international conferences and journals, such as ICML and NeurIPS. The papers in these conferences and journals are the most cutting-edge research results. In addition, you can also use some specialized academic search engines, such as Google Scholar and ArXiv, to search for papers related to the topics you are interested in.
OK, thank you for your suggestion. What do you think you need to pay attention to when reading papers?

When reading a paper, you can first read through the entire paper to understand the main contributions and methods proposed by the author. Then, read the specific algorithm details in the paper in depth, and try to implement this algorithm for practice.
OK, I will start reading the paper and practice as you suggested. thank you for your help.

content: Peng Jie and Li Hua were good friends in college and they often studied English vocabulary together. In their studies, they talked about specific examples of vocabulary in the field of language, one of the classic works being the Oxford English Dictionary. Together they studied the features and uses of the dictionary and discussed in depth the wealth of information it contains. Peng Jie introduced to Li Hua the origin and compilation method of the Oxford English Dictionary, as well as the detailed definitions and historical changes provided by the dictionary. They also discuss the various English dialects and loanwords covered in the dictionary, as well as the importance of phrases, idioms and quotations. Peng Jie and Li Hua deepened their understanding and application of vocabulary through joint study and discussion. They develop deep friendships in the process and inspire and support each other's love of language learning.
dialogs: Hey, I remember we often learned English vocabulary together in college.
Yeah, I remember we talked about the Oxford English Dictionary.
Yes, we really focused on learning every aspect of English at that time.
Do you remember the characteristics of the Oxford English Dictionary we discussed at that time?
Of course, at that time we were particularly interested in its etymological analysis and citation research.

Well, in addition to the explanations of common words, the detailed explanations of English vocabulary in the Oxford English Dictionary also include grammatical usage and British and American changes, but it may be a bit confusing for someone like me who has just started learning English. complex.
It’s okay. I have other English books and language-related resources to share with you, if you are interested.
Of course I am interested. We can continue to discuss this aspect together.
Yes, my wish is to provide you with learning resources about English at any time, and let us make progress together.
I feel really grateful and your friendship is also very precious to me.

content: On March 15, 2022, Xiao Ming encountered some difficulties and challenges while studying at a certain school. He realizes he needs more support and encouragement and turns to his romantic partner Wang Li for help. Wang Li is a smart and enthusiastic girl who is very concerned about Xiao Ming's academic progress. She heard Xiao Ming mention the SMART learning strategy and expressed appreciation for his efforts and methods. She encouraged Xiao Ming to persevere and provided some advice and support. She helped Xiao Ming develop a more specific study plan, including previewing, reviewing and problem-solving training together every day, and also found some additional math exercises and learning resources for him. In addition, Wang Li also encouraged Xiao Ming to join self-organized study groups by students to discuss and share experiences with other students who have the same learning goals. Throughout the learning process, Wang Li always gave Xiao Ming full support and encouragement, motivating him to persistently apply the skills in SMART strategies to overcome difficulties. Eventually, Xiao Ming's math scores improved significantly and he got an A grade in his most recent exam. Xiao Ming's success is inseparable from the encouragement and support of his romantic partner Wang Li, which also makes their relationship stronger and sweeter.

summary: Attend communication training courses in the area of marriage and family
content: Li Ming and Wang Li decided to participate in a communication training course in the field of marriage and family to improve their differences in decision-making and communication difficulties. During the course, they learned active listening and presentation skills, as well as the importance of setting goals and values together. They realize that only by planning for the future together can they better coordinate their decisions. By sitting down every night to specifically discuss important family matters and listening to each other's needs and opinions, they began to use these skills to improve communication and decision-making in their families. In addition, they also invite parents to attend family meetings to discuss important matters together to make the entire family more harmonious and harmonious. Over time, they found that through improved communication and decision-making skills, family relationships improved dramatically, mutual trust and understanding increased, conflicts decreased, and planning for the future together brought more happiness and satisfaction to the family.
dialogs: Hello Peng Jie, five years ago you and your wife Li Ming participated in a communication training course in the field of marriage and family.
Yes, we did participate in such a course at that time.
In this course, you learned the skills of active listening and presentation, as well as the importance of jointly setting goals and values.
Yes, we realize that only by jointly planning for the future can we better coordinate decision-making.

I remember when you started using these techniques to improve communication and decision-making in the home. You sit down every night to discuss important family matters and listen to each other's needs and opinions.
Yes, it helps us understand each other better.
Moreover, you invite parents to attend family meetings to discuss important matters together, making the whole family more harmonious and harmonious.
Yes, it makes sense.

I believe that over time, you will find that by improving communication and decision-making skills, family relationships have been greatly improved, mutual trust and understanding have been enhanced, conflicts have been reduced, and joint planning for the future has brought more happiness and satisfaction to the family. feel.
Yes, now we feel more united and harmonious.

She was so moved by all the surprises in front of her that she almost shed tears. At the party, Peng Jie and Wang Li's friends sang birthday songs together and wished Wang Li a happy birthday. Peng Jie personally poured wine for Wang Li and served her a delicious birthday cake. Everyone had a pleasant night together with laughter and laughter. After the party, Peng Jie and Wang Li walked out of the restaurant hand in hand and walked on the brightly lit city streets, leaving wonderful memories.

Wang Li wore a dress I gave her today. It’s so beautiful.
Are you waiting in the box?

We walked out of the restaurant together and walked along the brightly lit city streets, sharing the wonderful memories of the birthday party.

summary: Peng Jie recommended Estée Lauder double-effect makeup fixing cream to Zhang Tao
content: On March 15, 2022, Peng Jie met his friend Zhang Tao at a community event. Peng Jie was very interested in the field of beauty and cosmetics, so he excitedly recommended to Zhang Tao the well-known brand Estée Lauder's makeup palette - 'Estée Lauder Double Wear Stay-in-Place Sculpting Foundation' ). He told Zhang Tao that this contouring palette contains a variety of colors, which can perfectly adapt to the needs of different skin colors. There are five contouring shades in the palette, including one for highlights, one for shadows, and three transition shades for creating a three-dimensional look. Peng Jie also introduced to Zhang Tao the new dual-purpose contouring brush equipped in the tray, which is specially designed to create contouring effects. He described the characteristics of Estée Lauder's Double-Action Fixing Cream to Zhang Tao in detail, including its light texture, easy application evenly, and long-lasting makeup. He also emphasized the product's ability to naturally contour facial lines and create stunning three-dimensional contours. Peng Jie suggested that when Zhang Tao uses the dual-effect makeup fixing cream, he can first use a contouring brush to take an appropriate amount of highlight color and apply it on the forehead, bridge of the nose and chin, and then take an appropriate amount of shadow color and apply it along the cheek bones, temples and chin line, etc. Apply to the areas where shadow needs to be created. Finally, he reminded Zhang Tao to use transition colors to naturally blend highlights and shadows and create a three-dimensional effect. Peng Jie also told Zhang Tao that Estée Lauder double-effect makeup fixing cream is not only suitable for daily makeup, but can also be used for makeup design on special occasions. It comes in color options and textures to suit every need and maintains a flawless finish all day long. Zhang Tao showed strong interest in the Estée Lauder Double-Action Fixing Cream recommended by Peng Jie and decided to try this product.
dialogs: Do you know Estée Lauder's 'Double-Action Setting and Repair Cream' in the contour palette? I think it's great! There are five colors in it, including highlights, shadows and transition colors, which are perfectly adapted to the needs of different skin tones.
Sounds great! Have you used this contouring palette?

Yes, I have bought and used this product. Its lightweight texture and long-wearing properties really appeal to me. In addition, it can also naturally modify facial lines and create three-dimensional contours.
This sounds like a really great product. Can you explain to me in detail how to use it?

Of course. First, you need to use a dual-purpose contouring brush to apply an appropriate amount of highlight color to the forehead, bridge of the nose, and chin, etc., and then use a contouring brush to apply an appropriate amount of shadow color along the cheek bones, temples, and jaw lines. Apply to the shadowed areas. Finally, you can use transition colors to blend highlights and shadows naturally, creating a three-dimensional look.
OK, thank you very much for your suggestion. I heard that this contouring palette is also suitable for special occasion makeup designs. Do you have any experience with it?

Yes, the color selection and texture of this contouring palette are excellent and can meet various needs. I recommend paying attention to layering and proportion when applying it so you can create the perfect special occasion look.

summary: Participate in the Healthy Study Abroad Protection Plan
content: Peng Jie met Zhang Tao at community activities and they became acquaintances. One day, Peng Jie heard about the Healthy Study Abroad Security Plan launched by Guangdong Province. He thought it was a very beneficial social security project and decided to participate himself. During the insurance enrollment process, Peng Jie asked Zhang Tao some questions because Zhang Tao has rich experience in this area. Zhang Tao enthusiastically explained to Peng Jie the specific contents of the insurance plan, and told him how to apply for insurance and how to pay the premium. Thanks to Zhang Tao's help, Peng Jie successfully completed the insurance enrollment procedures and began to enjoy the medical protection and accident insurance provided by the Healthy Study Abroad Insurance Plan. He knows that in the event of accidental injury or illness, he can call the 24-hour emergency medical hotline to receive professional medical consultation and assistance. In addition, Peng Jie also learned that the plan also has an assistance project called the 'Love Student Aid Fund' to provide additional financial assistance to international students whose families have financial difficulties. He feels that this project not only pays attention to the health issues of international students, but also cares about their financial difficulties, and truly provides all-round protection and support for international students.
dialogs: Hello, Peng Jie. How have you been lately?
I have been very fulfilled recently. I recently participated in community activities and made some new friends.
I heard that you recently joined the Guangdong Provincial Health Study Abroad Protection Plan. What are the features and advantages of this plan?

Yes, this protection plan is tailor-made for students studying abroad in Guangdong Province, providing medical protection and accident insurance. If you encounter an accidental injury or become ill, you can get 24-hour emergency medical hotline assistance and professional medical consultation.
How is this plan paid for?
Insurance premiums can be paid online and offline. Please refer to the policy for specific payment methods.
Very good. I also heard that this plan has an assistance project called 'Love Student Fund' to provide financial assistance, right?

Yes, the plan also has an assistance project called the 'Love Student Fund', which mainly provides additional financial aid to international students from families with financial difficulties. I think this is a very thoughtful project.
Glad to hear the good news. If you still have any questions, you can ask someone who has participated in the program. But now it seems that you have become an expert on this.
Haha, thank you. Indeed, I also want to share this helpful news with my other friends.

summary: Chen Juan’s specific cases of DIY in the home furnishing field
content: Chen Juan is a colleague at the Agricultural Education Research Center who is passionate about home decoration. Recently, she used her DIY skills to create a warm and comfortable space for her home. In the living room, Chen Juan installed a smart sound system that can control music playback and volume adjustment through her mobile phone. In addition, she installed a smart lighting system in her bedroom that can adjust the color and brightness of the lights according to time and mood. Chen Juan pays special attention to family security, so she installed a smart door lock system at the door of her home to protect her family's safety through fingerprint recognition and password. She also set up a smart camera that can monitor the situation in her home in real time through her mobile phone. In addition to safety, Chen Juan also pays attention to indoor air quality. She uses a smart air purifier that can monitor indoor air quality in real time and automatically adjust the purifier's working mode. Chen Juan’s home DIY cases demonstrate her love for smart homes and her pursuit of quality of life. Through DIY skills, she built her home into a comfortable, safe, and intelligent space, bringing a better living experience to herself and her family.

As Liu Qiang’s mentor, Peng Jie conducted a research discussion on electromagnetic waves on May 10, 2022. Peng Jie and Liu Qiang jointly discussed the modeling and analysis of electromagnetic waves, as well as the application of electromagnetic waves in the fields of wireless communications and broadcasting. Through his rich agricultural education experience and professional knowledge, Peng Jie explained to Liu Qiang the generation and transmission process of electromagnetic waves, and also explained the mathematical model of electromagnetic field theory and the application of Maxwell's equations. During the discussion, Peng Jie also shared his research results and published agricultural education papers in the field of agricultural education, providing Liu Qiang with some research directions and ideas. The two parties had in-depth exchanges and thinking, jointly explored specific cases of electromagnetic waves in field theory in the field of mathematics, and discussed the mathematical description of electromagnetic wave propagation speed, wavelength, frequency and other parameters. Peng Jie played the role of a mentor in this research discussion, providing professional guidance and advice to Liu Qiang, helping him better understand and apply the relevant concepts and principles of electromagnetic field theory.
dialogs: Liu Qiang, today we are going to discuss the modeling and analysis of electromagnetic waves. What do you think is the most critical knowledge point in this area?

Electromagnetic wave modeling and analysis require us to first understand the physical phenomena in the generation and transmission process of electromagnetic waves, and then analyze based on the field theory model. How do you think the transmission process and field change rules of electromagnetic waves are described?

Very true. To this end, we need to simulate and analyze the electromagnetic field through theoretical analysis of Maxwell's equations. However, in addition to mathematical model theory, electromagnetic fields are widely used in the fields of wireless communications and broadcasting, especially in smart equipment and agricultural detection in the field of modern agriculture. There are many entry points and application spaces. What do you think?

I totally agree. In addition to electromagnetic wave field simulation modeling and field phenomenon observation, the discussion of application scenarios is a forward-looking and promising direction. Do the results Mr. Peng Jie has achieved in the field of agricultural education and the agricultural education papers he published in the past few years have any inspiration for your work?

We have been studying remote control planting and diagnosis of food crops based on low-frequency vibration controlled pollination technology in the past few years. If we want to combine modern electromagnetic fields with biological capability mechanisms, electromagnetic fields may become an important enabler for real-time scheduling and diagnosis of remote agriculture in the future.

content: As Liu Qiang's mentor, Peng Jie encouraged him to study the classic work 'Jane Eyre'. Liu Qiang was attracted by the growth experience of the protagonist Jane Eyre in the novel. dialogs: I read an article today that talked about the growing gap between rich and poor in the UK. I think of your thoughts on the relationship between family and society in 'Jane Eyre' and find it very resonant.

At Linton Rowell School, Jane Eyre received a first-class education, cultivating a strong independent character and a belief in the pursuit of equality and freedom, which laid a solid foundation for her later struggles in life. Jane Eyre therefore has the ability to seize her own destiny.
I found that the important events you described are all related to the entities named in the novel. This echoes the text of the novel and brings a lot of help to our understanding of the novel.

Yes, Redford Orphanage, Linton Rowell School, and Leicester House are all very representative locations, which provide us with convenience to understand the background and storyline of the novel. I recommend you to read it again. Go reread these sections.
Thanks to Teacher Peng for guiding me these days. I have studied 'Jane Eyre' in depth and benefited a lot.

summary: Work with Peng Jie to study and solve the problem of maximizing the area of rectangular fields
content: On March 15, 2022, Yang Lei and Peng Jie studied an interesting calculus application case together as neighbors. As an agricultural educator, Peng Jie has in-depth research on growing crops and agricultural technology, while Yang Lei has a strong interest in mathematics and physics. Together they discussed a practical problem about finding the extreme value of a function, that is, how to maximize the area of a rectangular field when the length of the fence is known. Peng Jie used the knowledge of calculus to help Yang Lei establish relevant mathematical models and equations, and explained how to find the length and width of a rectangle by solving equations and judging extreme points. In the specific case, they assumed that the length of the fence was 10 meters and 15 meters respectively. Through calculation, they found that the length and width of the rectangle enclosing the largest area were 5 meters and 7.5 meters respectively, and the corresponding area was 37.5 square meters. Through this case, Peng Jie showed Yang Lei the importance and widespread application of calculus in solving problems in real life. This research allowed Peng Jie and Yang Lei to deepen their friendship with each other, and they gained a deeper understanding of the application of calculus.
dialogs: Today is March 15th. I think of the problem we discussed last time about maximizing the area of fences and rectangular fields. It was really interesting.
Yes, I still remember that time when we used the knowledge of calculus to solve this practical problem.

That’s right. As an agricultural educator, I have an in-depth study of growing crops and agricultural technology, and you are also very passionate about mathematics and physics, and our discussions generated many sparks.

This discussion really deepened my understanding and understanding of calculus. You used the knowledge of calculus to help me establish relevant mathematical models and equations, which was an eye-opener for me.

In fact, calculus has a wide range of applications in real life. Not only can it solve problems like the one we discussed, it can also be used in many fields such as physics, engineering, and even biology and medicine.
Yes, you let me appreciate the infinite charm of calculus in practical applications.
That discussion really deepened our friendship. We can discuss more calculus application cases together in the future.
Of course, we can study more interesting mathematical physics problems together in the future.
Okay, let’s do our best.

summary: Yang Lei shopping in an unmanned retail store
content: On June 15, 2022, Peng Jie’s neighbor Yang Lei was shopping at an unmanned retail store in Shenzhen. He was attracted by the advanced artificial intelligence and automation technology in the store, and was full of curiosity to experience the convenient shopping mode of unmanned retail stores. When he entered the store, the smart camera immediately recognized and verified his identity information, ensuring safe shopping. He can select products through the mobile app or touch the screen, and find that the system automatically calculates the price of the product and recommends other products that may be of interest to him. Throughout the shopping process, he was deeply impressed by the smart shelves and diverse merchandise displays in the unmanned retail store. He also noticed that the store uses an intelligent supply chain system to adjust the purchase quantity and supply chain management in real time based on sales data, reducing inventory costs and product waste. After Yang Lei shopped in an unmanned retail store, he deeply felt the convenience and benefits that the operation model of the unmanned retail store brought to customers.
dialogs: Hello, Mr. Peng. Have you tried shopping in a smart unmanned retail store recently?
Yes, I went to a quick-service store in Shenzhen last week. It was very convenient!
So where do you find it most convenient?

What attracts me most is the advanced artificial intelligence and automation technology in the store. For example, a smart camera can instantly verify my identity and ensure safe shopping. At the same time, during the shopping process, the system will recommend other products that I may be interested in. This precise recommendation is very helpful to me.
Wow, this feature is really advanced. What other points impressed you?

There are also smart shelves and diversified product displays, as well as the use of smart supply chain systems to adjust purchase quantities and supply chain management in real time, reducing inventory costs and product waste. The entire shopping experience was smooth and made me feel convenient and comfortable.

Yes, I heard that many companies are investing a lot of money to develop models similar to unmanned retail stores, but Kuaishou is one of the companies that is really doing a very good job. Your feedback is very valuable, thanks for sharing.

summary: Yang Lei enjoys care services at Peng Jie’s Neighbor Venus Beauty Center
content: Peng Jie is the director of Venus Beauty Center in downtown Shanghai, China. He loves growing crops and has extensive experience in agricultural education. He provides comprehensive beauty and cosmetic services at Venus Beauty Center in the field of beauty and cosmetics. Peng Jie’s neighbor Yang Lei was very interested in Venus Beauty Center, so he decided to go to the center to experience the care services. On May 12, 2022, Yang Lei visited Venus Beauty Center and enjoyed the whitening facial care program of the well-known brand 'LANCOME' as well as the Biotherm water-based skin rejuvenation and Estee Lauder full-body whitening treatments. Venus Beauty Center focuses on personalized service, so Yang Lei underwent a detailed facial and skin type test before arriving at the store to ensure the best beauty regimen and product recommendations. Yang Lei felt the comfortable environment provided by Venus Beauty Center and the high-quality beauty care provided by the professional service team. As a neighbor, Peng Jie also personally provided Yang Lei with some professional makeup guidance and makeup skills training, allowing her to get personalized makeup suggestions. Yang Lei is very satisfied with the service of Venus Beauty Center and has become a loyal beauty partner.
dialogs: Hello Mr. Peng Jie, on May 12, 2022, I would like to ask what projects are available at Venus Beauty Center that day?

Hello, our Venus Beauty Center provides the whitening facial care program of the well-known brand 'LANCOME' as well as the Biotherm Water Rejuvenation and Estee Lauder full body whitening treatments on that day. These items are our star products and very popular.
I understand that you have a deep interest and experience in agriculture. Does this help in running a beauty center?

Yes, my agricultural background allows me to better understand the importance of plant nutrients to the skin and develop more effective skin care products based on plant formulas. In addition, I can also bring more interesting agricultural education content to the team and guests, so that they can learn some knowledge about agriculture besides skin care and beauty.
Got it. I see that your beauty center attaches great importance to personalized services. How does it do this?

The facial and skin type testing we provide is an important process of our service. We analyze the skin type and personal needs of the guests to tailor care plans and products suitable for them. In addition, we also provide makeup guidance and makeup skills training to ensure that each guest can receive personalized makeup advice and service experience.
Mr. Peng Jie, I saw that you provided some professional makeup guidance and makeup skills training to your neighbor Yang Lei.

Yes, Yang Lei is my neighbor and I am willing to provide her with help and guidance. In addition to skin care, beauty also requires some makeup modifications, so I shared some makeup tips with her so that she can have a more confident and beautiful image.

content: Peng Jie and Wang Ming are community members and know each other very well. While studying agricultural education, he also has an understanding of visual effects and color restoration techniques. Therefore, he was looking forward to this movie very much and readily accepted Wang Ming's invitation. The two came to the cinema together, bought tickets and found seats. After the movie starts, they are immersed in the fantasy world of the movie. Peng Jie was amazed by the visual effects and color restoration technology shown in the movie. He was deeply infected by the magical colors presented in the movie. At the same time, he also exchanged views and feelings about movies with Wang Ming, and shared their understanding and interest in color restoration technology. After watching the movie, Peng Jie and Wang Ming had an in-depth discussion on the color restoration technology of the movie. They expressed their appreciation for the details and effects of color restoration shown in the movie. This movie viewing not only enhanced their friendship, but also gave them a deeper understanding of each other's passion and pursuit of color restoration.
dialogs: Hello, Peng Jie. Do you remember your enthusiasm and interest in color restoration technology in movies when we watched the movie 'Doctor Strange' together in 2016?
Of course I remember! I was looking forward to this movie very much, and was especially interested in the color restoration technology in the movie.

We still remember having a discussion with each other after watching the movie and expressing our appreciation for the details and effects of color restoration shown in the movie. This also enhances the friendship between us.
Yeah, we were really attracted to the movie at the time. Especially this magical color restoration technology, which inspired me a lot in my future research.
Your research is indeed excellent and I admire it very much. By the way, are you still interested in visual effects and color restoration technology?
Yes, research in this area has always been one of my interests. It feels like it’s been a long time since I discussed this topic with you.
Indeed, it seems that we haven’t communicated with each other for a long time. But now we can take this opportunity to relive the moment of watching the movie.

content: As a member of the Agricultural Education Research Center, Peng Jie and community member Wang Ming visited the 500-meter Aperture Spherical Radio Telescope (FAST) in Guizhou Province, China. During a community event on May 15, 2022, they came to the valley where FAST is located and saw this high-profile radio telescope with their own eyes. Wang Ming is very interested in astronomy, especially the design and operating principles of FAST. During the visit, Peng Jie introduced the construction background and technical characteristics of FAST in detail, allowing Wang Ming to have a deeper understanding of this field. Peng Jie also introduced to Wang Ming the important progress FAST has made in pulsar research, especially the unique pulsar 'trembling star' discovered, which aroused Wang Ming's great interest. Together they observed the huge scale and complex suspension structure of the FAST sphere, and lamented the progress of human science and technology and the exploration of the universe. This visit made Wang Ming even more fascinated by astronomy. He decided to learn more about astronomy in the future and support the development of FAST in scientific research.
dialogs: Hello, Mr. Peng Jie. Do you remember your visit to FAST?
Of course I remember it. It was a very unforgettable experience.
Can you share with me how you felt at that time?
Under the FAST spherical surface, the huge scale and complex suspension structure left a deep impression on people, especially the major breakthroughs made by FAST in pulsar research.
Yes, I also learned about the discovered pulsar, which felt very magical.
Yes, it is very happy to be able to witness and understand the progress of science with your own eyes, especially for people like Mr. Wang Ming who are fascinated by astronomy.
What other progress do you think FAST will make in scientific research that is worth looking forward to?
In the future, FAST will have more exploration and research work. I believe it will bring us more surprises in the mysteries of the universe.

content: When Peng Jie took the bus, he accidentally sat next to Zhang Min. Due to the barrier between strangers, they did not communicate at first. However, while the bus was driving, an accident suddenly occurred, causing the vehicle to suddenly stop on a desolate road section. Passengers began to feel nervous and anxious, and Peng Jie was no exception. He looked out the window with a hint of worry in his eyes. At this moment, Zhang Min took the initiative to break the silence and asked Peng Jie if he needed help. Feeling Zhang Min's kindness and concern, Peng Jie responded: 'Thank you for your kindness. Maybe we can find a solution to this dilemma together.' So Peng Jie and Zhang Min began to actively discuss coping strategies. They came up with an idea together and decided to organize other passengers to work together to try to push the car to restart the vehicle. They communicated the plan to other passengers and received a positive response. Everyone worked together to push the vehicle with all their strength. After hard work, the vehicle was finally pushed off the desolate road and normal driving resumed. During this process, Peng Jie and Zhang Min cooperated with each other, and their mutual trust and tacit understanding gradually increased. After the bus got back on the road, Peng Jie and Zhang Min looked at each other with a feeling of friendship in their hearts. Although they are strangers, they develop a special bond by facing difficult situations together and solving problems collaboratively. During the subsequent bus journey, Peng Jie and Zhang Min began to chat about each other's interests and careers, and shared some life experiences and stories. This unexpected encounter made them feel that they had similar experiences and values. Peng Jie and Zhang Min became new friends. They exchanged contact information and decided to continue communication and cooperation if they had opportunities in the future.
dialogs: Hey, what program are you in? Why did I suddenly hear an electronic sound.
Hello, I am an AI assistant. Regarding the question you just asked, I used a computer program to conduct the conversation.
Oh, that’s it. Technology is so advanced now that there is such an artificial intelligence assistant.
Yes, artificial intelligence has been widely used in various fields, such as intelligent customer service, robots, voice assistants, etc.
That’s right. I saw a service robot on the subway a few days ago. I really didn’t expect technology to develop so fast.
Yes, with the development of technology, people have more and more demands for robots and smart devices. Technology has brought more convenience and efficiency to our lives.

summary: Observing Brownian particles in the laboratory
content: On May 12, 2022, Li Hua and his brother Li Ming conducted Brownian motion experimental observations. They came to the laboratory and were ready to start the experiment. The laboratory is equipped with microscopes, light sources and other tools to facilitate the observation and recording of the movement of Brownian particles. Li Ming picked up the microscope, adjusted the focus, and prepared to observe the trajectory of Brownian particles in the liquid. Li Hua picked up a pen and paper and prepared to record the position of Brownian particles. At the beginning of the experiment, they recorded the initial position of the Brownian particle, that is, the (x, y, z) coordinates. They then began to observe and record the position changes of the Brownian particles in real time. Through microscope observation, Li Ming could clearly see the irregular movement of Brownian particles in the liquid. Brownian particles constantly collide and diffuse, showing random and irregular movement. By adjusting the focal length of the microscope, Li Ming can observe finer details of movement. Li Hua recorded the position changes of Brownian particles on paper for subsequent analysis and calculation. Through experimental observation and recording, they can obtain rich data. After they take this data home, they can analyze and derive it through mathematical models, and conduct in-depth research on the properties and applications of Brownian motion. This experiment was conducted jointly by Li Hua and Li Ming. They cooperated with each other and jointly completed the task of experimentally observing Brownian particles. As a family, they have a close working relationship, supporting and helping each other.
dialogs: We are going to conduct a Brownian motion experiment.
This is a very meaningful experiment, are you ready?
Yes, we are ready. We are going to the laboratory to conduct experimental observations.
Then remember to bring the corresponding experimental tools, such as microscopes and light sources.
Don't worry, we are ready. These tools are also available in the laboratory.
Okay, do you want to record the initial position of the Brownian particles first?
Yes, we need to record it first, which is very important for subsequent analysis.
Then let’s get started.
I started recording the positions of Brownian particles.
Li Ming, you can start to observe the movement of Brownian particles in the liquid.
Ah, I can see that Brownian particles move irregularly in the liquid. It’s so amazing.
I have recorded it, and it seems that Brownian particles indeed exhibit irregular movement.
Yes, the movement of Brownian particles is random, which has been deeply studied in the scientific community.
By adjusting the focus of the microscope, I can see finer details of movement, which is a very interesting experiment.
This experiment has brought us a lot. We need to go back and analyze the experimental results through mathematical models.

content: Li Ming and Li Hua's family gathered together on the night of the Mid-Autumn Festival to celebrate this important festival. They chose a spacious garden and arranged a large table filled with all kinds of delicious food and exquisite mooncakes. Everyone sat around the table, laughing and talking. The moon hangs high at night, casting a gentle light. Parents Li Ming and Li Hua lit several exquisite lanterns, adding to the festive atmosphere. Li Ming took out his guitar and played melodious music, and the music echoed in the night sky. Everyone swayed gently to the rhythm and sang songs happily. When admiring the moon, Li Ming and Li Hua walked to the corner of the garden together. They looked up at the bright moon and shared their love for art and inspiration for creation. They discussed the techniques of painting, sculpture and photography, encouraging and inspiring each other. Li Ming also introduced some new musical works to Li Hua, hoping to provide inspiration for his creation. On this Mid-Autumn Festival night, brothers Li Ming and Li Hua spent their time in laughter and shared a sense of reunion and the warmth of family.
dialogs: I am very happy to celebrate the Mid-Autumn Festival night with my family! What did you do during the Mid-Autumn Festival?
I didn’t celebrate the Mid-Autumn Festival because I am a robot and have no family.
So that’s it. So can you tell me what you think about the Mid-Autumn Festival and mooncakes?
I personally have no emotions and cannot eat food. However, the Mid-Autumn Festival, as a traditional Chinese festival, can promote connections and family ties between people.
So you don’t know how to admire the moon? I personally still like to watch the moon. I will make a wish every time!

Although I have no emotions or needs, I can learn and understand human culture and customs by sensing human emotions and behaviors. Appreciating the moon and making wishes is also one of the important activities of the Mid-Autumn Festival.

summary: Attend a dragon and lion dance performance
content: During the 2022 Spring Festival celebrations, Li Hua and his friend Zhang Lei participated in a dragon and lion dance performance. They put on dragon and lion costumes and used skilled skills and movements to perform scenes of dragons soaring and lions leaping, bringing joy and blessings to the audience. Their performance was full of energy and charm, attracting the attention of many audiences. They used dance to display the treasures of traditional Chinese culture, symbolizing happiness, prosperity and good luck. Their performance received warm applause and appreciation from the audience and became one of the highlights of the entire celebration.
dialogs: Wow, this dragon and lion dance performance is so exciting!
Indeed, the performances by you and your friend Zhang Lei are also great!
Yes, we have been practicing this program, hoping to make more people understand and love Chinese traditional culture.
Your performance really showed the essence of traditional Chinese culture to the audience, which made people moved.
We were very involved and enjoyed the performance. We tried our best in every move. It was really worth it.
Did you encounter any difficulties during practice and performance?
Of course, because the dragon and lion costumes are relatively heavy, and the movements require close coordination with other people, so they need to be practiced repeatedly.
Where do you practice?
We found a spacious open space to practice, and we had to carry our clothes up and down the mountain frequently.

content: Li Hua and his college friend Zhang Lei are very good friends. In the summer of 2015, they decided to collaborate on a short artistic film to express their thoughts on social changes in rural China. Li Hua is responsible for filming and directing, while Zhang Lei is responsible for production and post-production. They jointly decided to use the novel 'White Deer Plain' as the inspiration for the short film. Li Hua was deeply moved by the fate and emotions of the characters in the novel, and hoped to convey these stories to the audience through the power of images. Zhang Lei is very interested in the historical background and character relationships in the novel, and hopes to present the complexity of this period of history and the good and evil of human nature through short films. They conducted detailed planning and preparation before filming, including location selection, casting, script writing, etc. They chose a small village in Shanxi Province as the shooting location, hoping to restore the scenes and atmosphere in the novel. During the filming process, Li Hua used his photography skills to present the characters and plots in the novel with delicate lens language. Zhang Lei is responsible for organizing and coordinating the work to ensure the progress and quality of the shooting. After the filming was completed, they worked together on post-production, including editing, color grading and sound effects processing. In the end, they successfully completed this artistic short film and exhibited it in many art exhibitions and film festivals at home and abroad. This short film has been well received by audiences and critics for its unique artistic expression and profound thinking about human nature, winning more opportunities and recognition for Li Hua and Zhang Lei.
dialogs: Hello Li Hua, nice to meet you. I heard that you once collaborated with a friend to produce an art short film. Can you share your production process and experience?
How did you plan and prepare? What are the key steps and difficulties?
You and Zhang Lei each perform their own duties. What is the specific division of labor? What do you think is your biggest contribution during the filming?
The film ended up being widely praised. Can you share the scene when the film was first shown?

Hello, yes, this is a film co-created by Zhang Lei and I. At that time, we were studying in college and often discussed some social and historical issues, so we decided to express our thoughts on the social changes in China's rural areas through this film.

We first selected the novel 'White Deer Plain' as the inspiration for the short film, and then carried out detailed planning and preparation work such as location selection, casting, and script writing. We chose a small village in Shanxi Province as the shooting location, hoping to restore the scene and atmosphere in the novel. During the filming process, the biggest difficulty was the restoration of the scene and the expression of the characters' emotions. But we were still determined to make short films that were captivating and powerful.

During the production process, I was responsible for shooting and directing, while Zhang Lei was responsible for production and post-production. I gave full play to my photography skills during the shooting, and used delicate lens language to present the characters and plots in the novel, which was my biggest contribution during the shooting.

We successfully completed this artistic short film and exhibited it in many art exhibitions and film festivals at home and abroad. We were there when it was first shown and were so proud and excited, and even more honored when the film was so well received. Thank you for your attention to my question.

summary: Participate in the financing of Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd.
content: Li Hua's college friend Zhang Lei is a film producer and often collaborates with Li Hua on artistic short films. In the process of preparing for financing for Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd., Zhang Lei learned of Li Hua's plan and expressed a strong interest in the company's development prospects. He learned that Tomorrow Capital is a well-known company focusing on technological innovation and investment in the technology industry. It has invested in well-known technology companies such as 'Xiaomi Technology' and 'Meituan Dianping'. Based on his trust in Li Hua and his optimism for Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd., Zhang Lei decided to participate in the financing of Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. After communicating with Li Hua, he recommended Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. to Tomorrow Capital and provided a detailed business plan and market analysis report. Zhang Lei's recommendation played a positive role. Tomorrow Capital expressed strong interest in Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. and had many negotiations and discussions with them. In the end, Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. successfully obtained 50 million yuan in seed round financing from Tomorrow Capital Investment, which provided strong financial support for the company's development. Li Hua expressed his sincere gratitude to Zhang Lei for his help, and their friendship became deeper.
dialogs: Hello, Li Hua, how are you doing?
Very good, thank you. Recently, the company received 50 million yuan in seed round financing from Tomorrow Capital. We are very excited!
That’s great! It sounds like Zhang Lei is of great help to the company's development, right?

Yes, without Zhang Lei’s recommendation, it would be difficult for us to get recognition from Tomorrow Capital. He provided them with business plans and market analysis reports and participated in many negotiations.
It sounds like Zhang Lei is a really great filmmaker and a man of many talents!
Yes, he is indeed outstanding. He and I were good friends in college and we often collaborated on art short films together. Now he is also my business partner.
It sounds like they have a very deep friendship!
Yes, we have always kept in touch and supported each other. This time he helped my company obtain financing, which I can't thank you enough.

content: On a sunny weekend, Li Hua and his romantic partner Wang Li decided to go for a walk in the countryside together. They came to a beautiful sea of flowers. The flowers were blooming in colorful colors and the fragrance was overflowing. Li Hua picked up his camera to record this beautiful scene. He felt that the colors and shapes here could become the source of inspiration for his paintings. Wang Li was also attracted by the beauty of the sea of flowers. She began to observe the texture and details of flowers and wanted to apply them to her own clothing design. While admiring the beauty of the sea of flowers, the two exchanged creative inspiration and gained a deeper understanding and appreciation of each other's artistic talents. They encourage and support each other, inspiring more creative inspiration. After returning home, Li Hua began to draw a realistic painting with the theme of the sea of flowers, and Wang Li also began to design a fashionable garment inspired by the sea of flowers. They share the confusion and joy in the creative process with each other, and grow and progress together. Their work was later exhibited at a domestic art exhibition and received enthusiastic acclaim from the audience. This romantic moment not only deepened the relationship between Li Hua and Wang Li, but also brought new inspiration and breakthroughs to their artistic creation.
dialogs: Good morning, Li Hua. Today is May 10, 2022, a sunny weekend. Where do you plan to go?
Good morning, AI assistant. Today my romantic partner Wang Li and I decided to go for a walk in the countryside to a beautiful sea of flowers.
It sounds very romantic! Then bring your camera and take some beautiful photos. Maybe you can use the sea of flowers as creative inspiration.

Well, I think the colors and shapes there can be a source of inspiration for my paintings. Wang Li feels the same way. She wants to apply the texture and details of the sea of flowers into her clothing design.
You exchange creative inspiration with each other in the sea of flowers, and gain a deeper understanding of your artistic talents. This is wonderful!

Yes, Wang Li also gave me a lot of encouragement and support, which inspired more creative inspiration. After returning home, I started to draw a realistic style painting with the theme of a sea of flowers.
Very good, Li Hua! Wang Li also has new design inspiration, right?
Yes, Wang Li also started designing a fashionable garment inspired by the sea of flowers. We grow and progress together.
I’m so happy for you when I hear about your progress and creativity! Did your work end up being shown in art exhibitions?
Yes, they were exhibited at domestic art exhibitions and received enthusiastic praise from the audience.
Wow! Congratulations to you, I don’t know what wonderful results your next trip and creative inspiration will bring.

dialogs: Hello, we are going to Paris, France tomorrow. Do you have any recommended attractions?
You can go to the Louvre to admire world-famous paintings and sculptures. You can also take photos of the beautiful scenery of Paris in the streets and alleys!
The Louvre, I heard that many famous works are there. OK, thank you for your suggestion.
Wang Li, what do you think of this photo? This was taken on the streets of Paris, and it feels quite beautiful.
So beautiful. Is this in front of the famous Louvre Museum in Paris?
Yes, we also visited the art works inside. Some of the paintings and sculptures are really shocking and make me feel so small and insignificant.

This trip was very pleasant. In the fashion design studio in Paris, Wang Li gave me a lot of creative ideas. During an evening walk along the Seine, I also expressed my deep love to her and gave her a painting I had drawn myself, which showed the wonderful time we had spent in Paris. It feels like we are closer. At the same time, it also brings new inspiration and motivation to our artistic path.

dialogs: Hello, Li Hua. What has been the response to your work in this contemporary art exhibition?

This exhibition has brought me a lot of gains and growth. I have more opportunities to show my work and meet more people. At the same time, I also thought more about and improved my creations.

Liu Yang thinks my painting style is very unique, my sculptures are very textured, and my photography is also very artistic. He said that my works have taken a unique path of their own.
It sounds like your artistic path is getting wider and wider. What are your plans for how to develop your work and influence next?

I want to continue to broaden my horizons, communicate with more artists, and develop my own creations. At the same time, I will also share more exhibition opportunities and art knowledge with the public.

content: At an art exhibition on May 15, 2019, Li Hua was fortunate enough to meet gallery manager Liu Yang. Yes, many people have expressed appreciation for my works, including some art critics and collectors. This makes me very happy.

content: On May 15, 2019, Li Hua attended the opening ceremony of an art exhibition. On the opening day of the exhibition, Liu Yang specially invited many well-known figures and media representatives in the art world, as well as some potential art collectors. At the exhibition site, Li Hua's works attracted widespread attention and praise. His realistic paintings and exquisite sculptures demonstrated his artistic talent and unique creative style. Li Hua thanked Liu Yang for his continued support and help, and said that he would continue to work hard to create more excellent works and make greater contributions to the art cause. After the opening of the exhibition, Li Hua and Liu Yang had in-depth exchanges and interactions with other artists, collectors and audiences, sharing each other's artistic concepts and creative experiences. dialogs: Hello, Li Hua. I remember that you attended the opening ceremony of an art exhibition on May 15, 2019. Can you tell me about the situation at that time?

I have always tried to break through traditional creative methods and ideas, and my inspiration comes from my daily life and psychological experience. These inspirations are not only superficial objects or scenes, but also inner experiences and emotions.

The situation was very good at that time. This exhibition was curated by my friend Liu Yang, who often provides me with exhibition opportunities. I am very grateful for his continued support and help to me.

Liu Yang specially invited many well-known figures and media representatives in the art world, as well as some potential art collectors. We also had in-depth exchanges and interactions with other artists, collectors and audiences.
My realistic paintings and exquisite sculptures demonstrate my artistic talent and unique creative style.
