content: At an art exhibition in 2010, Li Hua's art mentor Yang Ming introduced him to a case of humanistic and social significance, the Nanjing Massacre. Yang Ming introduced the historical background and crimes of the Nanjing Massacre in detail, and showed Li Hua some related pictures and cultural relics. He explained that the Nanjing Massacre was a series of large-scale atrocities and massacres carried out by Japanese invaders in Nanjing, China during World War II, which caused great harm to the Chinese people. Yang Ming emphasized that as an artist, Li Hua has the responsibility to convey the memory and warning of this tragedy through his artistic works. He encouraged Li Hua to express his thoughts and concerns about the Nanjing Massacre through various forms such as painting, sculpture and photography, so as to arouse the audience's resonance and reflection. Yang Ming hopes that Li Hua can speak for the victims of the Nanjing Massacre and convey the important values of peace and human rights through his artistic works.
dialogs: Hello, Li Hua. Do you remember the Nanjing Massacre that our art instructor Yang Ming introduced to you ten years ago?

Of course I remember. Yang Ming told me about the historical background and crimes of the Nanjing Massacre, and showed some related pictures and cultural relics. That art exhibition left a deep impression on me and made me more deeply aware of the huge harm caused by the Japanese invaders to the Chinese people.

Instructor Yang Ming emphasized that as an artist, you have the responsibility to convey the memory and warning of the Nanjing Massacre through your artistic works, so as to arouse resonance and reflection from the audience. Did you later express your thoughts and concerns about the Nanjing Massacre through your works?

Yes, Yang Ming’s teachings made me realize that as an artist, I should convey important values through my works. Later, I continued to think and explore, and expressed my thoughts and reflections on the Nanjing Massacre in my paintings and photography, trying to speak for the victims.

This sounds really nice. Art must not only have aesthetic value, but also have humanistic and social significance. I hope your work can convey the important values of peace and human rights, inspire emotional resonance in the audience, and remind people to cherish the current peace and friendly relations.

summary: Painting techniques and art theory guidance
content: On May 15, 2015, Li Hua's art instructor Yang Ming provided him with guidance on painting techniques and art theory. This instruction took place in Li Hua's studio, which is located in an art district in the center of Beijing. Yang Ming admired Li Hua's painting talent and artistic potential very much, so he decided to mentor him personally. In this guidance, Yang Ming shared his many years of artistic experience and unique creative concepts. He made detailed comments and guidance on Li Hua's painting techniques, and provided some suggestions on painting materials and techniques. Yang Ming also introduced some important theories and concepts of contemporary art to Li Hua, helping him broaden his artistic horizons. This guidance played an important role in promoting Li Hua's artistic development and inspired him more creative inspiration and innovative thinking. Yang Ming and Li Hua established a deep teacher-student relationship. They often kept in touch and exchanged ideas and experiences in artistic creation. Yang Ming's guidance had a positive impact on Li Hua's artistic career, helping him achieve greater breakthroughs and achievements in the fields of painting, sculpture and photography.
dialogs: Hello Li Hua, we haven’t contacted you for a long time. Are you continuing to work hard on painting and photography recently?
Hello! Yeah, I keep creating and experimenting. Recently I have also created a series of oil paintings about urban life and social issues, which have received some good reviews.
Great to hear about your creative progress! Remember that your mentor Yang Ming once gave you guidance in 2015. Now think about what advice he provided on painting techniques and art theory?

The guidance at that time was conducted in my studio. We discussed some painting techniques in detail. Instructor Yang Ming made many noteworthy suggestions, such as the use of color, line construction, and capturing of shapes. He also introduced me to some concepts in contemporary art, such as free sketching and expressionism, and also recommended the works of several contemporary artists for me to appreciate.
It sounds like that guidance was very rewarding. So how did these guidance help your subsequent creations?

This guidance had a profound impact on my artistic career. It made me understand painting and art better, developed my artistic vision, and inspired me to think innovatively. Since then, I have worked harder to study and practice, and gradually achieved some achievements, such as winning an excellence award in a school exhibition and receiving some art exhibition opportunities at home and abroad. These achievements are inseparable from the guidance and encouragement given to me by my mentor Yang Ming at that time.

summary: Guiding Li Hua on his painting techniques and art theory
content: During Li Hua's artistic career, he was fortunate enough to have Yang Ming as his mentor. Yang Ming is a well-known artist well-known at home and abroad, specializing in painting and sculpture. He and Li Hua met at a certain art college, when Li Hua was still a young and promising art student. Yang Ming became very interested in Li Hua's talent and enthusiasm, and took the initiative to invite him to become his student. In the following years, Yang Ming personally guided Li Hua's painting techniques and art theory, imparting to him valuable artistic experience and knowledge. With his rich artistic insights and keen observation, Yang Ming helped Li Hua break the constraints of traditional painting and encouraged him to show his personal style and innovative thinking in his works. Through exchanges and learning with Yang Ming, Li Hua gradually grew into a unique contemporary artist, and has exhibited works in domestic and foreign art exhibitions and won multiple art awards. Yang Ming's guidance and help to Li Hua not only played an important role in art, but also established a deep teacher-student friendship between the two. Li Hua has always regarded Yang Ming as his artistic mentor and enlightenment teacher. He is grateful for his teachings and often recalls the precious time they spent together.
dialogs: Hello Li Hua, what are you doing now?
I am sorting out the works from the art exhibition I just participated in, and I feel very fulfilled.
Yes, your artistic works are becoming more and more representative and innovative. In fact, I have always been curious, how did you grow into such an outstanding contemporary artist?

Haha, the reason why I am what I am today is thanks to my art mentor Yang Ming. He was my mentor when I was at the XX Art Institute. He personally guided my art study and helped me establish a unique personal style.
Listening to what you said, it seems that Teacher Yang Ming has had a profound influence on you.

Indeed. Teacher Yang Ming not only taught me valuable knowledge and experience in art theory, but also allowed me to break away from traditional painting and try new ways of artistic creation and thinking patterns.
Do you still keep in touch with Teacher Yang Ming?
Of course. Although we are no longer in the same location, we keep in touch via email and phone calls. He often provides me with good advice and inspiration for my creations.
It sounds like the two of you have established a very special teacher-student relationship.
Yes, I will always regard him as my mentor and enlightenment teacher. His influence on me continues to this day. I will never forget those precious moments of learning and creating together.

content: On May 15, 2022, Li Hua’s neighbor Zhang Jing noticed that Li Hua and his wife attached great importance to family health and decided to provide them with some advice. Zhang Jing is a young writer who often exchanges views on art and literature with Li Hua. She learned that Zhang Yun and Wang Hai wanted to create a healthier family environment for themselves and their children, so she made some suggestions to them during an exchange. Zhang Jing suggested that they try to introduce some beneficial eating habits, such as increasing the intake of vegetables and fruits and reducing the consumption of high-sugar and high-fat foods. She also recommended some healthy home-cooked recipes and how to plan meals appropriately during busy work days. In addition, Zhang Jing also encouraged them to strengthen communication and emotional expression among family members, advocated sitting down every day to share what they saw and heard with each other, and arranging a family trip to enhance intimacy. Zhang Jing believes that these efforts will have a positive impact on Zhang Yun and Wang Hai's family health, and hopes that their efforts can continue and affect more families.
dialogs: Hello, Mr. Li. How are you?
Not bad. Yesterday, my neighbor Zhang Jing gave me some health advice, which was very helpful.
Really? Can you tell me about her advice?

She suggested that we should pay attention to dietary issues, such as increasing the intake of fruits and vegetables and reducing the consumption of high-sugar and high-fat foods. Some healthy recipes are also recommended to teach us how to arrange meals during busy workdays.
That sounds great. These suggestions will have a positive impact on your family’s health.

Yes, I think so too. She also encouraged us to strengthen communication and emotional expression among family members, and sit down every day to share what we see and hear with each other. She also suggested that we arrange a family trip to enhance our bonding.
This is good advice. We will remember to pay more attention to food and family atmosphere, thank you for letting me know this information.

content: On June 15, 2022, Li Hua and his neighbor Zhang Jing visited the opening ceremony of a contemporary art exhibition. This exhibition is about the theme of art and justice, which coincides with their recent artistic exchange topics. The exhibition displays a series of artworks related to the concept of justice, including a painting titled 'Arianna'. Li Hua and Zhang Jing admired this work together and deeply discussed the relationship between art and justice. They discussed John Rawls's conception of justice and his Ariana case in A Theory of Justice. The two believe that art can be a medium to express the concept of justice. Through the display of artistic works, people can better understand and think about the meaning of justice. Li Hua and Zhang Jing are excited about the power of art and the possibilities for social change, and have decided to explore more themes of justice in future art projects.
dialogs: What a rare art feast today! The works on display are all very distinctive and eye-catching.
Yes, the presentation of this exhibition’s theme on art and justice makes the entire exhibition more meaningful.
Especially the painting 'Arianna', it is so beautiful.
'Arianna' is indeed a good example, and John Rawls also mentioned it in 'A Theory of Justice'.
Yes, John Rawls believed that works of art can help people better understand the concept of justice.
Art as a medium can convey people's thoughts and ideas on social justice.
I agree. I think art can influence people's perception of justice to a certain extent and guide them to think about their own values.
This is one of the charms of art. Through different art forms and works, we can recognize a variety of people and their stories.
Indeed. I very much look forward to participating in more art projects on the theme of justice in the future and exploring the possibilities of social change together.

summary: Xu Ming and Xu Jia play 'Mysterious Relics: The Mystery of the Lost' together
content: On May 12, 2022, Xu Ming and his daughter Xu Jia played 'Mysterious Relics: The Mystery of the Lost', a high-profile adventure game. Xu Ming plays Alex in the game, while Xu Jia is his loyal audience and supporter. Together they solved a series of puzzles in the game and explored the mysterious ruins of ancient civilizations. Xu Ming uses wisdom and skill to interact with unique characters such as Anubis, the guardian of the ruins, and Isis, the wise man. The exquisite graphics and smooth operation in the game make them feel as if they are actually on the scene. The original score composed for the game by John Williams adds to the immersion. Xu Ming and Xu Jia face challenges and suspense together in the game, which increases their interaction and tacit understanding. This gaming experience not only deepened the relationship between the brothers and sisters, but also allowed them to experience adventure and fun together.
dialogs: Of course I remember! We also unlocked an awesome treasure map that time!

Yes! I believe we will have a tacit understanding again!
Of course! You two completed the puzzles so fast last year!

Well...my father and I are not afraid! Let you see the power of our growth!

summary: Xu Ming underwent genetic testing for BRCA1 gene mutation
content: Xu Ming discovered a high incidence of breast cancer in his family and decided to undergo genetic testing to find out whether he carried the BRCA1 c.68_69delAG mutation. After testing, Xu Ming learned that he carried this mutation. He realized he was at increased risk for breast cancer and decided to take preventive measures. Xu Ming actively communicated with doctors and received a series of health consultations and suggestions. He began regular breast cancer screenings and focused on maintaining a healthy lifestyle, including a healthy diet and moderate exercise. Xu Ming also participated in a family support group to share experiences and emotional support with others who carry BRCA1 mutations. His sister Xu Jia is very supportive of his decision and accompanies him to face challenges together. Xu Ming's genetic mutation case further deepened family members' understanding and concern about BRCA1 gene mutations, and they worked together to promote research on the prevention and treatment of breast cancer.
dialogs: Hello, how is Xu Ming doing lately? Does he need help with anything?

He is in good condition recently. He has begun to receive some genetic counseling and regular screening, as well as pay attention to diet and exercise. But I think he also needs some emotional support.

I understand. I can help him find some family support groups or communities so that he can communicate more with other patients about his experiences and feelings. This may help reduce his mental stress.
Thank you very much for your suggestion. We would like to know what local support groups or organizations we can participate in.
No problem, I will send you a list in the afternoon.
Thank you, we really appreciate your help and attention.
You're welcome. If you need anything else, please let me know.

summary: Visit the underground station construction project of the northern section of Beijing Metro Line 15
content: As Xu Jia's father, Xu Ming is very supportive of his daughter's career. He often accompanied Xu Jia to watch movies and was very interested in her major in film and television. Recently, Xu Ming learned about the high-profile underground station construction project in the northern section of Beijing Subway Line 15 and decided to take Xu Jia to visit it. They came to the underground station in the center of Beijing and marveled at the design level of the China Architectural Design Institute. Xu Ming and Xu Jia visited this large-scale underground station together and admired its simple and elegant design. During the visit, Xu Ming introduced to Xu Jia the importance of underground space planning and design, as well as the advanced technology and equipment used by the engineering team. They learned that in order to ensure the stability and safety of the station, the engineering team conducted detailed geological exploration and groundwater flow analysis, and adopted reasonable underground structure design. Xu Ming also explained to Xu Jia the reasonable layout of entrances, exits, passages and waiting areas in the station, as well as the installation of advanced ventilation systems and lighting equipment. Xu Ming admired the environmentally friendly and energy-saving design concept of this underground station and believed that the application of these facilities has contributed to the sustainable development of the city. After the visit, Xu Ming and Xu Jia were deeply inspired and had a deeper understanding of the innovation and development of underground buildings.
dialogs: Xu Jia, hello! Have you done anything interesting recently?
My father and I went to visit the construction project of the underground station in the northern section of Beijing Subway Line 15. It was so spectacular!
Sounds great! What kind of building is an underground station?
An underground station is a special kind of building that requires precise geological exploration and design to ensure stability and safety.
Is there anything special about the station you go to?
It adopts an environmentally friendly and energy-saving design concept and uses advanced ventilation systems and lighting equipment, which contributes to the sustainable development of the city.
What did Mr. Xu Ming say during the visit?
He introduced me to the importance of underground space planning and design, and also talked about some of the advanced technologies and equipment used by the engineering team.
It sounds like you have a deeper understanding of the development of underground construction. What do you think will be the future innovation and development direction of underground construction?
I think underground buildings in the future need more environmentally friendly and energy-saving designs, and more humane designs need to be considered to improve user experience.

content: Xu Jia and her college best friend Wang Ting plan to make a short film about Peking duck together. Xu Jia is responsible for directing and editing, while Wang Ting is responsible for graphic design and providing creative advice. They hope to use this short film to show the audience the unique charm of Peking duck and arouse people's interest in traditional Chinese cuisine. During the filming process, Xu Jia and Wang Ting gave full play to their professional skills and carefully planned every scene, striving to make the short film exciting and vivid. They cooperate with each other, support each other, and jointly pursue the perfect presentation of the short film.
dialogs: Hello Xu Jia, I heard that you plan to shoot a short film about Beijing Roast Duck with Wang Ting. How is the progress of this plan?
Hello, we shot all day yesterday, and the scenes and shots were completed smoothly. Today I will sort out the content and materials I took.
I heard that you served as director and editor in the short film? What are the production considerations?

Yes, my task is to edit the material into an interesting short film with a plot, food production process and cultural background. I think during filming and post-production, we must pay great attention to innovative plots, vivid images, actual scene shooting, etc. The most important thing is to show the unique charm and cultural characteristics of Beijing roast duck.
Very challenging. Where is your friend Wang Ting? What is her main role in this shoot?

Wang Ting is mainly responsible for the overall creativity, including the pre-production of shooting scenes and materials. She also needs to play a very important role in the early and late stages of the short film - her aesthetic creativity is very important, and we also need to use Wang Ting's planning to improve the display methods of our work, such as graphic design and interactive methods. In the details, Wang Ting’s opinions pointed out the usability issues of the short film, which ultimately gave us a more refined completion. It's because Wang Ting has a very good feel for the composition of the picture.
Okay. So how are you guys working together these days? Have you encountered any problems?

We have encountered small problems in cooperation. For example, sometimes we need to spend a lot of time to conduct more detailed comparisons with previous plans to avoid omissions. But overall, we worked well together and matched everyone's assigned tasks perfectly.

dialogs: Hello Xu Jia, do you and Zhang Yang plan to go to the cinema to watch movies recently?
Hello! We already went to the cinema to watch a movie last time. Thank you for the information you provided earlier, which made our viewing experience very enjoyable.
I remember that the place where you watched the movie was a cinema in the center of the city, right? What do you think of it there?
Yes, it was a great cinema. The seats are very comfortable and the audio equipment is also very good, giving people an immersive feeling.
What movie did you go to see? What do you think?

What we went to watch was a newly released love movie, and the storyline was touching. We were very impressed by the emotion and detail in the movie and we enjoyed a very romantic and unforgettable evening together.
Did you do any other activities together later?

After watching the movie, we took a walk on the streets at night, enjoying the beautiful night and chatting a lot about the movie. It was really enjoyable. Later, we found a cozy cafe, had coffee together, and continued to talk about the story and plot of the movie. The whole cafe was filled with a pleasant atmosphere, and we became more determined in our dreams.

content: Xu Jia and Zhang Yang met in film school and admired each other's talents, and they collaborated on a short film called 'The Dance of Time'. This short film tells a story about the passage of time. Xu Jia plays the heroine in the film. She is a young girl pursuing freedom and dreams. Zhang Yang plays a supporting actor who is a photographer responsible for recording the heroine's growth and her struggle against time. In the story, Xu Jia's character enters a mysterious time tunnel by chance and can travel through different time and space. In this tunnel, she meets Zhang Yang's character, and the two are attracted to each other and experience many romantic moments together. They enjoy the beautiful sunset together, explore the unknown world together, and support and encourage each other. During the filming process, Xu Jia and Zhang Yang showed excellent acting and photography skills, and their tacit cooperation impressed the entire crew. The Dance of Time caused a stir in the film industry, being named the best short film of the year and winning several awards, including Best Screenplay and Best Director. This short film not only showcases the talents of Xu Jia and Zhang Yang, but also conveys profound thoughts about time and love, touching the hearts of the audience.
dialogs: Hello, Xu Jia, I would like to ask in which year was the 'Dance of Time' that you co-produced with Zhang Yang filmed?
Hi, AI assistant, we filmed 'Dance of Time' in 2015. The year we met and worked together on this story was truly precious.
That’s a very touching story! You will definitely be lucky to meet the right person in film school. How did you and Zhang Yang meet?

Yes, we were both interested in making short films in film school. One day, we went to the same lecture together. After introducing each other, we quickly developed a tacit understanding and hit it off immediately.
It turned out to be love at first sight! You play the heroine in the short film, a young girl who has dreams and is brave enough to pursue them. Do you have any deep understanding of this character?

Yes, I think my character is a typical image that represents femininity and personality. She loves life, is full of emotion and strength. Moreover, she is full of curiosity about the unknown and changes, and has her own thoughts on the true meaning of life and happiness.
Very meaningful! How is your cooperation with Zhang Yang? Do you have any experiences you’d like to share about working together?

During the filming of the short film, we really had a tacit understanding, understanding and supporting each other. We collaborated freely and found our own unique sense of character and visual language. And during the shoot, we guided, communicated, and even sometimes cooperated with each other. Those days were an unforgettable experience in my life. I really appreciate and respect Zhang Yang. He has benefited me a lot.
That’s great. The teamwork between the two of you has tacit understanding and sincere communication and has won multiple awards. How do you feel?

Yes, that award made us extremely excited and happy! When making a short film, we always step on the most cherished point in our hearts. It is not easy to communicate and express with the reviewers. It is great to receive an honor to prove that this short film resonates with them. That is the affirmation of our unremitting efforts.

content: Xu Jia and Zhang Yang were classmates at the film academy. They appreciated each other's talents during their time at the academy and collaborated on many works together. Their romance began at a movie premiere. On the same day, Xu Jia's new work 'Flowers of Spring' premiered at the film festival, and Zhang Yang came specially to support her. Xu Jia made a shining appearance on the red carpet, wearing a gorgeous dress, elegant and charming. Zhang Yang stood in the audience, his eyes full of pride and admiration. After the movie, they met at a party and were both genuinely proud of each other's achievements. They exchanged their understanding and feelings about the movie with each other, and there was a strong resonance deep in their hearts. They spend a wonderful night together and from that moment on, their romantic relationship officially begins.
dialogs: Ah, my days at the film school were really unforgettable. We have filmed 'Eighteen Bends on the Mountain Road', 'Youth Bell Tower' and 'Preface to the Orchid Pavilion Collection', all of which are excellent works.
Yes, that time was very precious. Not only did I learn a lot about film, I also met so many outstanding classmates. By the way, remember that premiere? That dress you are wearing is really beautiful.
Haha, of course, this is to celebrate the premiere of his new movie, and he must make himself shine.
I still remember the scene when you were walking on the red carpet, and Zhang Yang kept looking at you. I wonder what he was feeling at that time?
I really didn’t know he was looking at me at the time. Later he told me that he was quite excited at that time.
It turns out that he has had a crush on you for a long time. However, he seems to be very reserved and didn't confess his love to you until after the movie was over at the party.
Yes, I was really shocked by him at that time. But I soon understood his sincerity, and the two of us had a great rapport. So after that party, we started officially getting together.
That was a wonderful beginning. I still remember the feelings you shared with me at that time. You must be very happy.
Well, very happy. Zhang Yang and I have a tacit understanding. He is my partner, my friend, and my lover.

content: Xu Jia and Liu Xiao are high school classmates, aged 15 years and Liu Xiao is a musician. They occasionally meet at social events to exchange their creative experiences. As a professional in film and television, Xu Jia has rich experience in film shooting and editing, while Liu Xiao has profound attainments in music creation and performance. They inspire each other through communication and share each other's creative inspiration and techniques. This exchange not only enriched the artistic literacy of both parties, but also deepened their friendship.
dialogs: Hello, Xu Jia! We haven't seen each other for a long time. What have you been busy with lately?
Yes, I haven’t seen you for a long time. I've been busy editing a new film recently and will probably go to Paris for a film festival.
Wow, congratulations! I'd love to hear your creative thoughts and techniques.
Then we should communicate more with Liu Xiao. You remember him, the classmate we played with in high school has now become a musician.
I remember him. I heard that he has released a lot of good songs recently.
Yes, he is really talented. Every time I listen to his works, I can feel his love for music.
It must be very beneficial for you to inspire each other and share each other's creative inspiration and skills.
Yes, we occasionally meet at social events to exchange our creative experiences. Such exchanges can not only improve each other's quality, but also enhance each other's friendship.
Yes, communication and interaction between people are really important.

content: Xu Jia and her high school classmate Liu Xiao both took their children to participate in a parent-child reading activity organized by a city library.
dialogs: This parent-child reading activity is so meaningful. It can not only tell stories to children, but also cultivate children's reading interest and reading ability.
Yes, and the content of this event is rich and colorful, including story speeches, game sessions and parent-child reading sharing.
I didn’t expect that all my classmates in high school would become mothers now. It’s such a wonderful life journey.
Yes, time flies so fast, and we have entered middle age before we know it.
But through this activity we can also better connect and communicate with our old classmates, which feels really good.

content: Xu Jia and Liu Xiao are high school classmates. They occasionally meet at social events and exchange their creative experiences with each other.

summary: Wang Wei shared his experience using the FitLife app at the press conference
content: At the launch of the new features of the FitLife app, Xu Jia and Wang Wei participated in the event as colleagues from the film production company. During the event, Wang Wei took the stage to share his experience using the FitLife app. He mentioned his tacit cooperation with Xu Jia and their frequent filming of movies and TV series together. Wang Wei said that due to the special nature of film production work, he often needs to work long hours, resulting in a lack of opportunities for exercise. However, since he started using the FitLife app, he has been able to choose the right workout and venue based on his schedule and preferences. He also praised the video tutorials and instructions on warm-up exercises and exercise methods provided by the FitLife app, which helped him perform exercises correctly and avoid sports injuries. In addition, he also shared how he and Xu Jia used the FitLife app together. They compared exercise data and results with each other, encouraged and challenged each other, and increased the motivation and fun of exercise. Wang Wei said that by using the FitLife app, he not only improved his health, but also improved his work efficiency and creative ability. He thought the FitLife app was a very practical and interesting fitness tool and recommended it to other attendees.

summary: Co-production of movies and TV series
content: Xu Jia and Wang Wei are partners with a high tacit understanding and often shoot movies and TV series together. They work at the film production company of Xu Jia, a director and screenwriter, and Wang Wei, a camera operator. The first time they collaborated was in the 2015 crime drama 'Track,' which won multiple film awards. Xu Jia admired Wang Wei's photography skills very much and believed that he could accurately capture the emotions and atmosphere of the plot. From then on, they became inseparable partners. The tacit understanding between them is very high, and they can understand each other's intentions without much communication. Xu Jia often mentioned that without Wang Wei's superb photography skills, her film works would not have been so successful. In addition to their work cooperation, Xu Jia and Wang Wei are also very good friends. They often go to the cinema to watch the latest movies together and share their views and feelings about movies with each other. They also often attend film festivals and industry events together to communicate and learn from other filmmakers. Whether in work or life, Xu Jia and Wang Wei are each other's most important supporters and partners.
dialogs: Let’s take a look at last year’s award-winning film. After all, it reminds me of the scene when we were filming 'Tracking'.
Great idea, what did that movie from last year remind you of?
'Tracking', this was the first time we collaborated. I remember we encountered a lot of problems during the filming, but with your help we completed it successfully, so it is of great significance.
What elements from that movie have been carried over into your work?
Mainly in terms of style and subject matter. That film provided inspiration for us to explore crime movies and shaped a similar visual style for us.
Wang Wei’s photography skills are very good and are also a crucial part of capturing the atmosphere and emotion of the movie. Will you make another movie with a similar theme?

There is no new inspiration at the moment. After all, not every theme and idea can be successful. However, our work has brought many unexpected benefits, and it has also made me feel the love of this job. If we really have the opportunity, we will not waste it.

content: During the filming of the movie 'Dream Journey', Xu Jia and Wang Wei worked closely together to create a visual feast. As the director of the film, Xu Jia is responsible for the overall plot conception and actor guidance, while Wang Wei plays the role of cameraman, responsible for capturing every wonderful scene. They work together tacitly and create a mysterious and alluring atmosphere for the movie through careful set and lighting design. Among them, Xu Jia's Ang Lee-style directorial style is perfectly combined with Wang Wei's precise photography technology, making every shot of the movie full of artistry and imagination. Their cooperation was highly recognized by the film production company, and the movie 'Dream Journey' won the Best Screenplay Award and the Best Director Award, making Xu Jia and Wang Wei's efforts fully recognized.
dialogs: Hello, Xu Jia, the last time we chatted was during the filming of the 'Fantasy Journey' movie.
Yes, I was busy filming a movie at that time and I was really nervous.
I heard that your cooperation with Wang Wei in the movie was very successful and received high praise.
Yes, that cooperation was really pleasant. We worked together very well and captured great footage.
I heard that 'Dream Journey' won the Best Screenplay Award and the Best Director Award. Your and Wang Wei's efforts have been fully recognized.
Yes, I was really excited at that time. Receiving this award is recognition of our ongoing efforts.

summary: Zhang Li attended an online lecture on film production on TalkWorld
content: On May 15, 2022, Zhang Li, as a film production student, participated in an online lecture on film production on TalkWorld. This lecture was given by Xu Jia, a well-known film director and film and television professional. Xu Jia gave Zhang Li a lot of guidance and inspiration during her growth and became her mentor. In this lecture, Xu Jia shared her experience and insights in the field of film production, and explained the techniques of film shooting, editing and production. Zhang Li is very interested in film production. She actively asked questions during the lecture and had in-depth exchanges with Xu Jia. Xu Jia patiently answered Zhang Li's questions and shared some of the challenges and solutions she encountered during the film production process. This lecture not only taught Zhang Li a lot about film production, but also deepened her teacher-student relationship with Xu Jia. Zhang Li admires Xu Jia's professionalism and teaching methods very much. She said she will continue to study hard and hopes to one day become an excellent film production professional like Xu Jia.
dialogs: Hello, Teacher Xu! Thank you for sharing your valuable experience in the lecture on TalkWorld on May 15, 2022. I am a voice assistant and would like to know more about film production. Can I talk to you?
Hello, I really appreciate your passion for filmmaking! If you have any questions, you can ask me.

Thank you very much! In Teacher Xu’s lecture, I learned about the editing and production techniques commonly used in film production. I really want to know how these techniques are applied in actual operations.

First of all, you need to master the structure and content of the movie script, and understand the plot of the movie story. Only with these foundations can you better understand the application of editing and post-production in film production, otherwise it will be more difficult to learn.
Thank you for your suggestion. I will pay attention to mastering the structure and plot development of the movie script. In addition, I would like to ask what skills are worth learning and mastering?

It is particularly important for a film producer to have multiple skills, such as editing, photography, lighting, audio processing, art design, etc. I have taken on roles such as photography, art design, and lighting effects production when making movies. , trying to explore the entire creative process and apply skills across fields, and students need to practice more to hone their craftsmanship in all aspects of production, hone their sense of innovation, explore themes in depth, and constantly keep pace with the times to explore the infinite possibilities of artistic expression and presentation. We cannot pursue superficial and popular routine works.
Thank you for your guidance! How to balance time and efficiency in actual film production? Are there any tips and experiences worth learning?

In order to achieve an efficient film production process, we need to always pay attention to the balance between working time and efficiency. I usually prepare relevant props in advance, arrange the scene and determine the shooting location, and strive to use fewer shots to achieve rich emotions. Effect. During the post-production process, I often plan various overtime subsidy arrangements based on my mood state, adopt a phased iteration method to improve time utilization and post-production results, and give full play to the complementarity and resource coordination mechanism between team members, so as to create perfect work.
Thank you very much for your answer, Teacher Xu! I will combine the skills and techniques you mentioned to strengthen my own learning and pursue the highest realm of art.
You're welcome, filmmaking is a very learned art, and this field still needs the help and promotion of a large number of knowledgeable people. I wish you success!

content: When Xu Jia was growing up, she was guided and inspired by Zhang Li, a well-known film director. Zhang Li is Xu Jia's mentor, and their relationship is mentor/mentee. Zhang Li played an important role in Xu Jia's career, providing her with valuable guidance and inspiration. Zhang Li taught Xu Jia many filmmaking skills and experiences, and shared her own success stories in the film industry. Under Zhang Li's guidance, Xu Jia gradually grew into an outstanding film and television professional and won multiple film and television-related awards. Zhang Li's professional knowledge and experience played an important role in promoting Xu Jia's career development, allowing her to achieve outstanding achievements in the field of film production.
dialogs: I was really interested in movies at the time, but I was also very confused and didn’t know where to start.
How did you meet Director Zhang Li?
I participated in a film festival at that time and met director Zhang Li by chance. I greatly admired his work and wanted to learn from him.
So what did you learn from Director Zhang Li?
Director Zhang taught me a lot of filmmaking techniques and experiences, and also shared with me his success stories in the film industry. He also often provides me with guidance and encouragement.
What role does director Zhang play in your career?

He is my mentor and also my student. He has supported me throughout my career development, providing guidance and encouragement. Sometimes when I face difficulties and challenges, he always points me in the right direction.
How does Director Zhang’s guidance help your career development?

His professional knowledge and experience have been of great help to my career development. He has helped me improve my filmmaking skills and helped me gain access to more opportunities through his connections. It was his impetus that enabled me to achieve excellence in filmmaking.

content: Xu Jia started her studies in film and television in 2012 and received guidance and inspiration from Zhang Li, a well-known film director. Zhang Li is an experienced director with unique insights and talents in film production. As Xu Jia grew up, she helped Xu Jia improve her filmmaking skills and artistic expression by giving her professional guidance and sharing her own experiences. Zhang Li's influence on Xu Jia is not only limited to film production, but also involves her guidance on Xu Jia's career planning and life development. Xu Jia has great respect for Zhang Li and regards her as his mentor and mentor. They established a deep mentor-disciple relationship. Xu Jia often asked Zhang Li questions and received valuable suggestions and opinions from her. Zhang Li's guidance and inspiration played a positive role in promoting Xu Jia's film career, enabling her to achieve great achievements in the fields of film and television.
dialogs: Hello, Xu Jia, I saw that you started studying film and television in 2012. Is it because you wanted to learn from director Zhang Li?
Yes, Zhang Li is a very experienced and talented director. She gave me a lot of valuable guidance and suggestions, which benefited me a lot.
Does Zhang Li have any specific guidance for you in film production and career planning?

She has had a great influence on me. She not only guided me on how to improve my filmmaking skills and artistic expression, but also gave me suggestions and guidance on my career planning and life development. I'm very grateful for her help.
You have made great achievements in the field of film and television studies. Can you share it with us?

content: Li Hua received the invitation and was very happy to attend Xu Jia's wedding. He arrived at the wedding wearing a neat suit and a carefully selected gift. The wedding was held in a luxurious hotel banquet hall with gorgeous and elegant decoration.
dialogs: You're welcome, Xu Jia. You are so beautiful, I wish you and your groom happiness!
Haha, I have to thank my sister for helping me choose clothes!
You even brought a gift, thank you!
It's my honor. I chose a beautiful set of tableware for you!
Wow, thank you! We must keep it well!
No problem! I heard that the banquet hall was beautifully decorated today, I’m really looking forward to it!
Yes, everything is what we dreamed of!
Wow, this kind of moment is worth cherishing and making your bride smile the happiest!

summary: Xu Jia and Li Hua exchange the latest movie and TV series recommendations
content: Xu Jia and Li Hua often meet in the corridor and exchange recommendations for the latest movies and TV series. They shared a recent movie, 'The Time Traveler's Wife,' and a hit TV series, 'Fate/Stay Stay.' Xu Jia recommended 'The Time Traveler's Wife', a romantic film adapted from Audrey Niffenegger's novel of the same name, which tells a touching story of a couple spanning time and space. Li Hua recommended 'Fate/Stay Night', a popular fantasy series that tells the story of a group of young people fighting in a mysterious world. Xu Jia and Li Hua shared their opinions and feelings about movies and TV series during the exchange, and agreed to watch new works together next time.
dialogs: Have you seen any good movies recently?
Have you watched 'The Time Traveler's Wife'? I heard this is a very touching love movie.
Yes, I watched this movie and was really moved. It tells a love story that spans time and space.
It sounds very romantic. I must go and see it.
Do you have any movie recommendations?
I heard that 'Fate/stay night' is very popular. Have you watched it?
I also heard that this TV series is very good, but I haven’t had time to watch it yet. Can you share with me its plot?
'Fate/Stay Night' tells the story of a group of young people fighting in a mysterious world. Somewhat sad, but also very touching.
It sounds very nice. I must go and see it. Next time we will share the movie watching experience together.

content: Xu Jia and Li Hua are neighbors. They often meet in the corridor and exchange recommendations for the latest movies and TV series. They agreed to have a movie night on October 15, 2022. Xu Jia has prepared a highly acclaimed film 'The Story of the Quran', which tells the important historical significance of the Quran and the core teachings of Islam. Xu Jia invited Li Hua to watch the film together and discuss its philosophical ideas and artistic expression. That night, Xu Jia set up a warm small theater in her home and prepared potato chips, popcorn and drinks. Li Hua arrived on time and the two entered the theater together. During the movie viewing process, they exchanged their feelings and understanding of the movie, and shared each other's opinions and insights. Xu Jia gave a detailed introduction to the Quran manuscripts in the movie and showed Li Hua some pictures and introductions of precious manuscripts. Li Hua became very interested in the historical and artistic value of the Quran. He asked Xu Jia some questions about the manuscript and discussed it in depth with Xu Jia. This movie night allowed Xu Jia and Li Hua to better understand the importance of the Quran and the cultural heritage of Islam, while also deepening their friendship and mutual understanding.
dialogs: Tonight is truly an unforgettable movie night!
Yes, that movie is very in-depth and you prepared it very well, especially the introduction of the manuscript. Listening to your explanation, I also understand the Quran better.
Yes, actually I think the manuscripts are the most exciting part of the movie. Those precious manuscripts on the scene shocked me.
Those manuscripts are really worth getting to know. However, there are some issues regarding the manuscript that I am not very clear about. Can you please elaborate?
Of course, no problem. For example, some Quran manuscripts are relatively long. What words and contents do they consist of? This is one of the common questions.
This question sounds quite professional and requires a more in-depth discussion. If you don't mind, could you tell me more about the composition of the Qur'an?

No problem. The Quran is composed of 114 short chapters. These chapters consist of a chapter preface and 113 chapters with specific chapter names. By studying and explaining these contents, Islamic culture and thought can be better understood.

I think I need to learn more about this topic. The Quran is an important historical and cultural heritage that we should know more about. Thank you for your explanation today, which made me feel even more about your professionalism and enthusiasm in this regard.

content: Xu Jia and Chen Gang are two residents of the community who have established a good relationship with each other. Xu Jia is a film and television professional who likes watching movies, shooting short films and editing videos. Chen Gang is a painter who is good at painting. Occasionally, the community organizes art activities, and both Xu Jia and Chen Gang will participate and appreciate each other's art works. Their common interests made them good friends, and they often exchanged experiences and ideas about artistic creation together.
dialogs: Hello, assistant.
Hello, Xu Jia. How have you been during this time?
Not bad. I'm filming a short film. Have you watched 'The Girls We Chased Together'?
I haven’t seen it, but I heard it was a very touching movie.
That’s right! I'm fascinated by the storylines of movies, and that's why I studied this major.
It sounds like you are very interested in film shooting. I thought we could organize a discussion about the movie.
That’s great! I'd love to hear everyone's views. Do you want to invite Chen Gang to participate? He also has a lot of insights into film shooting.
great idea. I'll contact him.
I thought the last art exhibition was great, and the paintings painted by Chen Gang were also very beautiful. what do you think?
I agree. Everyone's work is unique. However, my favorite painting is the one depicting the main venue of the Winter Olympics. Do you have any ideas for drawing something similar?
Well, it’s not my major. But if you give me the time and materials, I'd like to try it for you.
Thank you very much. I have prepared some materials. Let’s discuss it together over the weekend.
Okay, see you on the weekend.

summary: Attend an exhibition on the Los Angeles Recycled Water Project
content: Xu Jia and Chen Gang are community members who occasionally participate in community art activities and appreciate each other's art works. On May 15, 2022, the Los Angeles Reclaimed Water Project Center hosted an exhibition showcasing the project’s results and technologies. Both Xu Jia and Chen Gang were invited to participate in this exhibition. Various art works on water resources management are displayed at the exhibition site, including paintings, photography and sculptures. In the exhibition, Xu Jia showed one of her documentaries on water resources management, as well as a series of waterscape photos she took. Chen Gang showed one of his oil paintings about water resources protection. Xu Jia and Chen Gang communicated with each other during the exhibition and shared their understanding of water resources management and creative inspiration. They expressed their appreciation for the innovation and achievements of the Los Angeles Reclaimed Water Project, and hoped to publicize and advocate the sustainable use and protection of water resources through art. After the exhibition, Xu Jia and Chen Gang participated in a community dinner together to continue to exchange each other's artistic creations and thoughts on water resources management.
dialogs: Hello, Xu Jia! What are your impressions of the exhibition at the Los Angeles Reclaimed Water Project Center?

The exhibition is great! The art works related to water resources management on display were very enlightening, especially the results and technologies of the Los Angeles Reclaimed Water Project, which gave me a deeper understanding of the future use of water resources.
Great to hear your thoughts. So the documentaries and photos you participated in were appreciated by many people, right?
Yes! I have received invitations and attention from some art institutions and people in the industry. This also strengthens my belief in using art to spread awareness of water resources protection.
I also admire your artwork very much, Xu Jia. Your thoughts on water management have taught me a lot.
Thank you for your praise, AI assistant. Did you see Chen Gang’s oil paintings when you visited the exhibition? I personally like his work very much.
Yes! I admire Chen Gang's works very much. He integrates the protection of water resources with natural beauty. Do you and Chen Gang share the same creative ideas?

Our styles may be different, but our original intention in creating is to advocate the concept of sustainable water resources management and make more people pay attention to this issue. This is also a bridge through which we can build more exchanges and cooperation.
Sounds great. After the exhibition, you and Chen Gang attended a dinner party, right? How was the communication during the dinner?

Yes! We continued to chat about our thoughts on water resources management and creative directions, hoping to promote the sustainable use and protection of water resources through mutual inspiration. At the same time, we also appreciate and encourage each other’s exploration in artistic creation.

summary: Chat about movies and share opinions
content: Xu Jia met Zhang Lei, a 70-year-old retired teacher in the park. They occasionally chat in the park and share their love and opinions about movies. Xu Jia likes to discuss the plot and acting skills of movies, while Zhang Lei pays more attention to the movie’s reflections on society and human nature. They recommended each other the movies they had watched and exchanged their feelings and opinions. Sometimes they argue about the interpretation and evaluation of some movies, but always maintain a friendly atmosphere. Xu Jia feels that Zhang Lei has unique insights into movies, while Zhang Lei thinks that Xu Jia has a deep understanding and keen observation of movies. Through these chats, Xu Jia and Zhang Lei expanded their film knowledge and enhanced their understanding of each other.
dialogs: Hello Xu Jia, how was your weekend? Have you ever gone to the park?
I went to the park on the weekend and met a very interesting old man. We talked about movies.
Sounds interesting. What did you and the old gentleman talk about?

We talked a lot about movies and shared each other’s love and opinions. He feels that movies should be viewed from a social and human perspective, while I pay more attention to the plot and acting skills of the movie.
What movies did he mention? Do you have any movies that you would recommend to each other?

He introduced me to several films, such as 'Mysterious River', which tells the story of scams in Africa. This film mainly emphasizes the key words of fraud and trust. I recommended to him 'The Life of the Disliked Matsuko', which tells the story of an inconspicuous female protagonist, Matsuko, who goes through many oppressions and hardships while maintaining family ties, and finally becomes strong despite her mental fragility.
It sounds like your chat was really fulfilling. What new knowledge do you think you learned from chatting with him?

Yes, I learned a lot about movies and the film industry that I didn’t know before, such as the division of labor between screenwriters, directors, and producers, and three movies (in ten years, Hollywood has not released a ' 'serious drama')... He is quite disgusted with the films created by Hollywood entertainment and entertainment, and does not understand its absurdity and boredom. But do I really think that the audiences for different types of movies are also different, and the feelings will naturally be different?
You and the old gentleman seem to get along very well, and it’s great to learn and understand each other. I hope you can continue to talk about movies and literature in depth next time you see him.

content: On a warm summer afternoon, Han Gang and Han Ming's family gathered together for a pleasant family gathering. Everyone sat around in the spacious and bright living room, enjoying a delicious dinner and cheerful conversation and laughter. Han Ming suddenly broke the silence. He proudly shared a case called 'Mr. Wang's successful road to quitting smoking and drinking' to his family.
dialogs: Hello, Mr. Han, thank you for letting me serve you. I heard that you and your family got together on May 12th and had a pleasant family gathering.
Yes, it was a warm summer afternoon, and our whole family was together. We enjoyed a delicious dinner and laughter and cheerfulness filled the house.
Sounds like a pleasure. Can you tell me about 'Mr. Wang's successful journey of quitting smoking and drinking' mentioned by Mr. Han Ming?

At that time, Han Ming came up with a case called 'Mr. Wang's successful road to quitting smoking and drinking.' He told how Mr Wang had given up smoking and drinking and was now in good health and feeling happier.

content: Han Gang specially arranged a family gathering and invited Han Ming and other relatives to celebrate. At the party, Han Gang and Han Ming chatted about the latest developments in the Sino-US trade war. Han Gang told Han Ming that the Sino-US trade war has escalated to the stage of mutual tariffs, and both sides have taken measures to protect their national interests. He explained that the reason for the trade war is that the United States believes that China’s trade practices are unfair and its trade deficit with China is too large. Han Gang also mentioned that Huawei, as China's largest telecommunications equipment manufacturer, has been suppressed and restricted by the US government. This incident has triggered global attention and discussion. Han Gang told Han Ming that the Sino-US trade war has had an important impact on the global economic structure and international cooperation, and requires everyone to pay close attention and think about it. After hearing this, Han Ming expressed concern and hoped that China and the United States could resolve their differences through dialogue and consultation and achieve mutual benefit and win-win results.
dialogs: Do you know? The Sino-US trade war has escalated to the stage of mutual tariffs, and both sides have taken measures to protect their national interests.
Oh, really? Could you please tell us more about the reasons that led to the outbreak of the trade war?
The reason is that the United States believes that China’s trade practices are unfair and its trade deficit with China is too large.

I heard that Huawei, as China's largest telecommunications equipment manufacturer, has also been suppressed and restricted by the US government. This incident has triggered attention and discussion around the world. What do you think of this incident?

Yes, this incident has indeed triggered global attention and discussion. I believe that the Sino-US trade war has had an important impact on the global economic structure and international cooperation, and requires everyone to pay close attention and think about it.

I think both sides should resolve differences through dialogue and consultation to achieve mutual benefit and win-win results.

content: On May 10, 2019, Han Gang attended the launch of the 'Dark Knight' soundtrack together with his long-time friend Zhang Lei. They expressed their appreciation for the soundtrack to the composers and shared their own feelings about the film's music. This press conference not only allowed Han Gang and Zhang Lei to better understand the music creation process of 'The Dark Knight', but also deepened their friendship with each other.
dialogs: Hello, Han Gang. Remember the 'Dark Knight' soundtrack launch event we mentioned on May 10 last year?
Yes, of course I remember. My friend Zhang Lei and I went to the press conference.
Yes, the conference was held in a well-known concert hall. Hans Zimmer and James Newton Howard introduced their music creation to the audience. Did you enjoy the chat?
Of course, Zhang Lei and I have always been loyal fans of 'The Dark Knight'. It was great to hear those classic melodies.
Did Hans Zimmer and James Newton Howard communicate with you? What did you share?

Yes, Zhang Lei and I still had the opportunity to communicate with them after the press conference. We expressed our love for the soundtrack and shared our own experiences with them. The two composers were also very enthusiastic in sharing some of their music creation experiences with us.

content: During the Spring Festival, Han Gang and his friend Zhang Lei prepared the ingredients for dumplings, including flour, water, salt and various fillings. They mix the flour and water together and knead it into a smooth dough, which is then left to ferment for a while. Then, they work together to cut the dough into small pieces and roll it into thin sheets with a rolling pin to form a dumpling wrapper that can be used to wrap the fillings. Han Gang and Zhang Lei each chose their favorite fillings. Han Gang chose leeks, pork, eggs and chopped green onions, while Zhang Lei chose shrimps, pork and mushrooms. They make dumplings together in the kitchen, gently pinching the wrappers together with their fingers to form half-moon-shaped dumplings. During the process of making dumplings, they exchanged dumpling-making skills and experiences with each other and enjoyed the fun of making dumplings together. Place the wrapped dumplings aside, waiting to be cooked. Finally, they put the dumplings into boiling water and cooked them together, watching the changes in the dumplings until they floated. The cooked dumplings were taken out and drained. Han Gang and Zhang Lei dipped them in special sauces, such as vinegar, chili oil and minced garlic, to make the dumplings more delicious. Finally, they sat together, tasted the dumplings made by themselves, had the joy of reunion, and celebrated the arrival of the Spring Festival together.
dialogs: Hello, AI assistant. We made dumplings together during the Spring Festival last year. Do you think we should make dumplings again this year?
What filling did you like when making dumplings last time?
I really like the leek and pork filling you used, it’s very delicious.
When making dumplings, pay attention to the matching of fillings and dough. Don’t make it too much or too little. After making the dumplings, what would you like to drink?
Of course, how can we not eat dumplings during the Spring Festival? This year we might as well try a different filling.
I plan to use leeks and pork this year, add some mushrooms, and try dumplings stuffed with chicken. What do you think?
It sounds good. I’m going to make dumplings stuffed with shrimp, pork and chives, and try stuffing with chopped green onion sausage.
I like light Longjing tea very much, and there happen to be some sweet and sour fruity wine that is limited to the Spring Festival.
Okay, then I'll make a pot of Longjing tea, and we can enjoy tea and the dumplings we made by the kitchen.
OK, I'll pour the tea. Well, the aroma and taste of this are very good.
These dumplings are delicious. Thank you for making dumplings with me and celebrating the Spring Festival with me.
each other, this is a very pleasant experience.

Wang Li was deeply interested in how choreographers convey the emotions and thoughts of characters through dance. She and Han Gang discussed the details and significance of dance. They believe that 'House of Cards' successfully demonstrated the relationships and psychological changes between the characters through this choreography, adding unique artistic expression to the drama. After watching 'House of Cards', both Han Gang and Wang Li became more interested in film and television choreography and decided to pay more attention to and understand this field in the future.
dialogs: Hello, Han Gang, how are you doing lately?

Yes, it was a very good political drama.
Your girlfriend is a dancer. What does she think of the choreography of this show?

She has deep respect for how choreographers convey the emotions and psychology of characters through dance. After watching 'House of Cards' this time, she decided to have a deeper understanding of and pay attention to film and television choreography.

content: On the evening of May 10, 2019, Han Gang and his girlfriend Wang Li went to a local art gallery to admire Van Gogh's 'Starry Night'. As a marketing expert, Han Gang is very interested in art theory in the field of art and design, and his girlfriend Wang Li also has a strong interest in art. The two support and encourage each other to pursue their interests. When they entered the gallery, they were deeply attracted by the uniqueness of the work 'Starry Night'. They stood in front of the work and carefully observed every detail together. Wang Li was struck by Van Gogh's expressionist style and in-depth observation of natural landscapes, and she shared with Han Gang her unique feelings about the cypress trees and small villages in the painting. Han Gang explained his understanding of this work to Wang Li by explaining the colors and lines used by Van Gogh in his work. In their mutual exchanges, they not only deepened their understanding of art, but also deepened their feelings for each other. This art trip not only allowed Han Gang and Wang Li to enjoy the beauty of art together, but also deepened their romantic relationship.
dialogs: Hello, AI assistant. Can you recommend me some art theories about Van Gogh?
Of course, what theory are you interested in? Such as colors, lines, etc.
I am more concerned about Van Gogh’s expressionist style. Can you introduce some of his related theories?

Van Gogh had unique insights into the use of color and expression of emotion. He conveyed his inner emotions through expressionism style. For example, 'Starry Night' was presented by Van Gogh using expressionist techniques. He used distorted forms and bright colors to express the beauty of nature. At the same time, Van Gogh also conducted in-depth exploration of the harmonious relationship between lines and colors in his works. For example, the golden wheat ears clustered in 'Melody on a Wheat Field' are Van Gogh's unique use of lines and colors.
Thank you very much for your introduction, which helped me learn more about the theoretical knowledge about art.
You're welcome. If you want to know more about it, I can help you collect some related literature or videos.
AI assistant, do you remember the last time we went to watch 'Starry Night' together?
Of course I remember it. We went to the local art gallery to see Van Gogh's 'Starry Night' together on May 10, 2019. That experience gave me a deeper understanding of art.
Yes, we observed every detail of the painting at that time, and you also told me many unique insights into art theory.
I still remember that you had your own unique understanding and feelings about the small village and cypress trees in 'Starry Night'. I also learned a lot of new insights from communicating with you.

Yes, through research and observation of an art master like Van Gogh, I gained a deeper understanding of my own artistic interests and understanding. At that time, we became closer to each other because of this.

Yes, I think supporting and encouraging each other through sharing interests and hobbies is one of the important ways to enhance the relationship between each other. For me personally, I am also very interested in the artistic interests you share. I will be very happy if we have the opportunity to observe art exhibits or exchange cultural activities together in the future.
Of course, there will definitely be more topics worthy of communication between us. Thank you for your understanding and support.

content: Han Gang and Wang Li decided to visit the Tiantai Temple in Lin'an City, Zhejiang Province together during the Spring Festival to experience the atmosphere of traditional Chinese culture and Zen practice. They arrived at Tiantai Temple on the first day of the first lunar month and saw the scene of lights and colorful decorations inside and outside the temple, creating a festive atmosphere. Han Gang told Wang Li that during the Spring Festival, people will clean up and worship ancestors and household gods for peace and well-being. They paid homage to the Sakyamuni Buddha statue in the Main Hall of Tiantai Temple and prayed to the Buddha for everything to go well in the new year. Afterwards, they came to the Kinnara Hall, meditated quietly, and experienced the realm of Zen practice. Wang Li felt the tranquility and etherealness of Kinnara Hall, and she shared her feelings and insights with Han Gang. They also visited the Bodhi tree in the temple and were amazed by the tall and dense tree. Han Gang introduced the symbolic meaning of the bodhi tree to Wang Li, and they took a group photo together under the bodhi tree. Finally, they came to the release pond and released some insect fish to express their respect and compassion for life. Han Gang and Wang Li supported and encouraged each other during their visit to Tiantai Temple, and jointly felt the charm of traditional Chinese architecture and Zen culture, which made their romantic relationship stronger and better.
dialogs: Hi, how are you? How's the weather today?
Hello! The weather is fine today and suitable for travel.
I went to Tiantai Temple in Lin'an, Zhejiang a few days ago and felt the charm of traditional culture.
Wow, that sounds great! What interesting sight did you see?
There were lights and colorful decorations inside and outside the temple, which was very festive. We also visited the Buddha and experienced the feeling of meditation.
What a meaningful trip. You and Wang Li took a lot of beautiful photos, right?
Yes, we took a precious photo together under the bodhi tree. We shared our experiences together and gained a lot.
Sounds great. Can you send me these photos?
No problem, let me find the location of the photo.
OK, I'll wait for you. But I'll go to bed later, good night.
Okay, good night.

content: Marketing experts Han Gang and Zhao Juan are acquaintances and have collaborated on a successful ethanol marketing campaign. The event was held on May 12, 2021, and the theme was the geometric structure and chemical properties of ethanol molecules. Han Gang made full use of his professional knowledge and experience in marketing to jointly design a lively and interesting event with Zhao Juan. During the event, Han Gang introduced the importance of ethanol in the field of chemistry to the participants by explaining the geometric structure of ethanol molecules and its relationship with chemical properties. He explained in detail that the ethanol molecule is made up of two carbon atoms and one oxygen atom, and takes on the shape of a slightly twisted, tilted tetrahedron. Han Gang also mentioned the chemical properties and reactivity of ethanol molecules, including the formation of hydrogen bonds with water molecules and esterification, ester hydrolysis and other reactions with other compounds. Through vivid speeches and examples, Han Gang successfully aroused the interest of the attendees and conveyed the important application value of ethanol in the field of chemistry. As a partner of the event, Zhao Juan is responsible for the organization and publicity of the event to ensure the smooth progress of the event. She carefully arranged the meeting venue, invited relevant people to attend, and promoted the event extensively on social media. Thanks to the careful cooperation of Han Gang and Zhao Juan, the ethanol marketing event achieved significant success, attracting a large number of attendees and increasing the visibility and sales of ethanol in the market.
dialogs: Hello, Mr. Han, do you remember that we collaborated on the ethanol marketing campaign last May?
Yes, of course I remember. It was a very successful event. You contacted me recently, what's the matter?

That’s right, we are looking for experts who can share the geometric structure and chemical properties of ethanol molecules, and would like to invite you to give a speech in this regard. Do you have time to come to our company to give this speech?
Thank you very much for your invitation. I can confirm my timeline and communicate the response to your company. When is the event?
The speech will be on February 22, 2022. Our conference room is located in Room 305, Building A. Thank you for your cooperation.

You need to arrive 20 minutes before the lecture starts as we need to test the audio and video equipment. In addition, practitioners and experts from various industries will be present on the day of the event. Please be sure to accurately describe the chemical structure and chemical reactions of molecules to facilitate everyone's understanding.
Got it. I will be well prepared and arrive on time. Thank you very much for the invitation and I'm looking forward to this talk.

content: On March 15, 2019, Han Gang and his colleague Liu Yang visited an installation art exhibition. The most impressive work in this exhibition was 'Fragmented' by Chinese artist Andy Ou. They were deeply interested in the artistry and creativity of the work.
dialogs: Hello, how can I help you?
Hello, yesterday I went to visit an installation art exhibition.
Sounds interesting. Which exhibition did you go to?
I went to the installation art exhibition held somewhere on March 15, 2019. I went with my colleague Liu Yang.
So what works in the exhibition attracted your attention?
The most impressive work in the exhibition is 'Fragmentation' created by Chinese artist Andy Ou. This work is so interesting.
So what does this work look like?

This is an installation art pieced together from many small fragments. The material of these small fragments is somewhat like mirrors, and then Andy Ou used an ingenious method to piece them together. In the end, the whole work looks like a three-dimensional puzzle, which is very interesting.

dialogs: Hello Han Gang, I know you participated in a triathlon. Would you like to know how you decided to participate in this extremely challenging event?

In the end, you successfully completed the game and achieved excellent results. How does Chen Hong feel about this?
Chen Hong is very proud of me and touched by my perseverance and courage. This competition allowed me to realize my dream and deepened the friendship between Chen Hong and me.

content: One day in 2016, Han Gang and his neighbor Chen Hong decided to watch the high-profile animated movie 'Your Name' together. They agreed to go to a nearby movie theater on weekend nights. That night, they arrived at the cinema a little early and bought movie tickets. Han Gang and Chen Hong entered the theater, found their seats, and sat down to enjoy this acclaimed work. After the movie started, they were deeply attracted by the movie's delicate and touching storyline and excellent visual effects. Whenever the plot reaches a climax, they will silently cheer for the protagonists Mitsuha Miyamizu and Tachibana Taki. Han Gang and Chen Hong were attracted by the scene descriptions in the movie. The morning in the countryside and the starry sky at night, and the bustling and crowded city. These beautiful pictures made them feel as if they were actually there. They also admired the theme song 'Previous Life' in the movie. The music composed by Joe Hisaishi complemented the plot and resonated with them. After watching the movie, Han Gang and Chen Hong exchanged their feelings and thoughts about the movie. They were all moved by the movie and felt that it was an influential work in the field of animation and animation. They expressed their appreciation for Kyoto Animation's production capabilities and the film's success. This movie-watching experience also deepened the friendship between Han Gang and Chen Hong, and they decided to watch movies and participate in other interesting activities together in the future.
dialogs: Hello, Han Gang. It’s been five years since we last watched Your Name together, and time flies.
Yes, that movie-watching experience is still vivid in my mind. What's your favorite scene in the movie?
What impressed me most was the scene in the movie where the protagonists met at the night festival. And you?
What I like most is the scene where the protagonists connect with each other across time. It’s so touching.
When we were sitting in the cinema watching this movie, we really enjoyed it. That day we were still lining up in front of the cinema waiting to buy tickets.
Yes, I was very excited at the time. In fact, Kyoto Animation has a new movie now. Do you want to go and watch it together?
